**Upstream:** M06 (episodes/segments, taxonomy versions for label classes), M18 (cohorts `coh-` → task generation; M18-8 `:materialize` calls M07-3 in user context), M19 (review decisions routed via M19-5), M16/SVC-03 (pre-annotation workflow execution; results re-enter via M16-9 output registration), M01/M02/M03 (session, scope, authz/audit). **Downstream:** M08 (approved annotation sets eligible for snapshot membership — edge M07→M08 per §0.5.2; annotation-status facets in the catalog), M15 (QA-detected failures, BP-05 source), M18 (label distributions, agreement analytics joins), M19 (overlay rendering of annotations), M20 (queue/escalation/approval notifications).

**FRD coverage:** FR-A6.1–A6.9 (complete A6 family), BR-06, DA-13, RPT-04 (M07-13), AC-03; BP-01 steps 6–8. Label-type completeness per FR-A6.1 is restated as a closed enum in §2.7.2 F1.

#### 2.7.2 Functional & UI/UX Design

**Primary functions**

| # | Function | Description | FRD |
|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | Label-type coverage | Closed `label_type` enum, exactly: `object_label \| spatial_region_2d` (boxes/polygons) `\| spatial_region_3d` (3D boxes) `\| temporal_event \| action_label` (task/phase/atomic levels) `\| task_outcome \| language_caption \| failure_category` — one workflow for all Physical AI label kinds | FR-A6.1 |
| F2 | Project governance | Projects define labeling instructions (versioned), allowed labels (Label Schema bound to M06-9 taxonomy versions), review policy, acceptance criteria | FR-A6.5 |
| F3 | Pre-annotation with provenance | Generator registry jobs (VLM captioner, open-vocabulary detector, SAM-family mask propagator, action segmenter — DA-13, per §0.7.3); every pre-annotation records generator identity, version, generation time, confidence/quality signal, review_status | FR-A6.2, FR-A6.3 |
| F4 | No silent auto-approval | `preannotation_policy.mode = review_required` (default) or `auto_accept_low_risk` — the latter requires project `risk_class=low` **and** tenant-scope authorization; policy identity is recorded as the reviewer (BR-06) | FR-A6.2, BR-06 |
| F5 | Human disposition actions | Annotators accept / edit / reject / comment on every pre-annotation; submit is blocked while suggestions are undispositioned (policy-configurable) | FR-A6.4 |
| F6 | QA sampling + overlap + gold | Configurable sampling rate, stratification, overlap (consensus) review with pluggable consolidation (majority vote default; Dawid-Skene-style annotator weighting; IoU clustering for regions), hidden gold/honeypot tasks at 3–10% (per §0.7.3) | FR-A6.6 |
| F7 | Adjudication & agreement | Review queue ordered by ascending agreement; senior adjudicator decision is terminal; Krippendorff's alpha primary metric (per label type per batch), Cohen's kappa reported per annotator pair; thresholds configurable (defaults α ≥ 0.80 pass, 0.667–0.80 caution, < 0.667 block per §0.7.3) | FR-A6.5, FR-A6.6 |
| F8 | Versioned sets + reviewer history | Annotation Sets assembled from accepted tasks; integer versions immutable on approval; full reviewer/adjudication history retained per label | FR-A6.7 |
| F9 | Expert escalation | High-value/ambiguous tasks routed to expert pool with context; resolution via adjudication | FR-A6.8 |
| F10 | Operations reporting | Throughput, rework, rejection, QA pass rate, unresolved review queue, pre-annotation acceptance mix, agreement trend | FR-A6.9, RPT-04 |

**Label payload shapes (FR-A6.1; binding for M07-5/M07-7 schema validation and M19 overlay rendering):**

| label_type | Canonical payload (JSONB) | Agreement distance (per §0.7.3) |
|---|---|---|
| `object_label` | `{class, instance_id?, attributes{}}` | nominal |
| `spatial_region_2d` | `{geometry: bbox{x,y,w,h} \| polygon[[x,y]...], frame_ref \| frame_range, class, attributes{}}` | IoU-coincidence (match threshold default 0.5) |
| `spatial_region_3d` | `{box3d: {center[3], size[3], rotation_quat[4]}, frame_ref \| track_range, class, attributes{}}` | 3D-IoU-coincidence |
| `temporal_event` | `{t_start, t_end, event_class, attributes{}}` | interval (boundary tolerance from alignment policy, DA-05) |
| `action_label` | `{level: task \| phase \| atomic, action_class (taxonomy node), t_start, t_end, target_objects[]}` | nominal + interval |
| `task_outcome` | `{outcome: success \| partial \| failure, score?, criteria_results[]}` | ordinal |
| `language_caption` | `{text, span?: {t_start, t_end}, language}` | text similarity reported descriptively; α not gated |
| `failure_category` | `{category (taxonomy node), severity?, evidence_span?}` | nominal |

All payloads carry implicit envelope fields added by M07 (`schema_version`, `taxonomy pins`, `created_at`); timestamps are episode-relative seconds aligned to the M06 canonical timeline.

**UI pages**

**P1 — Annotation Project Setup Wizard** (4 steps; binding `M07-1 POST`, then `M07-2`). Step 1 Basics → Step 2 Label Schema → Step 3 Source & Pools → Step 4 Review/QA & Pre-annotation Policy.

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| name | text | 3–120 chars, unique per project | — | "kitchen-manipulation-labels-q3" | required; `E_CONFLICT` on duplicate |
| description | textarea | markdown ≤ 4 KB | — | "Purpose, scope, deadline…" | optional |
| instructions_doc | rich text + file ref | markdown / PDF ref | — | "Paste labeling guidelines…" | required non-empty (FR-A6.5); versioned on edit |
| label_types[] | multi-select | F1 closed enum | — | — | required ≥ 1; enum-exact else `E_VALIDATION` |
| label_schema.classes | taxonomy picker per label_type | `{taxonomy_id, version, node_ids[]}` | latest approved taxonomy version | "Select classes…" | every node resolvable in M06-9 version; pinned version recorded |
| label_schema.attributes | repeating rows | name/type(enum,text,number,bool)/required | — | — | attribute names snake_case unique |
| source | radio + picker | `cohort_ref (coh-)` \| episode list | — | "Pick cohort or episodes" | refs resolvable; episodes quality-eligible (excludes `alignment_failed`, DA-05) |
| annotator_pool / reviewer_pool / expert_pool | user multi-pickers | project members | — | — | reviewer ∩ annotator allowed, but self-review blocked at runtime; expert_pool required if escalation enabled |
| review_policy.mode | select | `sample \| full \| none` | sample | — | `none` allowed only with `risk_class=low` |
| review_policy.sampling_rate | slider | 0.01–1.0 | 0.10 | — | required when mode=sample |
| review_policy.overlap_n | number | 1–5 | 1 | — | ≥ 2 enables consensus + consolidation method select |
| review_policy.consolidation | select | `majority_vote \| annotator_weighted \| iou_cluster` | majority_vote | — | `iou_cluster` only for spatial label types (per §0.7.3) |
| review_policy.gold_fraction | slider | 0–0.10 | 0.05 | — | gold library ref required when > 0 |
| acceptance_criteria | structured | `{min_alpha, caution_alpha, max_rejection_rate, min_gold_accuracy}` | 0.80 / 0.667 / 0.15 / 0.90 | — | 0 < caution ≤ min ≤ 1 (FR-A6.6, per §0.7.3) |
| preannotation_policy.mode | select | `review_required \| auto_accept_low_risk` | review_required | — | auto-accept requires `risk_class=low` + TA-scope authorization, else `E_ANN_POLICY_AUTO_ACCEPT_FORBIDDEN` (BR-06) |
| preannotation_policy.confidence_floor | number | 0–1 | 0.95 | — | required when auto-accept |
| risk_class | select | `low \| standard \| safety_critical` | standard | — | safety_critical forces overlap_n ≥ 2 |

Wizard validates each step client-side, re-validated server-side; success → toast "Project anp-… created (draft)" + redirect to project detail with an "Activate" call-to-action (`M07-2 :transition`).

**P2 — Task Queue** (per project; binding `M07-4`, actions `M07-5`, `M07-12`). Role-shaped: Annotators see *My queue* (claimed) and *Available* (unassigned, claim button) only; QA Leads see all statuses with facets (status, label_type, priority, rework, escalated, agreement band). Columns: task id `ant-…`, episode/segment ref, label types, pre-annotation badge (count + max confidence), status chip per the exact task machine, rework_count, age. Gold tasks are **never visually distinguishable to annotators** (honeypot integrity per §0.7.3); QA Leads see a gold badge. Claim conflicts surface as a non-blocking toast ("Task was claimed by someone else") and the row refreshes. Empty state: "No tasks available — ask your QA Lead to generate tasks" with `M07-3` shortcut for leads. Loading: skeleton rows; queue auto-refreshes every 15 s.

**P3 — Labeling Workspace (embedded in M19, §2.19).** The labeling surface is **not a standalone M07 renderer**: opening a task launches an M19 workbench session (`M19-1` with `asset={annotation_task: ant-…}`, mode `annotation`), where M19 owns synchronized 4D playback (video, point cloud, robot state, action timeline) and M07 owns the **annotation side panel** mounted into that session. The panel is schema-driven from the project Label Schema: 2D box/polygon tools, 3D box tool (placed in the point-cloud viewport M19 renders), temporal range selector on the timeline, caption editor, classification/outcome pickers, failure-category picker. All label data-plane calls go to M07 (`M07-4` task detail, `M07-7` pre-annotation list/review, `M07-5 :submit`) under the **task-scoped token** issued at claim (§2.7.5); M19 never writes labels (single-writer, §1.6.4) — QA decisions made inside review sessions route back via `M19-5` → M07-9. Pre-annotations render as dashed overlays with generator chip (name@version, confidence, generated_at — FR-A6.3); per-suggestion action bar **Accept / Edit / Reject / Comment** (FR-A6.4) calls `M07-7 :review`; Edit switches the overlay to editable mode and saves the corrected geometry/text. Submit is disabled (tooltip "N suggestions pending disposition") until all pre-annotations are terminal when `require_preannotation_disposition=true`. Save indicator: per-action optimistic UI with background sync; offline/network loss switches the panel to read-only with a reconnect banner and unsynced-change buffer.

**P4 — QA Review Board** (binding `M07-8`, `M07-9`, `M07-4`). Tabs: **Sample sets** (create dialog below → `M07-8 POST`; list with progress rings), **Review queue** (qa_pending tasks **ordered by ascending agreement** so contested items surface first, per §0.7.3; side-by-side panel: annotator labels vs. consensus/gold vs. pre-annotation, diff highlighting; verdict bar Accept / Reject→rework / Fix (adjudicator-corrected payload) → `M07-9`), **Escalations** (escalated tasks with reason, context refs, suggested expert; adjudicate inline). Reject requires a reason and a failure-category pick; "also raise failure record" checkbox emits to M15 (BP-05). Self-review attempts render the verdict bar disabled with tooltip "You annotated this task" (`E_ANN_SELF_REVIEW_FORBIDDEN`).

QA sample creation dialog fields:

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| name | text | 3–80 chars | "sample-{date}" | "weekly-spatial-audit" | required; unique per project |
| strategy | select | `random \| stratified \| low_confidence \| targeted` | random | — | required; `targeted` requires explicit task filter |
| sampling_rate | slider | 0.01–1.0 | project `review_policy.sampling_rate` | — | required; rate × population ≥ 1 task else `E_VALIDATION` |
| stratify_by | select | `annotator \| label_type` | — | — | required iff strategy=stratified |
| overlap_n | number | 1–5 | 1 | — | ≥ 2 spawns blind re-annotation assignments for consensus measurement |
| scope.submitted_after / before | date pickers | RFC 3339 | last sample boundary | — | after < before |
| scope.annotator_ids / label_types | multi-pickers | pool members / F1 enum | all | — | optional |
| reviewer_ids | user multi-picker | reviewer pool | auto-balance | — | self-review collisions flagged inline (`E_ANN_SELF_REVIEW_FORBIDDEN` pre-check) |

**P5 — Agreement Dashboard** (binding `M07-10`). Header KPI cards: project α (primary, per §0.7.3), QA pass rate, gold accuracy, unresolved adjudications. Charts: α per label_type per batch (threshold bands green ≥ 0.80 / amber 0.667–0.80 / red < 0.667 from project acceptance_criteria), pairwise kappa heatmap (annotator × annotator), per-annotator gold accuracy trend, consolidation conflict rate. Red batches show the mandated action chip "blocked — requeue & guideline review" (per §0.7.3). Drill-down opens the contributing tasks in P4.

**P6 — Annotation Operations Report (RPT-04)** (binding `M07-13`). Filters: project, window, group_by (project/annotator/label_type/week). Panels: throughput (tasks/day, labels/hour), rework rate, rejection rate, QA pass rate, unresolved review queue depth + age histogram, pre-annotation disposition mix (accept/edit/reject %), time-per-task distribution. Export CSV.

**Output rendering & exception handling (UI-wide):** success → entity toast with id + deep link; empty → instructive empty states (see P2); loading → skeletons, never spinners > 300 ms without text; long ops (task generation, pre-annotation jobs) render the 202 `workflow_run_ref` as a progress chip polling M16-3. Errors: network failure → retry banner with exponential backoff, unsynced labeling buffer preserved; 403 `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` → read-only rendering, actions tooltip "requires {permission_key}"; 429 `E_RATE_LIMITED` → countdown toast honoring `Retry-After`; 422 `E_VALIDATION` → field-anchored messages from `details[]`; 409 claim/state conflicts → refresh-and-explain pattern (never silent retry on `:submit`).

#### 2.7.3 Interface Design

All endpoints follow §1.4 (envelope, pagination, `Idempotency-Key` on POST, `If-Match` on PATCH/PUT, type-prefixed ULIDs). Module error namespace `E_ANN_*`. Authz via M03-10, audit via M03-11. Long operations return `202` + `workflow_run_ref` (§1.4.5).

**Normative state machines (M07, exact)**

```text
AnnotationProject.status:
  draft ──activate──▶ active ──close_labeling──▶ review ──complete──▶ completed (terminal)
  active ⇄ paused (pause / resume)
  draft|active|paused|review ──cancel──▶ cancelled (terminal)

AnnotationTask.status:
  unassigned ──:claim──▶ claimed ──:submit──▶ submitted ──qa_route──▶ qa_pending
  qa_pending ──review/adjudicate──▶ accepted (terminal) | rejected
  rejected ──rework──▶ claimed (original annotator; rework_count+1)
  claimed ──:skip | claim_timeout──▶ unassigned
  claimed|submitted|qa_pending ──:escalate──▶ escalated ──adjudicate──▶ accepted | rejected
  submitted ──auto_accept (review_policy.mode=sample and not sampled)──▶ accepted

PreAnnotation.review_status: pending ──accept|edit|reject──▶ accepted | edited | rejected (terminal)
  (comment appends to review history; never transitions state)

AnnotationSet.status: draft ──assembly_validated──▶ submitted ──:approve──▶ approved (terminal, version frozen)
                                                    submitted ──:reject──▶ rejected (terminal)
```

**Module error codes (`E_ANN_*`)**

| Code | HTTP | Raised when |
|---|---|---|
| `E_ANN_PROJECT_NOT_ACTIVE` | 409 | Task generation/claim/submit on a project not in `active` (or `review` for QA verbs) |
| `E_ANN_TASK_CLAIM_CONFLICT` | 409 | Atomic claim lost to a concurrent annotator |
| `E_ANN_SCHEMA_VIOLATION` | 422 | Label payload fails Label Schema validation (class not in pinned taxonomy version, geometry malformed, attribute missing) |
| `E_ANN_POLICY_AUTO_ACCEPT_FORBIDDEN` | 409 | `auto_accept_low_risk` configured/used without `risk_class=low` + tenant-scope authorization (BR-06) |
| `E_ANN_PREANNOTATION_UNDISPOSITIONED` | 409 | `:submit` while pre-annotations remain `pending` and policy requires disposition (FR-A6.4) |
| `E_ANN_SELF_REVIEW_FORBIDDEN` | 403 | Reviewer/adjudicator equals the task's annotator |
| `E_ANN_AGREEMENT_BELOW_THRESHOLD` | 409 | Set approval blocked by acceptance criteria (α/gold/rejection thresholds); `details[]` lists failing metrics |
| `E_ANN_SET_INCOMPLETE` | 409 | Set assembly scope contains non-accepted tasks, unresolved adjudications, or open escalations |
| `E_ANN_ESCALATION_TARGET_MISSING` | 422 | `:escalate` on a project with an empty expert pool |
| Shared | — | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_STATE_INVALID`, `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED`, `E_CONFLICT`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_RATE_LIMITED`, `E_NOT_FOUND` per §1.4.3 |

**M07-1 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/annotation-projects` · `GET` (same)** — create / list.
Permission: `label.project:create` / `label.project:read`.
POST body (compact):

```json
{ "name": "kitchen-manip-q3", "description": "...", "instructions_doc": {"format": "markdown", "content_ref": "obj://..."},
  "label_types": ["spatial_region_2d", "action_label", "language_caption"],
  "label_schema": { "classes": [ {"label_type": "action_label", "taxonomy_id": "tax-...", "taxonomy_version": 4, "node_ids": ["grasp", "place"]} ],
    "attributes": [ {"label_type": "spatial_region_2d", "name": "occluded", "type": "bool", "required": false} ] },
  "source": { "cohort_ref": "coh-..." },
  "annotator_pool": ["usr-..."], "reviewer_pool": ["usr-..."], "expert_pool": ["usr-..."],
  "review_policy": { "mode": "sample", "sampling_rate": 0.1, "overlap_n": 2, "consolidation": "majority_vote", "gold_fraction": 0.05, "gold_library_ref": "gld-..." },
  "acceptance_criteria": { "min_alpha": 0.8, "caution_alpha": 0.667, "max_rejection_rate": 0.15, "min_gold_accuracy": 0.9 },
  "preannotation_policy": { "mode": "review_required" }, "risk_class": "standard" }
```

Processing (POST): (1) authz `label.project:create` at `{project_id}`; (2) validate `label_types[]` against the F1 closed enum and every schema class against the pinned M06-9 taxonomy version (`E_VALIDATION` with field paths); (3) BR-06 gate — `preannotation_policy.mode=auto_accept_low_risk` requires `risk_class=low` **and** an M03-10 check of `label.project:admin` at **tenant** scope for the caller; failure → `E_ANN_POLICY_AUTO_ACCEPT_FORBIDDEN` (FR-A6.2); (4) `risk_class=safety_critical` forces `overlap_n ≥ 2` (per §0.7.3); (5) **Tx:** insert `label.annotation_project` (status `draft`) + `label.label_schema` v1 + instructions v1 + outbox `label.project.created` — commit; (6) audit; **201** `{anp_id, status:"draft", etag}`. GET filters: `q, status, owner_id, label_type, risk_class, created_after/before, sort`.

**M07-2 `GET /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}` · `PATCH` · `POST ...:transition`**
Permission: `label.project:read` / `label.project:update` / `label.project:update`.
GET returns config + schema versions + pools + policy + live counters (tasks by status, α summary). PATCH: full config editable in `draft`; in `active` only pools, sampling tuning, instructions (creates instructions v(n+1); open tasks keep their generation-time guideline version — FR-A6.7 traceability) and schema **extensions** (new classes ⇒ schema v(n+1); removals forbidden while tasks reference them → `E_VALIDATION`); If-Match required. `:transition` body `{"target_status": "active", "reason": "..."}` — validates against the exact project machine (`E_STATE_INVALID` with `details.allowed_transitions`); `active→review` requires no `unassigned/claimed` tasks remaining or explicit `force=true` (force releases unclaimed tasks to `cancelled` and records counts); `review→completed` requires every annotation set in scope terminal (`approved|rejected`); `cancel` requires reason. Tx per transition + outbox `label.project.transitioned` + audit.

**M07-3 `POST /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}/tasks:generate`** — batch task generation.
Permission: `label.project:update`. Body:

```json
{ "source": { "cohort_ref": "coh-...", "cohort_version": 3 } , "unit": "segment",
  "bundle_size": 1, "priority": "p2", "dedupe": true,
  "gold": { "enabled": true, "fraction": 0.05, "gold_library_ref": "gld-..." },
  "preannotation": { "auto_launch_job_profile": "paj-profile-detector-v2" } }
```

Processing: (1) authz; project must be `active` (`E_ANN_PROJECT_NOT_ACTIVE`); (2) resolve source: cohort member list pinned at `(coh-, version)` via M18-8, or explicit `episode_ids[]/segment_refs[]` validated against M06 (exists, quality-eligible, not `alignment_failed` per DA-05); restricted episodes require caller read access (deny ⇒ `E_RESTRICTED_DATA`, §0.5.3); (3) `dedupe=true` skips units already tasked in this project; (4) compute overlap plan — `review_policy.overlap_n > 1` creates N assignments for the consensus-designated fraction; gold plan injects `gold.fraction` hidden gold tasks interleaved (is_gold concealed from annotator responses, per §0.7.3); (5) ≤ 2,000 units: **Tx** insert tasks + assignments + outbox `label.tasks.generated` — commit, **201** `{generated_count, gold_count, skipped_count}`; > 2,000: enqueue M16 workflow (template family `annotation`, job `task_generation`) → **202** `{workflow_run_ref}` (idempotent by `Idempotency-Key`; the workflow checkpoints per 1,000-unit chunk); (6) optional pre-annotation auto-launch chains M07-6 with the same idempotency scope; (7) audit.

**M07-4 `GET /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}/tasks` · `GET /api/v1/annotation-tasks/{task_id}`** — queues / detail.
Permission: `label.task:read` (annotators receive a **role-shaped projection**: only `unassigned` + own tasks; `is_gold`, gold answers, and other annotators' overlap submissions are never serialized to annotator-scope callers; QA-scope callers receive full rows). List filters: `status, assigned_to_me, label_type, priority, is_escalated, rework, agreement_lt, episode_ref, page_*`. List item shape (annotator projection):

```json
{ "items": [ { "task_id": "ant-...", "anp_id": "anp-...", "unit": "segment", "asset_ref": "epi-...#seg-...",
  "status": "unassigned", "priority": "p2", "label_types": ["spatial_region_2d", "action_label"],
  "preannotation_summary": { "count": 7, "max_confidence": 0.91, "pending": 7 },
  "rework_count": 0, "schema_version": 3, "created_at": "..." } ],
  "next_page_token": null, "total_size": 412 }
```

Detail adds: assignment(s) (own only for annotator scope), M19 session bootstrap hint (`{workbench_open: {asset, mode: "annotation"}}`), guideline/schema/taxonomy version pins, and the full history array (claims, submissions, reviews, adjudications, escalations — FR-A6.7); QA-scope detail additionally carries `is_gold`, overlap submissions, and consolidation output.

**M07-5 `POST /api/v1/annotation-tasks/{task_id}:claim` · `:submit` · `:skip`** — annotator actions.
Permission: `label.task:submit` (all three verbs; assignment ownership enforced).
`:claim` processing: (1) authz + project `active`; (2) atomic claim — `UPDATE label.annotation_assignment SET annotator_id=:caller, status='claimed', claimed_at=now() WHERE task_id=:id AND status='unassigned'` (single statement; zero rows → `E_ANN_TASK_CLAIM_CONFLICT` 409); task status aggregates to `claimed`; (3) issue **task-scoped token** `{task_id, assignment_id, user, verbs:[submit, preannotation:review], exp: claim_ttl}` (§2.7.5); (4) outbox + INFO log; **200** `{assignment_id, task_token, expires_at}`. Claim TTL expiry (default 24 h, project-configurable) releases to `unassigned` (sweep job).
`:submit` body: `{"annotations": [ {"label_type": "spatial_region_2d", "payload": {...}, "source": {"kind": "manual"} | {"kind": "pre_annotation", "pre_id": "pra-...", "disposition": "accepted|edited"} } ], "time_spent_s": 412}`. Processing: (1) authz + caller holds the active claim (else `E_STATE_INVALID`); (2) validate every payload against the task's pinned Label Schema version → `E_ANN_SCHEMA_VIOLATION` (422, per-item `details[]`); payloads > 256 KB are rejected inline and must use the spillover upload ref (§2.7.4); (3) enforce pre-annotation disposition completeness when `require_preannotation_disposition=true` → `E_ANN_PREANNOTATION_UNDISPOSITIONED` (409, pending `pra-` ids listed); (4) **Tx:** insert `label.annotation` rows (provenance + schema/guideline version pins), apply any embedded pre-annotation review transitions (same semantics as M07-7), assignment → `submitted`; when all overlap assignments are submitted, run the consolidation hook (majority/weighted/IoU per project policy, recorded as a `consolidation` annotation with contributor refs — per §0.7.3) and aggregate task → `submitted`; QA router decides `qa_pending` (sampled, gold, low-confidence, or full-review mode) vs. `accepted` (sample-mode not selected) — gold tasks always score against the gold answer and feed AgreementMetric; outbox `label.task.submitted` — commit; (5) audit; **200** with resulting task status.
`:skip` body `{"reason": "..."}` (required): claimed → unassigned, skip recorded on the assignment history; three skips of one task flag it for QA Lead attention (WARN + queue badge).

**M07-6 `POST /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}/preannotation-jobs` · `GET /api/v1/preannotation-jobs/{job_id}`** — machine pre-labeling (DA-13).
Permission: `label.project:update`. Body:

```json
{ "generator": { "kind": "open_vocab_detector", "name": "grounding-dino", "version": "1.5.1" },
  "scope": { "task_status": ["unassigned"], "label_types": ["spatial_region_2d"] },
  "params": { "class_prompts_from_schema": true, "confidence_floor": 0.30 } }
```

Processing: (1) authz; generator `{kind,name,version}` must exist in the tenant generator registry (DA-13 — registered workflow job types only) → `E_VALIDATION`; (2) create `label.preannotation_job` (`paj-`) + submit M16 workflow run (template family `annotation`, job `preannotation`, executor **SVC-03 Pre-annotation Runner**) — **202** `{job_id, workflow_run_ref}`; (3) SVC-03 writes predictions in Label-Studio-style prediction JSON with per-item score (per §0.7.3); results re-enter exclusively via **M16-9 output registration** (M07 defines no bespoke internal endpoint, consistent with §1.5): the M07 registration consumer validates `workflow_run_ref` ↔ job binding, then inserts `label.pre_annotation` rows each carrying `{generator_identity, generator_version, generated_at, confidence, review_status:'pending'}` (FR-A6.3); (4) **auto-accept path (BR-06):** only when the project policy is `auto_accept_low_risk` *and* `confidence ≥ policy.confidence_floor`, rows are written `review_status='accepted'` with `reviewed_by='policy:{anp_id}/{policy_version}'` and a corresponding Annotation row `source.kind='pre_annotation_policy'` — provenance remains machine-distinguishable (FR-A6.2/A6.3); all other rows stay `pending`; (5) job GET returns progress, per-generator stats, failure summary. Partial generator failures mark the job `completed_with_errors` (WARN), never silently drop tasks.

**M07-7 `GET /api/v1/annotation-tasks/{task_id}/preannotations` · `POST /api/v1/preannotations/{pre_id}:review`** — view / disposition (FR-A6.4).
Permission: `label.preannotation:review` + active claim on the parent task (QA scope may review without claim during adjudication).
GET returns pre-annotations with full FR-A6.3 provenance, ordered by confidence. `:review` body: `{"action": "accept" | "edit" | "reject" | "comment", "edited_payload": {...}?, "comment": "..."?}`. Processing: (1) authz + claim check; (2) state gate — transitions allowed only from `pending` (`E_STATE_INVALID`); `comment` is always allowed and appends to `review_history` without transition; (3) per action, in one **Tx**: `accept` → `review_status='accepted'`, insert Annotation copying payload with `source={kind:'pre_annotation', pre_id, disposition:'accepted'}`; `edit` → requires `edited_payload` (schema-validated) → `review_status='edited'`, insert Annotation with edited payload + `disposition:'edited'` and the original payload hash retained; `reject` → `review_status='rejected'` + reason; all write `reviewed_by/reviewed_at` and outbox `label.preannotation.reviewed` — commit; (4) audit (batched). Disposition statistics feed RPT-04 and generator quality tracking.

**M07-8 `POST /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}/qa-samples` · `GET` (same)** — QA sample sets (FR-A6.6).
Permission: `label.qa:manage`. Body: `{"name": "...", "strategy": "random|stratified|low_confidence|targeted", "sampling_rate": 0.1, "stratify_by": "annotator|label_type"?, "overlap_n": 2?, "scope": {"submitted_after": "...", "annotator_ids": []?, "label_types": []?}, "reviewer_ids": []?}`.
Processing: (1) authz; project in `active|review`; (2) select population (tasks `submitted|accepted` in scope), draw sample per strategy/rate; `low_confidence` orders by ascending consolidation agreement / pre-annotation confidence (per §0.7.3); (3) **Tx:** insert `label.qa_sample` (`qas-`) + one `label.qa_review` (`qar-`) per sampled task × reviewer; reviewer assignment skips the task's own annotator (`E_ANN_SELF_REVIEW_FORBIDDEN` if explicit reviewer list collides); sampled tasks transition `submitted→qa_pending` (already-`accepted` tasks re-enter `qa_pending` with a re-review marker); `overlap_n` here spawns additional blind re-annotation assignments for consensus measurement; outbox — commit; (4) populations > 5,000 run as 202 workflow; (5) **201** `{qas_id, review_count}`; review queue ordering = ascending agreement (per §0.7.3). GET lists sample sets with progress and pass-rate so far. Gold libraries (`gld-`) are project-curated collections assembled from previously accepted tasks through this QA flow (stored in `label.gold_library`; referenced by M07-1/M07-8 policies — no standalone public endpoint in v1).

**M07-9 `POST /api/v1/qa-reviews/{review_id}:adjudicate`** — adjudication decision (FR-A6.6).
Permission: `label.qa:adjudicate`. Body: `{"decision": "accept" | "reject" | "fix", "corrected_payload": {...}?, "reason": "...", "failure_category": "taxonomy-node"?, "raise_failure_record": false}`.
Processing: (1) authz; review must be `pending` (`E_STATE_INVALID`); adjudicator ≠ task annotator (`E_ANN_SELF_REVIEW_FORBIDDEN`); (2) `reject` requires `reason` + `failure_category`; `fix` requires schema-valid `corrected_payload`; (3) **Tx:** insert `label.adjudication_decision` (`adj-`, terminal per §0.7.3 — one adjudication per review chain; later attempts → `E_CONFLICT`); apply task transition: `accept` → `qa_pending→accepted`; `reject` → `qa_pending→rejected` then **rework** edge `rejected→claimed` re-binding the original annotator with `rework_count+1` (annotator notified via M20); `fix` → adjudicator's corrected payload becomes the canonical Annotation (`source.kind='adjudication'`, prior rows retained in history — FR-A6.7) and task → `accepted`; escalated tasks resolve `escalated→accepted|rejected` by the same verb; outbox `label.qa.adjudicated` (+ `label.qa.failure_raised` when `raise_failure_record=true`, consumed by M15-1 — BP-05 source) — commit; (4) audit `label.qa.adjudicated` with decision; (5) **200** with task + review state. Agreement recomputation for affected batches is queued (§2.7.4 job 3).

**M07-10 `GET /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}/agreement-metrics`** — IAA metrics (FR-A6.6).
Permission: `label.project:read`. Params: `label_type?, group_by=batch|annotator_pair|label_class|week, window?`.
Response (compact): `{"primary_metric": "krippendorff_alpha", "rows": [ {"group": "batch-2026-23/spatial_region_2d", "alpha": 0.83, "alpha_ci": [0.79, 0.86], "kappa_pairs": [{"a": "usr-1", "b": "usr-2", "kappa": 0.78}], "gold_accuracy": 0.94, "consolidation_conflict_rate": 0.06, "n_items": 412, "threshold_evaluation": "pass|caution|blocked"} ], "thresholds": {"min_alpha": 0.8, "caution_alpha": 0.667}, "computed_at": "..."}`.
Processing: serve from `label.agreement_metric` rows written by the agreement computation job (§2.7.4) — alpha per label type per batch (nominal for classes/outcomes, interval for temporal bounds, IoU-coincidence for regions), pairwise Cohen's kappa reported for performance management, gold accuracy per annotator (per §0.7.3); `threshold_evaluation` derives from project acceptance_criteria (FR-A6.6 configurable); `computed_at` is the staleness marker; on-demand recompute available to `label.qa:manage` via `?recompute=true` (202 if cold).

**M07-11 `POST /api/v1/annotation-projects/{anp_id}/annotation-sets` · `GET /api/v1/annotation-sets/{ans_id}` · `POST ...:approve` · `POST ...:reject`** — versioned set assembly / approval (FR-A6.7).
Permission: `label.set:create` (POST) / `label.project:read` (GET) / `label.set:approve` (both verbs).
POST body: `{"set_id": "ans-..."?, "name": "...", "scope": {"task_filter": {...}} | {"task_ids": []}, "label_types": []?, "version_note": "..."}` — omitted `set_id` creates a new set family (`ans-` v1); provided `set_id` assembles the **next integer version** of that family (prior versions immutable, Table 0.3).
Processing: (1) authz; project in `review|active`; (2) resolve scope to accepted tasks; any non-accepted task, unresolved adjudication, or open escalation in scope → `E_ANN_SET_INCOMPLETE` (409, offenders listed); (3) compute the quality summary (α per label type, QA pass rate, gold accuracy, rework/rejection rates) and pin guideline/schema/taxonomy versions; (4) freeze the member manifest — JSONL of `{annotation_id, task_id, episode_ref, label_type, payload_hash, provenance}` written to object storage, **content-addressed** (sha256 root recorded; zero-copy alignment with M08 manifests per §0.7.3); (5) **Tx:** insert `label.annotation_set` + version row in `draft`, then transition `draft→submitted` in the same tx when assembly validation passes (assembly > 50k annotations runs async: row stays `draft`, 202 + workflow_run_ref, transition on job success); outbox `label.set.submitted` — commit; (6) audit; **201** `{ans_id, version, status, quality_summary}`.
`:approve` body `{"note": "...", "waiver": {"reason": "...", "criteria": ["min_alpha"]}?}`: (1) authz `label.set:approve`; status must be `submitted`; (2) acceptance-criteria gate — quality summary vs. project thresholds; failures → `E_ANN_AGREEMENT_BELOW_THRESHOLD` unless an explicit `waiver` is supplied **and** the caller passes an M03-10 check at tenant scope; waivers are stored verbatim on the version (FR-A6.6); (3) **Tx:** version → `approved` (frozen), approver + reviewer history snapshot retained (FR-A6.7), outbox `label.set.approved` (consumed by M08 catalog projector → annotation-set eligibility for snapshot membership, edge M07→M08) — commit; (4) audit `label.set.approved`. `:reject` body `{"reason": "...", "requeue_rejected_tasks": true}`: version → `rejected` (terminal); optional requeue applies adjudication-driven rework transitions; corrections lead to a new version via re-POST. Approve/reject are idempotent on replay of the same Idempotency-Key; GET returns set + versions + manifest ref + quality summary + approval/reviewer history.

**M07-12 `POST /api/v1/annotation-tasks/{task_id}:escalate`** — expert routing (FR-A6.8).
Permission: `label.task:escalate` (granted alongside `label.task:submit` and `label.qa:manage`). Body: `{"reason": "...", "suggested_expert_id": "usr-..."?, "context_refs": ["pra-...", "comment-..."]}`.
Processing: (1) authz; allowed from `claimed|submitted|qa_pending` per the exact machine (`E_STATE_INVALID` otherwise); (2) expert pool non-empty → else `E_ANN_ESCALATION_TARGET_MISSING` (422); (3) **Tx:** task → `escalated`, escalation record (reason, context, requester), route to expert queue (suggested expert honored when in pool), outbox — commit; (4) M20 notifies the expert pool; resolution exclusively via M07-9 adjudication; (5) audit `label.task.escalated`.

**M07-13 `GET /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/reports/annotation-operations`** — RPT-04 / FR-A6.9.
Permission: `label.project:read`. Params: `anp_id?, window=7d|30d|quarter, group_by=project|annotator|label_type|week, format=json|csv`.
Response rows: `{group, throughput: {tasks_completed, labels_per_hour}, rework_rate, rejection_rate, qa_pass_rate, unresolved_review_queue: {depth, oldest_age_h}, preannotation_mix: {accepted, edited, rejected}, alpha_trend: [...], gold_accuracy}` + `generated_at`. Served from the RPT-04 rollup MV (§2.7.4); per-annotator grouping requires `label.qa:manage` (individual performance data minimization).

Metric definitions (normative for the MV and P6 rendering):

| Metric | Definition |
|---|---|
| throughput | tasks reaching `accepted` per window; labels/hour = canonical annotations ÷ Σ `time_spent_s` |
| rework_rate | tasks with `rework_count ≥ 1` ÷ tasks submitted in window |
| rejection_rate | adjudications `reject` ÷ adjudications total in window |
| qa_pass_rate | adjudications `accept` + `fix` ÷ adjudications total (fix counts as pass-with-correction, reported separately) |
| unresolved_review_queue | `qa_pending` + `escalated` tasks at report time; oldest_age_h from entry into the state |
| preannotation_mix | terminal pre-annotation dispositions accepted/edited/rejected as fractions (FR-A6.4 evidence) |
| gold_accuracy | per-annotator match rate vs. hidden gold answers (per §0.7.3) |
| alpha_trend | weekly `krippendorff_alpha` per label_type from `label.agreement_metric` |

**Cross-module consumption map (M07 as provider/consumer):** M08 — consumes `label.set.approved` outbox events to mark `ans-@version` snapshot-eligible and project annotation-status facets into the catalog (edge M07→M08, §0.5.2); M15 — consumes `label.qa.failure_raised` to open QA-sourced failure records (BP-05) and may send annotation-correction work items back via M16 work requests (M15-4); M18 — consumes task/annotation events for label-distribution analytics, and M18-8 `:materialize` invokes M07-3 in user context (cohort → tasks, FR-A7.4); M19 — hosts the embedded labeling workspace (M19-1 session) and routes review decisions via M19-5 to M07-9 semantics; M16/SVC-03 — execute task-generation and pre-annotation workflows, returning results exclusively through M16-9 output registration; M20 — receives escalation, rework, threshold-breach, and approval notifications.

**Concurrency & idempotency summary:** claims are single-statement atomic updates (no locks held across requests); `:submit`/`:adjudicate`/`:approve` are serialized per task/review/set via row locks inside their transactions; all POST verbs honor `Idempotency-Key` (24 h, §1.4.4); PATCH/PUT require `If-Match`; consolidation runs exactly once per task (guarded by a consolidation-state column); set versions and approved sets are never updated — new versions only.

#### 2.7.4 Data Design

PostgreSQL, schema **`label.*`** (M07 single writer). Annotation payloads are JSONB with hard size bounds; oversize payloads spill to object storage (below).

| Table | Key columns (abridged) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `label.annotation_project` | `anp_id pk (anp-ulid)`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `name`, `status` (project machine), `risk_class`, `source jsonb (coh-/episode refs)`, `annotator_pool/reviewer_pool/expert_pool uuid[]`, `review_policy jsonb`, `acceptance_criteria jsonb`, `preannotation_policy jsonb (+authorized_by, policy_version)`, `instructions_version int`, `etag_version`, timestamps | Unique `(project_id, name)`; idx `(project_id, status)` |
| `label.label_schema` | `(anp_id, schema_version) pk`, `label_types text[]`, `classes jsonb (taxonomy pins)`, `attributes jsonb`, `created_by/at` | Append-only versions; tasks pin a version |
| `label.annotation_task` | `task_id pk (ant-ulid)`, `anp_id fk`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `unit` (`episode\|segment\|clip`), `asset_ref (epi-/segment)`, `status` (task machine), `priority`, `is_gold bool`, `gold_ref?`, `schema_version`, `guideline_version`, `overlap_n`, `rework_count int`, `skip_count int`, `consolidation_state`, `escalation jsonb?`, timestamps | **Partitioned by hash(anp_id)** (16 parts); idx `(anp_id, status, priority)`, `(asset_ref)`; `is_gold` never serialized to annotator scope |
| `label.annotation_assignment` | `assignment_id pk`, `task_id fk`, `annotator_id?`, `status` (`unassigned\|claimed\|submitted\|released`), `claimed_at/submitted_at`, `time_spent_s`, `skip_history jsonb` | Overlap = N rows per task; atomic-claim target; idx `(annotator_id, status)` |
| `label.pre_annotation` | `pre_id pk (pra-ulid)`, `task_id fk`, `paj_id fk`, `label_type`, `payload jsonb` / `payload_ref`, `payload_hash`, `confidence numeric?`, `generator_identity`, `generator_version`, `generated_at`, `review_status` (`pending\|accepted\|edited\|rejected`), `reviewed_by` (user or `policy:{...}`), `reviewed_at`, `review_history jsonb (comments)` | FR-A6.3 complete provenance; **partitioned monthly** (`generated_at`); idx `(task_id, review_status)` |
| `label.preannotation_job` | `paj_id pk (paj-ulid)`, `anp_id`, `generator jsonb`, `scope jsonb`, `params jsonb`, `workflow_run_ref`, `status`, `stats jsonb`, timestamps | DA-13 registry-validated |
| `label.annotation` | `annotation_id pk`, `task_id fk`, `assignment_id fk?`, `annotator_id?`, `label_type`, `payload jsonb` / `payload_ref`, `payload_hash`, `source jsonb` (`manual\|pre_annotation{pra,disposition}\|pre_annotation_policy\|consolidation\|adjudication`), `schema_version`, `is_canonical bool`, `superseded_by?`, `created_at` | **Partitioned by hash(anp_id)**; history rows never deleted (FR-A6.7); idx `(task_id, is_canonical)` |
| `label.qa_sample` | `qas_id pk (qas-ulid)`, `anp_id`, `name`, `strategy`, `sampling_rate`, `stratify_by?`, `overlap_n?`, `scope jsonb`, `status`, `stats jsonb`, `created_by/at` | |
| `label.qa_review` | `qar_id pk (qar-ulid)`, `qas_id fk`, `task_id fk`, `reviewer_id`, `status` (`pending\|adjudicated`), `agreement_hint numeric` (queue ordering), `created_at` | Idx `(reviewer_id, status)`, `(qas_id, status)` |
| `label.adjudication_decision` | `adj_id pk (adj-ulid)`, `qar_id fk unique`, `task_id`, `adjudicator_id`, `decision` (`accept\|reject\|fix`), `reason`, `failure_category?`, `corrected_annotation_id?`, `decided_at` | Terminal; unique per review chain (per §0.7.3) |
| `label.agreement_metric` | `agm_id pk`, `anp_id`, `scope jsonb` (`batch/label_type/pair/class/window`), `metric` (`krippendorff_alpha\|cohen_kappa\|gold_accuracy\|conflict_rate`), `value numeric`, `ci jsonb?`, `n_items`, `threshold_evaluation`, `computed_at` | Job-written; idx `(anp_id, metric, computed_at)` |
| `label.annotation_set` / `label.annotation_set_version` | `ans_id pk (ans-ulid)`, `anp_id`, `name` / `(ans_id, version) pk`, `status` (set machine), `scope jsonb`, `member_count`, `manifest_uri`, `manifest_hash`, `quality_summary jsonb`, `pins jsonb` (schema/guideline/taxonomy), `waiver jsonb?`, `submitted_by/at`, `decided_by/at`, `reviewer_history jsonb` | Versions immutable once `approved`; manifest content-addressed |
| `label.outbox` | per §1.4.4 | M07 partition of the platform outbox relay |
| `label.ops_report_mv` | rollup keyed `(project_id, anp_id, group, week)` | Backs M07-13 / P6 |

**Payload bounds & spillover:** inline JSONB payload ≤ **256 KB** per annotation/pre-annotation; dense payloads (per-frame masks, long-horizon 3D box tracks) are uploaded to the project's curated object-storage prefix and referenced by `payload_ref` + `payload_hash` (sha256) with a mandatory `summary` JSONB (counts, classes, bbox of activity) kept inline for search/QA. Logs and API list responses always carry summaries, never payload bodies (§1.4.7).

**ER relationships:** `annotation_project 1—n label_schema`, `1—n annotation_task 1—n annotation_assignment`, `task 1—n pre_annotation` (job n—m tasks via scope), `task 1—n annotation` (one `is_canonical=true` per label item; supersession chain for fix/edit history — FR-A6.7), `qa_sample 1—n qa_review 1—0..1 adjudication_decision`, `annotation_set 1—n version n—m annotation` (via frozen manifest), polymorphic refs outward: `asset_ref → epi-` (M06), `coh-` (M18), `tax-` pins (M06-9), `fal-` emission (M15).

**Volumetrics & partitioning:** tasks 10⁵–10⁷/tenant-year, annotations and pre-annotations up to 10⁸ — hash partitioning by `anp_id` for task/annotation (project-local scans), monthly range partitions for `pre_annotation`; agreement metrics and QA tables stay unpartitioned (10⁵). Hot indexes listed per table.

**Retention (DA-11):** annotations referenced by an `approved` set version or any published M08 snapshot are retention-locked `active` (lineage anchors, BR-02); rejected pre-annotations purgeable after 12 months → `purged-metadata-retained` (provenance row kept, payload dropped); task/assignment event history archived after 24 months; agreement metrics retained 36 months (quality trend evidence); set version manifests follow snapshot retention (never purged while referenced). SVC-15 executes transitions; audit rows per BR-14 are M03-owned.

**Processing logic (module jobs):** (1) **batch task generation** (M07-3 > 2k units) — chunked, idempotent per chunk, gold injection interleaved; (2) **consolidation hook** — fires when the last overlap assignment submits; pluggable strategy per project (majority / Dawid-Skene-style annotator weighting / IoU clustering — per §0.7.3); (3) **agreement computation job** — incremental on batch completion + nightly full pass; computes α (data-type-appropriate distance: nominal / interval / IoU-coincidence), pairwise kappa, gold accuracy; writes `agreement_metric` + `threshold_evaluation`; `blocked` batches trigger automatic requeue proposal + M20 alert to the QA Lead (per §0.7.3); (4) **claim-TTL sweep** — releases expired claims; (5) **RPT-04 rollup** — 15-min incremental MV refresh; (6) **generator quality tracker** — pre-annotation disposition rates per generator@version feeding DA-13 registry health.

#### 2.7.5 Permission Design

Keys (atomic catalog in M03 §2.3.5; actions per §1.4.8). Persona-template names in §0.2.4 (`annotation.task:read/submit`, `preannotation:review`, `annotation.project:*`, `qa:*`) resolve to the authoritative `label.*` keys below. Defaults: **PA** implicit `*:*`; **TA** implicit within tenant; **OE** — none (business domain, §0.5.3); **RD** — via project membership + persona templates.

| Permission key | PA | TA | OE | RD (default) | Persona templates granting it |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label.project:read` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ (member projects) | Annotator, Annotation QA Lead, Robotics Data Engineer, Program Manager |
| `label.project:create` / `label.project:update` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotation QA Lead |
| `label.project:admin` (BR-06 auto-accept authorization; tenant scope) | ✓ | ✓ | — | — | — (TA-reserved) |
| `label.task:read` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ (role-shaped projection) | Annotator (own/claimable), Annotation QA Lead (all) |
| `label.task:submit` (claim/submit/skip) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotator |
| `label.task:escalate` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotator, Annotation QA Lead |
| `label.preannotation:review` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotator |
| `label.preannotation:ingest` (service) | — | — | — | — | Service identities only: SVC-03 / M16 output-registration (mTLS, §1.4.2) |
| `label.qa:manage` (samples, recompute) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotation QA Lead |
| `label.qa:adjudicate` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotation QA Lead, expert pool members |
| `label.set:create` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Annotation QA Lead |
| `label.set:approve` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ (grant-listed) | Annotation QA Lead (approval may be policy-raised to TA for `safety_critical` projects) |

**Granularity:** all keys evaluate at **project scope** (annotation projects belong to exactly one project, §0.2.3); the BR-06 auto-accept authorization and acceptance-criteria waivers re-check at **tenant scope** (deliberate scope raise). **Separation of duties (enforced in logic, not only grants):** annotator ≠ reviewer ≠ adjudicator on the same task (`E_ANN_SELF_REVIEW_FORBIDDEN`); set approver may not be the sole annotator of > 50% of member tasks (warning + audit note). Asset-level deny-wins: tasks over restricted episodes require episode read access at claim time (`E_RESTRICTED_DATA`).

**Credential scoping:** `:claim` issues a **task-scoped token** (JWT-style, TTL = claim TTL, audience M07+M19 media proxy) embedding `{task_id, assignment_id, verbs: [task:submit, preannotation:review]}` — the embedded workspace uses it for label writes and synchronized-stream access (M19-2 manifest URLs are minted against it); it cannot list queues, touch other tasks, or survive claim release. SVC-03 holds `label.preannotation:ingest` only (cannot read human annotations beyond its job scope); gold answers are excluded from every non-`label.qa:*` projection at the serializer layer.

#### 2.7.6 Logging Design

| Level | M07 triggers |
|---|---|
| DEBUG | schema validation detail, consolidation candidate scoring, agreement-job timings (off in prod) |
| INFO | project transitions; task generated/claimed/submitted/accepted; pre-annotation job lifecycle; QA sample created; adjudications; set submitted/approved; report served |
| WARN | claim conflicts (rate-aggregated), claim-TTL releases, 3× skipped task, α in caution band, generator `completed_with_errors`, disposition-blocked submits |
| ERROR | task generation chunk failure, SVC-03 result registration rejection (job mismatch), agreement job failure, outbox relay failure |
| FATAL | label schema registry / taxonomy resolution unavailable at startup |

Structured JSON per §1.4.6 with module fields: `anp_id`, `task_id`, `assignment_id`, `pre_id`, `paj_id`, `qas_id`, `qar_id`, `ans_id`, `set_version`, `label_type`, `decision`, `generator_identity`, `generator_version`, `alpha_band`. **Masking (§1.4.7):** caption/instruction/comment free text is **logged by reference id only** (`{annotation_id, byte_size, payload_hash}`); label payloads never appear in logs; annotator emails masked `s***@domain`; task tokens never logged. **Shipping:** stdout JSON → platform log pipeline, 30-day hot / 13-month cold; `traceparent` propagated M07 → M03/M06/M16/M18 and into SVC-03 workflow tasks.

**Audit events (M03-11):** `label.project.created`, `label.project.transitioned`, `label.project.policy_changed` (incl. BR-06 auto-accept authorization with authorizer id), `label.tasks.generated` (counts, gold count), `label.task.submitted`, `label.task.escalated`, `label.preannotation.job_started`, `label.preannotation.reviewed` (action; batched), `label.qa.sample_created`, `label.qa.adjudicated` (decision + failure_category), `label.qa.failure_raised` (→ M15 ref), `label.set.submitted`, `label.set.approved` (quality summary + waiver if any), `label.set.rejected` (reason). All carry actor, scope `{tenant, project}`, before/after summaries — supporting FR-A6.7, BR-14, AC-03, AC-14.

---

### 2.8 M08 — Data Catalog & Dataset Snapshot Governance

#### 2.8.1 Module Overview

M08 is the **system of record and governance gate** for all data assets (BP-01 steps 9–10): a unified, governed catalog over every asset type, the immutable **Dataset Snapshot** lifecycle, dataset cards, governance flags, and the platform-wide **usage-check gate** that stops restricted or unapproved data from entering violating workflows (BR-05). The design follows the lakeFS/DVC immutable-commit pattern — snapshots are zero-copy, content-addressed manifests over the curated object-store zone — combined with a DataHub-style entity/aspect read-model and Hugging-Face-style gated dataset cards (per §0.7.3). Per DA-15/§1.6.2, M08 answers *what exists and who may use it*; **M18 answers how to find/understand it** — any query with a vector/similarity component is delegated to M18-1 and results are re-checked against M08 governance flags before return.

**Owns:** Catalog Asset Index (denormalized read-model over all governed asset types — FR-A7.1), scalar search/browse (FR-A7.2/A7.3), governance flags (deprecated/superseded/restricted + computed overused/underused — FR-A7.5), Dataset Snapshots (draft/publish/deprecate — FR-A8.1–A8.3, BR-04), Snapshot Member manifests (content-addressed), Usage Policies and the usage-check gate (FR-A8.4/A8.5, BR-05), Dataset Cards (FR-A8.6), replacement links (FR-A8.7), dataset audit surface (FR-A8.8), dataset inventory report (RPT-02).
**Excludes:** vector/hybrid retrieval, embeddings, distributions, cohorts (M18 — DA-15); source-asset truth (M05 recordings, M06 episodes, M07 annotation sets, M10 synthetic batches — M08 projects them read-only and never mutates source rows); cohort materialization (M18-8); training/evaluation selection UIs (M11/M13 — they call M08-9); retention execution (SVC-15); coverage analytics (M18-9/RPT-03).

**Roles & personas:** **Robotics Data Engineer** (assembles and publishes snapshots, maintains cards — persona template `snapshot:publish`); **Governance Approver** (governance flags, restricted-publication approvals via M16-6, deprecations, audit review); all engineering personas + Program Manager as catalog readers; service identities (M11, M13, M16, M10) as usage-check callers.

**Upstream:** M05/M06/M07/M10/M13 asset events (catalog projection + lineage edges), M10-8 composition policies (enforced at assembly/publish), M18-1 (delegated hybrid queries), M16 (`dataset_publishing` workflow for large snapshots), M01/M02/M03. **Downstream:** M11/M13 (snapshot selection for training/evaluation — restriction-gated per §0.5.2), M16 scheduler (usage checks at admission, BP-06 step 2), M10 (generation source datasets), M18 (snapshot composition for coverage/distribution; SVC-04 consumes M08 change events to maintain indexes via M18-11), M19 (asset envelopes for review sessions), M03-9 (access reviews over restricted datasets, RPT-11), M20 (deprecation/consumer notifications).

**FRD coverage:** FR-A7.1–A7.6 (A7.4 cohorts and A7.6 coverage delegated to M18 per §1.7.1; M08 supplies the governed facets and membership data), FR-A8.1–A8.8, BR-02 (lineage preservation in catalog graph), BR-03 (composition truth-in-labeling), BR-04 (snapshot immutability), BR-05 (usage gate M08-9), RPT-02 (M08-10), DA-15, AC-04/AC-05.

#### 2.8.2 Functional & UI/UX Design

**Primary functions**

| # | Function | Description | FRD |
|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | Unified asset catalog | Read-model over the closed `asset_type` set: `raw_recording (rec-) \| episode (epi-) \| annotation_set (ans-) \| dataset_snapshot (dss-) \| synthetic_batch (syn-) \| evaluation_dataset` (snapshots with `purpose=evaluation` + M13-10 regression sets `rgs-`) | FR-A7.1 |
| F2 | Scalar search & facets | Exact-filter search by campaign, task, robot, environment, object, modality, annotation status, quality status, ownership, dataset membership (FR-A7.2) + scenario tags, failure categories, action labels, evaluation outcomes (FR-A7.3); tsvector free text | FR-A7.2/A7.3 |
| F3 | Hybrid delegation | `semantic` clauses delegated server-side to M18-1; returned ids re-checked against governance flags + scope before serving (deny-wins) | DA-15, §1.6.2 |
| F4 | Governance flags | Manual `deprecated / superseded_by / restricted` + computed `overused / underused` (nightly usage analysis) | FR-A7.5 |
| F5 | Snapshot assembly | Draft snapshots from explicit members, cohort refs, or saved searches; member types `episode \| annotation_set \| synthetic_batch` | FR-A8.1/A8.2 |
| F6 | Immutable publish | Publish freezes membership as a content-addressed manifest; snapshot rows never updated after publish — supersede only (zero-copy commit per §0.7.3) | FR-A8.1, BR-04 |
| F7 | Composition truth | `real / synthetic / augmented / mixed` counts + fractions computed from member provenance at publish; M10-8 composition-policy enforcement | FR-A8.3, BR-03 |
| F8 | Usage restrictions | Usage restrictions, privacy tags, license tags, retention status normalized into evaluable Usage Policies | FR-A8.4 |
| F9 | Usage-check gate | `M08-9` internal gate called by M11-3, M13-2, M16 scheduler, M10-4: per-asset `allow / deny / needs_approval` with policy reasons; denials audited | FR-A8.5, BR-05 |
| F10 | Dataset cards | Datasheet-style cards (machine-readable YAML + rendered markdown), partly auto-generated from catalog metadata; frozen vs. living sections (per §0.7.3) | FR-A8.6 |
| F11 | Deprecation & replacement | Deprecate published snapshots with reason + replacement links; lineage preserved | FR-A8.7 |
| F12 | Audit surface | Full creation/approval/modification/deprecation/access history per snapshot; restricted-asset access audited | FR-A8.8, RPT-11 feed |
| F13 | Inventory report | Snapshot inventory with owner, purpose, composition, restrictions, approval status, where-used | RPT-02 |

**UI pages**

**P1 — Catalog Explorer** (project-scoped; binding `M08-1`). Left rail: asset-type tabs (F1 set) + facet groups with live counts — campaign, task, robot/embodiment, environment, object class, modality, annotation status, quality status, owner, dataset membership, scenario tags, failure categories, action labels, evaluation outcome. Top: free-text search box with a **mode toggle** `Exact (catalog)` / `Semantic (Analytics)` — semantic mode shows the "results ranked by M18, governance re-checked" hint (DA-15). Result cards: asset id + type chip, name, governance badges (RESTRICTED amber-lock, DEPRECATED grey-strike, SUPERSEDED with arrow link, SYNTHETIC permanent badge for `syn-` and synthetic-composition snapshots — BR-03), quality/annotation status chips, owner, membership count. Restricted assets the caller cannot read render as **redacted stubs** (id + "restricted — request access" CTA), never silently dropped when the caller may know of their existence (policy `visibility=listed`); `visibility=hidden` assets are omitted. Bulk actions: add to snapshot draft, send to M18 cohort. Empty state: "No assets match — clear filters or check governance filters"; loading: facet skeletons; search latency > 2 s shows the staleness marker from the read-model.

**P2 — Asset Detail** (binding `M08-2`). Governance envelope header (type, owner, project, created, flags, quality/annotation status), tabs: **Overview** (scalar attributes per type), **Memberships** (snapshots containing it), **Lineage** (mini-graph, expandable to P4 full graph), **Audit** (M03-8 filtered view, `data.*` events for this asset). "Open in owning module" deep link (M05/M06/M07/M10/M13 detail). Restricted assets show the restriction reason + policy ref and audit notice "this access is recorded" (FR-A8.8).

**P3 — Snapshot Composer Wizard** (4 steps; bindings `M08-4`, then `M08-6`). Step 1 Identity → Step 2 Members → Step 3 Policies → Step 4 Card & Review.

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| name | text | kebab-case 3–80 | — | "kitchen-manip-v-train" | required; unique per project (`E_CONFLICT`) |
| semver | text | `MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH` | next patch of family | "1.2.0" | semver syntax; unique per `(project, name)` |
| purpose | select | `training \| evaluation \| mixed \| exploration` | training | — | required (FR-A8.2) |
| description | textarea | markdown ≤ 8 KB | — | — | required |
| owner_id | user picker | project member | caller | — | required (FR-A8.2) |
| members | picker (3 sources) | catalog multi-select \| cohort_ref `coh-` \| saved search | — | "Add episodes / annotation sets / synthetic batches" | ≥ 1 member; per-member eligibility preview chips (green/amber/red with reason) |
| previous_snapshot_id | snapshot picker | `dss-` | latest published of family | — | must be published, same family |
| usage_restrictions[] | multi-select + custom | e.g. `no_training \| no_release_evaluation \| internal_only \| consent_research_only \| no_export` | — | — | from tenant restriction vocabulary (FR-A8.4) |
| privacy_tags[] / license_tags[] | tag pickers | tenant vocabularies | inherited from members (union, deny-wins) | — | inherited tags removable only with `data.governance_flag:update` + reason |
| retention_class | select | DA-11 classes | standard | — | required |
| card sections | structured editor | see P5 | auto-draft from metadata | — | mandatory sections non-empty before publish (`E_CAT_CARD_REQUIRED`) |

Step 4 shows the **publish preflight**: member eligibility re-check results, computed composition preview (real/synthetic/augmented/mixed donut — FR-A8.3), composition-policy verdicts (M10-8: pass/warn/block), restriction rollup, card completeness. Publish button → confirm dialog restating immutability (BR-04: "Membership and content become permanently frozen; further changes require a new version") → `M08-6`. Large snapshots show the 202 progress chip (`workflow_run_ref`).

**P4 — Snapshot Detail with Lineage Graph** (bindings `M08-5`, `M08-7`). Header: `dss-` id, name@semver, status chip (draft/published/deprecated), permanent composition badges (REAL n% / SYNTHETIC n% / AUGMENTED n% — BR-03), owner, published_at/by, restriction badges, retention class. Tabs: **Members** (paginated from manifest; per-member type, version, content hash, source link), **Lineage** (interactive graph: snapshot → members → episodes → raw recordings; annotation sets → episodes; synthetic batches → scenarios/generation requests — BR-02; depth selector; node click → P2), **Where-used** (training plans/runs, evaluation runs, generation requests, cohorts + usage-check decision stats), **Card** (rendered, → P5 edit), **Audit** (creation/publish/card edits/flag changes/access — FR-A8.8). Actions: `Deprecate` (dialog: reason enum + text, replacement snapshot picker validating `E_CAT_DEPRECATED_REPLACEMENT_INVALID` inline) → `M08-7`; `New version` (clones membership into a fresh draft via M08-4 with `previous_snapshot_id` set). Deprecated snapshots render a red banner with the replacement link (FR-A8.7).

**P5 — Dataset Card Editor** (binding `M08-8`). Two-pane: structured sections left, rendered card right (markdown + YAML front-matter preview, datasheet layout per §0.7.3). Sections: intended_use*, collection_method* (auto-drafted from campaign metadata), composition (frozen, generated), known_gaps*, quality_limitations*, approval_status (generated), maintenance/contact, known_issues/errata (living). `*` = mandatory before publish. Post-publish, frozen/generated sections render locked with tooltip "immutable after publish (BR-04)" — attempts return `E_CAT_SNAPSHOT_IMMUTABLE`; living sections remain editable with audit notice. Card version history side panel.

**P6 — Dataset Inventory Report (RPT-02)** (binding `M08-10`). Filterable table: snapshot, family/version, owner, purpose, composition fractions, restrictions, status (incl. approval state of restricted publications), where-used counts, deprecation/replacement. Governance lens toggle highlights flag anomalies (overused/underused/superseded — FR-A7.5). Export CSV.

**Output rendering & exception handling (UI-wide):** success toasts carry `dss-` id + deep link; publish success shows the manifest hash ("commit id") for citation in training plans. Errors: network → retry banner, drafts auto-saved locally; 403 `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` → read-only + tooltip; **403 `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` → dedicated restricted-data dialog** (policy reason, owning policy ref, "request access" path via M16-6 approval) — never a generic error; 429 `E_RATE_LIMITED` → countdown honoring `Retry-After`; 422 `E_VALIDATION` → field-anchored; 409 publish conflicts (`E_CAT_MEMBER_NOT_ELIGIBLE`, `E_CAT_COMPOSITION_POLICY_VIOLATION`) → preflight panel re-opens scrolled to the offending members; M18 unavailability in semantic mode → degraded-mode banner "semantic search unavailable — exact search still active" (`E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE`).

#### 2.8.3 Interface Design

All endpoints follow §1.4. Module error namespace `E_CAT_*`. Authz via M03-10, audit via M03-11. M08-9 is internal (`/internal/v1`, mTLS service identity).

**Normative state machine (M08, exact)**

```text
DatasetSnapshot.status:
  draft ──:publish──▶ published ──:deprecate──▶ deprecated (terminal)
  · content (membership manifest, composition, semver, lineage) is IMMUTABLE from `published` onward (BR-04);
    deprecation changes governance status + replacement link only — never content
  · snapshot rows are never UPDATEd after publish except the deprecation governance columns; corrections = new version (supersede only)
  · draft ──delete──▶ (hard delete allowed; drafts are not governed assets)
```

**Module error codes (`E_CAT_*`)**

| Code | HTTP | Raised when |
|---|---|---|
| `E_CAT_MEMBER_NOT_FOUND` | 422 | Member ref unresolvable in the catalog read-model (or wrong type) |
| `E_CAT_MEMBER_NOT_ELIGIBLE` | 409 | Publish-time gate: episode not quality-accepted / `alignment_failed`; annotation set not `approved`; synthetic batch not `validated_*` or deprecated (BR-11) |
| `E_CAT_SNAPSHOT_IMMUTABLE` | 409 | Any content mutation attempt on a published snapshot (incl. frozen card sections) — BR-04 |
| `E_CAT_COMPOSITION_POLICY_VIOLATION` | 409 | Synthetic fraction exceeds an enforcing (block-mode) M10-8 policy |
| `E_CAT_CARD_REQUIRED` | 412 | Publish without mandatory card sections (FR-A8.6) |
| `E_CAT_DEPRECATED_REPLACEMENT_INVALID` | 422 | Replacement link target not published / itself deprecated / wrong family scope |
| `E_CAT_FLAG_COMPUTED_READONLY` | 422 | Manual write attempted on computed flags (`overused/underused`) |
| Shared | — | `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` (403, asset-level deny-wins), `E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` (503, M18 delegation), `E_VALIDATION`, `E_STATE_INVALID`, `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED`, `E_CONFLICT`, `E_IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` per §1.4.3 |

**M08-1 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/catalog/search`** — scalar catalog search (+ delegated hybrid).
Permission: `data.catalog:read`. POST (not GET) because filter payloads are structured and may embed a semantic clause. Body:

```json
{ "q": "drawer open", "asset_types": ["episode", "dataset_snapshot"],
  "filters": { "campaign_id": "cmp-...", "task": "open_drawer", "robot_embodiment": "h1-gen3",
    "environment": "kitchen", "object_class": "drawer", "modalities": ["rgb", "depth", "joint_state"],
    "annotation_status": "approved", "quality_status": "accepted", "owner_id": "usr-...",
    "dataset_membership": "dss-...", "scenario_tags": ["low_light"], "failure_categories": ["grasp_slip"],
    "action_labels": ["grasp"], "evaluation_outcome": "failed" },
  "semantic": { "text": "robot fumbles handle in dim light", "fusion_weight": 0.5 },
  "facets_requested": ["task", "environment", "annotation_status"], "page_size": 50, "page_token": null, "sort": "-updated_at" }
```

Processing: (1) authz `data.catalog:read` at `{project_id}`; (2) validate filter keys against the closed FR-A7.2/A7.3 facet set and `asset_types` against F1 (`E_VALIDATION`); (3) **scalar path** (no `semantic`): execute against `catalog.asset_index` (btree/GIN facets + tsvector on `q`); (4) **hybrid path**: delegate server-side to **M18-1** with user context + scalar filters; take the ranked id list; **re-check every id against M08 governance flags, project scope, and restriction visibility** (deny-wins; redact-or-drop per policy `visibility`) before serving (DA-15, §1.6.2); M18 unavailable → `E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` with `details.fallback="scalar"`; (5) facet counts computed on the governed result set; (6) response items = governance envelope summaries `{asset_ref, asset_type, name, owner_id, governance_flags, quality_status, annotation_status, composition?, dataset_memberships, updated_at, redacted?}` + `index_freshness_at` staleness marker; (7) INFO log; restricted-asset *detail* access is audited at M08-2, not per list row.

**M08-2 `GET /api/v1/assets/{asset_id}`** — generic governed-asset envelope (type-routed).
Permission: `data.catalog:read` (+ asset-level restriction check).
Processing: (1) resolve type from id prefix (`rec-/epi-/ans-/dss-/syn-/rgs-`) → `E_NOT_FOUND` for unknown; (2) authz at the asset's project scope (derived per §1.4.1); (3) restriction gate: `restricted` flag/policy → caller needs grant else `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` (403) with policy ref; granted reads of restricted assets emit audit `data.asset.accessed` (FR-A8.8; feeds M03-9 access reviews / RPT-11); (4) serve the envelope from the read-model; (5) `?include=lineage_graph&depth=n` expands via `catalog.lineage_edge` (BR-02; OpenLineage-style projection per §0.7.3). Response (compact):

```json
{ "asset_ref": "ans-...", "asset_type": "annotation_set", "tenant_id": "tnt-...", "project_id": "prj-...",
  "name": "kitchen-manip-labels", "version": 3, "owner_id": "usr-...",
  "governance_flags": { "manual": { "restricted": null, "deprecated": null, "superseded_by": null },
                        "computed": { "overused": false, "underused": false } },
  "quality_status": null, "annotation_status": "approved", "validation_status": null,
  "attributes": { "label_types": ["spatial_region_2d", "action_label"], "source_anp_id": "anp-...", "alpha": 0.83 },
  "dataset_memberships": ["dss-..."], "lineage_refs": [ {"relation": "annotates", "ref": "epi-..."} ],
  "detail_ref": "/api/v1/annotation-sets/ans-...", "indexed_at": "2026-06-11T08:00:12Z" }
```

**M08-3 `PUT /api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/governance-flags`** — manual flags (FR-A7.5).
Permission: `data.governance_flag:update`. Body: `{"deprecated": {"value": true, "reason": "..."}?, "superseded_by": "epi-..."?, "restricted": {"level": "tenant_confidential", "reason": "...", "policy_ref": "pol-..."}?, "note": "..."}` (declarative replace of the manual flag set; If-Match required).
Processing: (1) authz; target must exist in read-model; (2) `superseded_by` must resolve to a same-type, non-deprecated asset (`E_VALIDATION`); writes to computed flags → `E_CAT_FLAG_COMPUTED_READONLY`; `restricted` requires a resolvable Usage Policy ref; (3) **Tx:** update `catalog.governance_flag` + append `governance_flag_history` + outbox `data.governance_flag.updated` — commit; (4) side effects: usage-check policy cache purge, search-cache invalidation for the asset, SVC-04 metadata sync to M18 indexes (flag changes must reach hybrid-result re-checks ≤ 60 s — cache invalidation contract §2.8.4); (5) audit `data.governance_flag.updated` with before/after; restricting a snapshot fans out M20 notices to where-used owners.

**M08-4 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/dataset-snapshots`** — assemble draft (FR-A8.1/A8.2).
Permission: `data.snapshot:create`. Body (compact):

```json
{ "snapshot_id": "dss-..."?, "name": "kitchen-manip", "semver": "1.2.0", "purpose": "training",
  "description": "...", "owner_id": "usr-...", "previous_snapshot_id": "dss-..."?,
  "members": [ {"member_type": "episode", "ref": "epi-...", "version": 2},
               {"member_type": "annotation_set", "ref": "ans-...", "version": 3},
               {"member_type": "synthetic_batch", "ref": "syn-..."} ],
  "member_source": { "cohort_ref": "coh-...", "cohort_version": 5 }?,
  "usage_policy": { "restrictions": ["no_export"], "privacy_tags": ["faces_blurred"], "license_tags": ["internal-rd-v1"], "retention_class": "standard" },
  "card_draft": { "intended_use": "...", "known_gaps": "..." } }
```

Processing: (1) authz `data.snapshot:create`; (2) `(project, name, semver)` uniqueness (`E_CONFLICT`); `previous_snapshot_id` must be a published member of the same family; (3) resolve members (explicit list and/or cohort/saved-search expansion; > 10k members resolves async → **202** `{snapshot_id, workflow_run_ref}`, draft fills progressively): every ref must exist with the right type (`E_CAT_MEMBER_NOT_FOUND`), versions pinned (annotation sets pin `(ans-, version)`, episodes pin episode version); eligibility computed as **advisory chips at draft** (hard gate is publish); restricted members require caller read access (`E_RESTRICTED_DATA`) and their restriction/privacy/license tags are **union-inherited** onto the draft policy (deny-wins; removal needs `data.governance_flag:update` + reason); (4) **Tx:** insert `catalog.dataset_snapshot` (status `draft`) + `snapshot_member_draft` rows + card draft v1 + outbox — commit; (5) **re-POST with `snapshot_id` of an existing draft replaces the draft membership/policy declaratively** (drafts have no PATCH; published → `E_CAT_SNAPSHOT_IMMUTABLE`); (6) audit `data.snapshot.created`; **201** `{snapshot_id, status:"draft", member_count, eligibility_summary, composition_preview}`.

**M08-5 `GET /api/v1/dataset-snapshots/{snapshot_id}` · `GET .../members` · `GET .../lineage` · `GET .../usage`**
Permission: `data.catalog:read` (+ restriction gate as M08-2).
Detail: full FR-A8.2 record `{snapshot_id, name, semver, purpose, owner_id, status, member_count, composition, quality_rollup, annotation_rollup, usage_policy, manifest_hash, manifest_uri (signed, TTL 15 min), previous/replacement links, published_at/by, card_version, created/updated}`. `/members`: paginated — drafts from `snapshot_member_draft`; published from the **frozen manifest** (manifest pages cached by `(manifest_hash, page)` — immutable, infinitely cacheable); filter `member_type`. `/lineage`: graph `{nodes[], edges[]}` over `catalog.lineage_edge` from snapshot → members → sources (episodes → raw recordings; annotation sets → episodes; synthetic batches → scenarios `scn-`/generation requests) with `depth` (default 3) — BR-02. `/usage`: where-used `{training_plans[], training_runs[], evaluation_runs[], generation_requests[], cohorts[], release_candidates[] (via M14 lineage)}` + usage-check stats `{allowed_30d, denied_30d, needs_approval_30d}` — feeds FR-A7.5 computed flags.

**M08-6 `POST /api/v1/dataset-snapshots/{snapshot_id}:publish`** — publish immutable snapshot (BR-04, FR-A8.1).
Permission: `data.snapshot:publish`. Body: `{"expected_member_count": 18421?, "policy_acknowledgements": ["warn-synth-fraction"]?}`.
Processing:

1. Authz `data.snapshot:publish` at the snapshot's project; status must be `draft` (`E_STATE_INVALID`); `Idempotency-Key` required — replay with identical payload returns the original publish response (`Idempotency-Replayed: true`), different payload → `E_IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` (**publish is idempotent by Idempotency-Key**).
2. Restricted-publication approval gate: when the draft policy carries restrictions flagged `requires_governance_approval` in the tenant vocabulary, a granted M16-6 approval record must reference this snapshot (else 409 `E_STATE_INVALID` with `details.required="approval"`).
3. **Revalidate every member exists + quality gates** (hard, against current source state): episode `quality_status ∈ {accepted, accepted_with_warnings}` and not `alignment_failed` (DA-05); annotation set version `approved` (M07); synthetic batch `validation_status ∈ validated_*` and not deprecated (BR-11); failures → `E_CAT_MEMBER_NOT_ELIGIBLE` (409) listing offenders. `expected_member_count` mismatch → `E_VALIDATION` (guards stale drafts).
4. **Compute composition stats**: classify each member from provenance lineage (episode from raw capture → `real`; synthetic batch → `synthetic`; augmentation lineage → `augmented`) → counts + fractions + `mixed` flag + per-generator-class breakdown (FR-A8.3, BR-03); evaluate M10-8 composition policies — block-mode breach → `E_CAT_COMPOSITION_POLICY_VIOLATION`; warn-mode requires the warning id in `policy_acknowledgements[]`.
5. Validate FR-A8.2 completeness (owner, purpose, lineage resolvable, quality/annotation rollups computed) + mandatory card sections (`E_CAT_CARD_REQUIRED`, 412) + normalized usage policy (FR-A8.4).
6. **Freeze the member manifest**: serialize members canonically (sorted JSONL: `{member_type, ref, version, content_hash, byte_size, source_uri}` per line), write to the curated zone as a **content-addressed object** (`manifests/{sha256}.jsonl`, write-once with retention lock; zero-copy — the manifest references curated objects, duplicating nothing, lakeFS/DVC-style per §0.7.3); compute `manifest_hash` = sha256 root.
7. **Tx begin** — re-check status `draft` under row lock; **insert the immutable published version data into the snapshot row exactly once** (status `published`, `published_at/by`, `manifest_hash`, `manifest_uri`, frozen `composition`, quality/annotation rollups, policy snapshot) + freeze card v_n as the publication card + write `catalog.snapshot_usage_policy` rows + **outbox `data.snapshot.published`** — **commit** (single local transaction per §1.4.4; the manifest object is written before the tx and garbage-collected if commit fails).
8. Post-commit: audit `data.snapshot.published` (manifest hash, composition, policy summary); outbox fan-out → catalog projector (self-index), SVC-04 → M18 (index + coverage recompute), M20 (watchers). Delete `snapshot_member_draft` rows (manifest is now authoritative).
9. Large drafts (> 50k members): steps 3–6 run as an M16 `dataset_publishing` workflow → **202** `{workflow_run_ref}`; the finalization task performs step 7's single transaction; the publish remains idempotent by the original Idempotency-Key.

**From `published` onward the row is never updated** (except the M08-7 governance columns); corrections are a new semver via M08-4 (`previous_snapshot_id` chain) — supersede only.

Composition classification rules (step 4, normative — FR-A8.3/BR-03):

| Member provenance (lineage evidence) | Class |
|---|---|
| episode whose lineage roots only in raw recordings (`rec-`) | `real` |
| synthetic batch (`syn-`, always `synthetic=true` per BR-03/M10) or episode derived from one | `synthetic` |
| episode with an augmentation transform edge over real sources | `augmented` |
| annotation set | classified by its annotated source episodes (no own class) |
| snapshot total | `mixed=true` when > 1 class present; fractions by member count **and** by step/frame count where available |

`augmented` never reclassifies as `real`; ambiguous lineage (unresolvable edge) blocks publish with `E_CAT_MEMBER_NOT_ELIGIBLE` (`details.reason="lineage_unresolved"`, BR-02).

**M08-7 `POST /api/v1/dataset-snapshots/{snapshot_id}:deprecate`** — deprecation + replacement (FR-A8.7).
Permission: `data.snapshot:deprecate`. Body: `{"reason_code": "superseded|quality_defect|policy_change|harmful_synthetic", "reason": "...", "replacement_snapshot_id": "dss-..."?}`.
Processing: (1) authz; status must be `published` (`E_STATE_INVALID`); (2) replacement (optional but recommended for `superseded`): must be `published`, not deprecated, tenant-visible (`E_CAT_DEPRECATED_REPLACEMENT_INVALID`); (3) **Tx:** set governance columns `status='deprecated', deprecated_at/by/reason, replacement_snapshot_id` (content untouched — BR-04) + reciprocal `replaces` lineage edge + outbox `data.snapshot.deprecated` — commit; (4) effects: usage checks **deny new selections** of deprecated snapshots (default-policy deny with `needs_approval` escalation for reproduction runs); existing references and lineage remain fully readable (FR-A8.7 "without losing lineage"); (5) audit + M20 notification to all where-used owners with the replacement link. Idempotent: re-deprecating with identical payload replays 200.

**M08-8 `PUT /api/v1/dataset-snapshots/{snapshot_id}/card` · `GET` (same)** — dataset card (FR-A8.6).
Permission: `data.card:update` (PUT) / `data.catalog:read` (GET).
PUT body: `{"sections": {"intended_use": "...", "collection_method": "...", "known_gaps": "...", "quality_limitations": "...", "maintenance": "...", "known_issues": "..."}}` + If-Match on card version.
Processing: (1) authz; (2) **mutability matrix**: draft snapshot → all author sections editable; published → only living sections (`known_issues`, `errata`, `maintenance`, `recommended_replacements`); generated sections (`composition`, membership stats, lineage summary, `approval_status`) are always read-only; violations → `E_CAT_SNAPSHOT_IMMUTABLE` (409) naming the section; (3) **Tx:** insert card v(n+1) (cards are append-only versions; the publication card version is pinned on the snapshot row) + outbox — commit; (4) card rendering job regenerates the YAML-front-matter + markdown artifact (datasheet structure per §0.7.3); (5) audit `data.card.updated` (section diff summary). GET: `?version=n` (default latest), `?format=json|markdown|yaml`.

Card section schema (datasheet fields per §0.7.3; `*` mandatory before publish — `E_CAT_CARD_REQUIRED`):

| Section | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `intended_use`* | author | data engineer (FR-A8.6) |
| `collection_method`* | author, auto-drafted | M04 campaign metadata (robot, environment, operators, consent) |
