#### 2.13.2 Functional & UI/UX Design

**Primary functions**

| # | Function | Description | FRD |
|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | Suite authoring & versioning | Suites compose dataset snapshot refs, scenario collection refs, regression set refs, metric definitions, acceptance thresholds, baseline ref; versions `draft→active→retired`; active versions frozen | FR-C4.1 |
| F2 | Evidence-source separation | Every suite component, run, metric value, and breakdown row carries exactly one `evidence_source ∈ {offline_dataset, simulation, real_world_trial}` | FR-C4.2 |
| F3 | Run execution | Suite × candidate(s) launches: offline components → M16 workflow (SVC-08); simulation components → M10 runs `purpose=evaluation` (DA-18); trial components → matched Trial Evidence Records (never executed, DA-09) |
| F4 | Metric families | Exact FR-C4.4 families: `task_success, perception_quality, temporal_consistency, action_prediction_quality, collision_constraint_violations, robustness_across_variations, failure_rate`; each metric declares family, direction, unit, aggregation | FR-C4.4 |
| F5 | Report assembly | Per-run report: metrics vs. thresholds, baseline comparison, breakdowns, failure list, coverage; draft until approved | FR-C4.3 |
| F6 | Breakdowns | Pivot by `task, environment, object_class, robot_state, action_phase, failure_category, data_source` (exact FR-C4.5 dimensions; `data_source` = real/synthetic origin) | FR-C4.5 |
| F7 | Immutability & supersession | Approve → hash-frozen immutable report + object-store copy; updates only via superseding drafts with chain links | FR-C4.8, BR-08 |
| F8 | Workbench handoff | Failed episodes open as M19 review sessions; review decisions flow back via M19-5 | FR-C4.6 |
| F9 | Failure conversion | Report failures → M15 failure records (batch, deduplicated) | FR-C4.7 |
| F10 | Trial evidence ingestion | Governed upload + structured metadata form; `submitted→accepted\|rejected` review | FR-C4.2, DA-09 |
| F11 | Regression sets | Versioned sets built from prior failures (episodes/scenarios/cases); consumable as suite components | FR-C6.5 |
| F12 | Coverage gaps | Task/environment/embodiment/evidence-tier coverage of evaluation vs. model task scope | FR-C4.9 |
| F13 | Comparison report | Candidate vs. baseline across suites/tasks/scenarios/failure categories | RPT-07, FR-C4.3 |

**UI pages**

**P1 — Suite Builder** (create / version-edit; F1). Header: name, description, target task scope, owner. **Components panel** (tabbed by evidence source, making FR-C4.2 structural in the UI): *Offline datasets* — snapshot picker (published only, restriction badges as in M11-P1; role `eval_holdout` warning if a snapshot also appears in a linked training plan — leakage guard); *Simulation* — scenario collection picker (M09-5; pinned `scc-…@v{n}`, validated-fraction indicator); *Regression sets* — regression set picker (M13-10; pinned version); *Real-world trial* — expected-trial-protocol descriptor (free-form protocol ref + required metadata schema; marks the suite as expecting trial evidence matching). **Metrics panel**: metric rows `{key, family (7-value FR-C4.4 enum), direction (higher|lower), unit, aggregation (mean|median|p95|rate), evidence_source, per-breakdown applicability}`. **Acceptance panel**: threshold rows `{metric_key, operator, value, severity: blocking|warning}` + baseline selector (`@baseline` alias of a family via M12-6, or pinned `mdl-`). Save draft → `M13-1 POST/PATCH`; Activate (freeze) → `:new-version`/activate flow with completeness check (≥1 component, ≥1 metric, baseline resolvable).

| Field | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| name | text | ≤120 | — | "kitchen-manip-release-suite" | required; unique per project |
| task_scope | multi-select | taxonomy refs | — | — | ≥1 (coverage joins, F12) |
| dataset_snapshot_refs[] | picker | `{snapshot_id, semver, role}` | — | — | published snapshots; `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` precheck badge |
| scenario_collection_refs[] | picker | `scc-{ulid}@v{n}` | — | — | frozen collection versions only (`E_EVS_COMPONENT_UNRESOLVED`) |
| regression_set_refs[] | picker | `rgs-{ulid}@v{n}` | — | — | active regression set versions |
| metrics[] | row editor | per F4 schema | — | — | family ∈ exact 7-value enum; key unique |
| thresholds[] | row editor | `{metric_key, op, value, severity}` | — | — | metric_key must exist |
| baseline_candidate_ref | picker | `mdl-` or `family@baseline[task]` | family `@baseline` | — | resolvable at activation (`E_EVS_BASELINE_UNRESOLVED`) |
| trial_protocol | group | protocol ref + metadata schema | — | — | required iff suite declares real_world_trial tier |

**P2 — Evaluation Run Launcher** (F3). Matrix selector: **candidates × suite version** — left: candidate picker (M12-1 list filtered to `evaluating`-eligible states; selecting a `registered` candidate shows "will transition to evaluating"); right: suite version picker (active versions only) with component manifest preview grouped by evidence tier and per-tier execution route chips ("offline → workflow training@…/eval", "simulation → M10 runs", "trial → evidence matching only"). Options: service_class, seed policy, baseline override (defaults to suite baseline). Launch → `M13-2 POST` → 202 toast with per-tier refs (`workflow_run_ref`, `sim_run_ids[]`). Run list/detail mirror M11-P3/P4 (status chips, per-tier progress bars, partial-results panel).

**P3 — Report Viewer** (F5/F6). Header: candidate vs. baseline identity cards, suite@version, status banner (draft amber — "results may still assemble"; approved green + lock icon + hash; superseded grey + chain link). *Summary tab*: metric table grouped by family — columns value / baseline / **Δ (baseline delta** with green/red direction-aware arrows**)** / threshold / verdict chip (pass/warn/fail); overall outcome (passed / failed / passed_with_warnings) computed from blocking thresholds; per-tier sub-scores kept separate (F2). *Breakdown tab*: **pivot table** — dimension switcher over the exact 7 FR-C4.5 dimensions, cells = metric value + baseline delta + sample count; heat coloring; cell click → episode/case list drawer. *Failures tab*: failure cases (episode/scenario refs, observed vs. expected, failure_category) with bulk-select → "Convert to failure records" (`M13-9`) and "Review in Workbench" (opens M19-1 session on selected episodes with eval overlays — FR-C4.6). *Evidence tab*: per-tier source inventory (snapshot ids, sim run ids, trial evidence ids) + lineage links. Actions: Approve (`M13-5`, confirm modal restating BR-08 immutability), Supersede (`M13-6`, reason required), Compare (`M13-7`), Export (frozen PDF/JSON from object-store copy once approved).

**P4 — Trial Evidence Upload Form** (F10, DA-09). Structured metadata form: candidate ref (`mdl-`), suite ref (optional), trial protocol ref, trial date/site/operator org, embodiment, task list, environment descriptors, results payload upload (CSV/JSON per protocol schema), media attachments (optional), provenance attestation (uploader certifies source; checkbox + free-text). Submit → `M13-8 POST` (`status=submitted`). Review queue for Evaluation Lead: accept (with normalization mapping to metric keys) / reject (reason). Accepted records become selectable evidence in runs/reports; the form prominently states the platform **never executes robot trials** (FR-C5.4 boundary).

**P5 — Regression Set Builder** (F11). Source panel: M15 failure records (filter: status `verified`-pending, category, model family) + M13 report failure cases + M18 cohorts; drag into set members — each member `{kind: episode|scenario_ref|offline_case, source_failure_ids[], expected_behavior}`. Versioning identical to suites (`draft→active→retired`); activating pins member refs. Sets surface "consumed by N suites" chips; M15 verification links auto-display (FR-C6.4: next candidate's results on these members flow back to M15-6).

**P6 — Coverage Gap Panel** (F12). Matrix: task_scope × evidence tier × embodiment — cells show evaluated/not-evaluated/stale (last evaluation older than policy) for the selected model family or release plan; gap rows link to "create suite version component" and M09-6 scenario requests. Binding: `M13-11`; gap exports feed M18-10 joins.

**Exception handling (UI-wide):** `E_EVR_IMMUTABLE` on any edit attempt against an approved report → lock banner "approved reports are immutable (BR-08) — create a superseding report", button → `M13-6`; `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` at launch → offending snapshot modal (as M11); `E_EVS_VERSION_FROZEN` → "create new suite version"; partial-tier failures render per-tier error chips with rerun shortcuts; 412/422 per §1.4.3/§1.4.4.

#### 2.13.3 Interface Design

Per §1.4 conventions; module error namespaces `E_EVS_*` (suites/runs) and `E_EVR_*` (reports); authz M03-10; audit M03-11.

**Normative state machines (M13)**

```text
EvaluationSuite version (exact):  draft ──activate──▶ active ──retire──▶ retired (terminal)
  · active version documents FROZEN (components/metrics/thresholds immutable); edits = :new-version
EvaluationRun.status (exact):     queued ──▶ running ──▶ succeeded | failed | cancelled (terminal)
EvaluationReport.status (exact):  draft ──:approve──▶ approved (IMMUTABLE, BR-08)
  · approved + superseded_by set ⇒ superseded FLAG (status stays approved; chain via superseded_by/supersedes)
TrialEvidence.status (exact):     submitted ──review──▶ accepted | rejected (terminal)
RegressionSet version:            draft ──activate──▶ active ──retire──▶ retired (terminal)
```

**Module error codes**

| Code | HTTP | Raised when |
|---|---|---|
| `E_EVS_VERSION_FROZEN` | 409 | PATCH on a non-draft suite/regression-set version |
| `E_EVS_COMPONENT_UNRESOLVED` | 422 | Component ref unresolvable (unpublished snapshot, unfrozen collection version, retired regression set) |
| `E_EVS_BASELINE_UNRESOLVED` | 422 | Baseline ref/alias resolves to nothing at activation or launch |
| `E_EVS_NOT_ACTIVE` | 409 | Run launch against a non-`active` suite version |
| `E_EVS_TIER_UNAVAILABLE` | 409 | Launch includes a tier whose executor route is unavailable (e.g., collection invalidated since activation) |
| `E_EVR_IMMUTABLE` | 409 | Any mutation (PATCH/breakdown write/failure edit/re-approve) on an `approved` report |
| `E_EVR_NOT_ASSEMBLED` | 409 | `:approve` while report assembly incomplete or run non-terminal |
| `E_EVR_SUPERSEDE_TARGET_INVALID` | 422 | `:supersede` on a non-approved report or broken chain |
| `E_EVR_CALLBACK_STALE` | 409 | M13-12 event unknown run / state regression (mirror of `E_TRN_CALLBACK_STALE`) |
| `E_EVR_TRIAL_SCHEMA_MISMATCH` | 422 | Trial evidence payload fails the suite/protocol metadata schema |
| Shared | — | `E_RESTRICTED_DATA`, `E_QUOTA_EXCEEDED`, `E_VALIDATION`, `E_STATE_INVALID`, `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED`, `E_IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` per §1.4.3 |

**M13-1 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/evaluation-suites` · `GET` (same) · `GET/PATCH /api/v1/evaluation-suites/{suite_id}` · `POST /api/v1/evaluation-suites/{suite_id}:new-version`**
Permission: `mlops.suite:create/read/update` (`:new-version` ⇒ `mlops.suite:update`).
POST body (compact):

```json
{ "name": "kitchen-manip-release-suite", "description": "...", "task_scope": ["tsk-open-drawer"],
  "components": {
    "dataset_snapshot_refs": [ { "snapshot_id": "dss-...", "semver": "2.1.0", "role": "eval_holdout" } ],
    "scenario_collection_refs": [ { "collection_id": "scc-...", "version": 2, "episodes_per_scenario": 50 } ],
    "regression_set_refs": [ { "set_id": "rgs-...", "version": 1 } ],
    "trial_protocol": { "protocol_ref": "https://...", "metadata_schema_ref": "tps-..." } },
  "metrics": [ { "key": "drawer_open_success", "family": "task_success", "direction": "higher",
                 "unit": "rate", "aggregation": "mean", "evidence_source": "simulation" },
               { "key": "collision_rate", "family": "collision_constraint_violations", "direction": "lower",
                 "unit": "per_episode", "aggregation": "rate", "evidence_source": "simulation" } ],
  "thresholds": [ { "metric_key": "drawer_open_success", "op": ">=", "value": 0.9, "severity": "blocking" } ],
  "baseline_candidate_ref": { "kind": "alias", "family": "acme-vla-base", "alias": "baseline", "task_scope": "tsk-open-drawer" },
  "owner_id": "usr-..." }
```

Trial-protocol metadata schemas (`tps-`) are tenant-seeded validation schemas managed through tenant administration (platform migration in v1; no standalone public endpoint).

Processing (POST):

1. Authz `mlops.suite:create`; validate metric `family` against the exact 7-value FR-C4.4 enum and `evidence_source` against the exact 3-value FR-C4.2 enum → `E_VALIDATION` with field paths.
2. Resolve components: snapshots `published` (M08-5), collection versions frozen (M09-5), regression set versions `active` → `E_EVS_COMPONENT_UNRESOLVED` (422). Threshold `metric_key`s must exist.
3. **Tx:** insert suite head + version 1 (`status='draft'`, components/metrics/thresholds JSONB) + outbox `mlops.suite.created` — commit; audit; **201** `{suite_id, version: 1, status: "draft"}`.

PATCH edits draft versions only (`E_EVS_VERSION_FROZEN` otherwise; If-Match). Activation is a PATCH `{"status":"active"}` on a draft version: re-resolves all components + baseline (`E_EVS_BASELINE_UNRESOLVED`), freezes the document, records `activated_at/by`, outbox `mlops.suite.activated`. Retire likewise (`active→retired`; running runs complete, new launches blocked). `:new-version` clones the addressed version to draft (head-row lock serializes; mirror of M09-2). GET list filters: `q, status, task_scope, owner_id, component_ref`.

**M13-2 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/evaluation-runs` · `GET` (same) · `GET /api/v1/evaluation-runs/{run_id}` · `POST ...:cancel`**
Permission: `mlops.eval:execute` (POST/cancel) / `mlops.eval:read` (GET).
POST body: `{ "suite_ref": { "suite_id": "evs-...", "version": 3 }, "candidate_ids": ["mdl-a", "mdl-b"], "baseline_override"?: "mdl-...", "tiers"?: ["offline_dataset","simulation"], "service_class"?: "standard", "seed_policy"?: "fixed:42", "trial_evidence_ids"?: ["tev-..."] }`
Processing:

1. Authz `mlops.eval:execute`; suite version must be `active` → `E_EVS_NOT_ACTIVE` (409).
2. Resolve candidates via M12 (must exist in-project; lifecycle ∈ `{registered, evaluating, approved_limited_trial, release_candidate, released}` — `rejected/deprecated/archived` → `E_VALIDATION`). Resolve baseline: override > suite `baseline_candidate_ref`; alias resolution via M12-6 current holder, **pinned to a concrete `mdl-` id at launch** (stored on the run, so later alias repoints never change this run's comparison) → `E_EVS_BASELINE_UNRESOLVED`.
3. **Usage checks (BR-05):** M08-9 batch over the suite's `dataset_snapshot_refs` with `requested_use="evaluation_input"`, principal = caller → deny ⇒ **403 `E_RESTRICTED_DATA`** (details per snapshot).
4. Plan tier execution (DA-18): *offline_dataset* → one M16-2 workflow per candidate (`template: "evaluation@v{N}"`, params: candidate artifact ref, snapshot manifests, metric defs, seed; executed by SVC-08 Evaluation Executor); *simulation* → M10-1 runs per (candidate × collection) with `purpose=evaluation`, `model_candidate_ref`, collection version, episodes_per_scenario, seed; *real_world_trial* → no execution: referenced/matching `accepted` Trial Evidence Records attached (`E_EVS_TIER_UNAVAILABLE` if the suite expects this tier and none supplied — downgradeable to warning by tenant policy). Tier filter `tiers[]` restricts to a subset (partial evaluation flagged on the report).
5. **Tx begin** — insert `mlops.evaluation_run` (`status='queued'`, suite ref, candidates[], baseline_pinned, tier plan with child refs) + draft `mlops.evaluation_report` shells (one per candidate, `status='draft'`, `assembly_state='collecting'`) + outbox `mlops.eval_run.launched` — **commit**; child launches (M16-2, M10-1) execute via the outbox relay with propagated idempotency keys (compensating cancels on partial failure, mirroring M11-3 step 5).
6. Audit; **202** `{run_id, status:"queued", reports:[{candidate_id, report_id}], tier_refs:{workflow_run_refs[], sim_run_ids[], trial_evidence_ids[]}}`.
7. If a candidate is `registered`, M13 requests M12-3 `registered→evaluating` under its service identity (recorded as system actor).

`:cancel` mirrors M11-5: M16-4/M10-2 cancel fan-out, state flips only on M13-12 events; GET detail returns per-tier progress + partial metrics.

**M13-3 `GET /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/evaluation-reports` · `GET /api/v1/evaluation-reports/{report_id}`**
Permission: `mlops.eval:read`. List filters: `candidate_id, suite_id, status (draft|approved), superseded (true|false), outcome, created_after/before`. Detail returns report header + summary metrics (per tier, vs. baseline + thresholds) + failure case index + evidence inventory + supersession chain (`supersedes`, `superseded_by`) + `content_hash` and `frozen_uri` when approved. Approved reports are served from the frozen JSONB row (DB copy of record; object-store copy for export integrity).

**M13-4 `GET /api/v1/evaluation-reports/{report_id}/breakdowns?dimension=`** — FR-C4.5.
Permission: `mlops.eval:read`. Params: `dimension` ∈ exactly `task|environment|object_class|robot_state|action_phase|failure_category|data_source` (else `E_VALIDATION`), `metric_key?`, `evidence_source?`, `format=json|csv`.
Response: `{ "dimension": "object_class", "rows": [ { "key": "glassware", "evidence_source": "simulation", "metrics": { "drawer_open_success": { "value": 0.71, "baseline": 0.78, "delta": -0.07, "sample_count": 140 } }, "failure_case_count": 12 } ], "generated_at": "..." }`. Served from `mlops.report_breakdown` rows (assembled, then frozen with the report); `data_source` dimension splits by member-asset real/synthetic origin (BR-03 visibility).

**M13-5 `POST /api/v1/evaluation-reports/{report_id}:approve`** — approve → immutable (BR-08).
Permission: `mlops.report:approve`. Body: `{ "decision_note"?: "...", "outcome_confirmation": "passed|failed|passed_with_warnings" }`
Processing:

1. Authz `mlops.report:approve`; tenant policy may additionally route release-critical suites through M16-6 (approval ref then required on this call — BR-12/DA-08); approver ≠ run launcher when tenant `four_eyes_eval=true`.
2. Load report `FOR UPDATE`; status must be `draft` (`approved` → `E_EVR_IMMUTABLE` 409); parent run terminal `succeeded` and `assembly_state='assembled'` → `E_EVR_NOT_ASSEMBLED` (409); `outcome_confirmation` must equal the computed outcome (`E_VALIDATION` — approver confirms, never overrides numbers).
3. **Recompute report content hash** over the canonical serialization (summary + all breakdown rows + failure cases + evidence inventory, stable field order); compare with the assembly-time hash — mismatch aborts (`E_INTERNAL`, integrity alarm).
4. **Freeze:** write the canonical JSON to object storage `…/evr-{id}/report-{hash}.json` (tenant evidence bucket, write-once prefix); set `frozen_uri`, `content_hash`.
5. **Tx begin** — status `draft→approved`, `approved_by/at`, `decision_note`; set DB row read-only via guard column (`immutable=true`; all write paths check it → `E_EVR_IMMUTABLE`); append outbox `mlops.report.approved` — **commit**. (Steps 4 then 5: object copy first, so an approved row never lacks its frozen copy; orphan object on tx abort is GC-safe.)
6. Audit `mlops.report.approved` `{report_id, content_hash, outcome}`; M14 may now reference it as evidence; M12 eligibility caches refresh; M20 fires regression alerts when outcome regressed vs. previous approved report on the same (candidate family, suite) (FR-D4.4).
7. Idempotent replay (same Idempotency-Key) returns the approved state; a *different* approval attempt on an approved report → `E_EVR_IMMUTABLE`.

**M13-6 `POST /api/v1/evaluation-reports/{report_id}:supersede`** — supersession chain (FR-C4.8).
Permission: `mlops.eval:execute`. Body: `{ "reason": "rerun with fixed seed policy", "new_run_request"?: { ...M13-2 body... } }`
Processing: (1) target must be `approved` (`E_EVR_SUPERSEDE_TARGET_INVALID` otherwise — drafts are simply re-assembled); (2) launches the new evaluation run (M13-2 semantics) whose draft report carries `supersedes: evr-old`; (3) on the *new* report's approval, tx sets old row `superseded_by = evr-new` (flag only — the old report **remains approved and immutable**; chain walkable both ways); (4) audit `mlops.report.superseded`; M14 evidence referencing a superseded report triggers M14-6 change acknowledgement (FR-C5.6). **202** with new `{run_id, report_id}`.

**M13-7 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/evaluation-reports:compare`** — RPT-07.
Permission: `mlops.eval:read`. Body: `{ "report_ids"?: ["evr-a","evr-b"], "candidate_ids"?: [...], "suite_id"?: "evs-...", "dimensions"?: ["task","failure_category"], "baseline_mode": "shared_baseline|pairwise" }` (2–8 reports; approved preferred, drafts flagged).
Returns the comparison matrix: per metric family × dimension, candidate values + deltas vs. baseline and vs. each other, threshold verdicts, evidence-tier badges per cell (no cross-tier averaging — F2), failure-category overlap analysis. Synchronous 200, cached 60 s by body hash; powers P3 compare and the RPT-07 dashboard (model candidate comparison by evaluation suite, baseline, task, scenario, failure category).

**M13-8 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/trial-evidence` · `GET` (same) · `GET /api/v1/trial-evidence/{evidence_id}`** — DA-09.
Permission: `mlops.trial_evidence:create` / `mlops.eval:read`. Review action (accept/reject) via PATCH `{status, reason?, metric_mapping?}` requiring `mlops.report:approve`.
POST body: `{ "candidate_id": "mdl-...", "suite_ref"?: {...}, "protocol_ref": "...", "trial_date": "2026-06-02", "site": "lab-shenzhen-2", "operator_org": "...", "embodiment": "humanoid-g2/v4", "tasks": ["tsk-..."], "environment": {...}, "results_payload_uri": "obj://... (uploaded via pre-signed PUT)", "payload_checksum": "sha256:...", "media_refs"?: [...], "attestation": { "attested_by": "usr-...", "statement": "..." } }`
Processing: (1) authz; structured metadata validated against the protocol's `metadata_schema_ref` → `E_EVR_TRIAL_SCHEMA_MISMATCH` (422); (2) payload checksum verified against the uploaded object; (3) tx insert `status='submitted'` + outbox `mlops.trial_evidence.submitted`; (4) review transition `submitted→accepted|rejected` (reason mandatory on reject; accept stores metric normalization mapping); (5) audit `mlops.trial_evidence.ingested` on accept. Accepted records are referencable in M13-2 and rendered in reports under the `real_world_trial` tier — **the platform never executes or schedules robot trials** (FR-C5.4, DA-09); evidence rows are immutable after review (corrections = new record superseding old by ref).

**M13-9 `POST /api/v1/evaluation-reports/{report_id}/failures:convert`** — FR-C4.7.
Permission: `mlops.eval:execute` + M15 `failure.record:create` (checked transitively; conversion runs in user context).
Body: `{ "failure_case_ids": ["fc-..."], "default_severity"?: "s2", "note"?: "..." }`
Processing: (1) authz; report must be `approved` or its run terminal (converting from drafts allowed for triage speed, flagged `pre_approval`); (2) for each case, call M15-1 with source `{kind:"evaluation", report_id, failure_case_id}`, payload (episode/scenario refs, observed/expected, category, candidate/model refs, dataset refs) — **deduplicated** by `(report_id, failure_case_id)`: already-converted cases return their existing `fal-` ref (idempotent); (3) tx records conversion refs on the report's failure-case rows (allowed on approved reports — conversion refs live in a side table, the frozen report body is untouched, preserving BR-08) + outbox `mlops.report.failures_converted`; (4) audit; **200** `{created: [{failure_case_id, failure_id}], existing: [...]}`. Closes BP-04 step 5 → BP-05 step 1.

**M13-10 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/regression-sets` · `GET` (same) · `GET /api/v1/regression-sets/{set_id}`** — FR-C6.5.
Permission: `mlops.regression_set:create/read` (PATCH/activate ⇒ `mlops.regression_set:update`).
POST body: `{ "name": "drawer-failures-2026q2", "description": "...", "members": [ { "kind": "episode", "ref": "epi-...", "source_failure_ids": ["fal-..."], "expected_behavior": "grasp without collision" }, { "kind": "scenario_ref", "ref": "scn-...@v3", "source_failure_ids": ["fal-..."] } ], "owner_id": "usr-..." }`
Processing: (1) authz; members' refs resolvable (episodes M06, scenarios M09, offline cases M13-local) and `source_failure_ids` resolvable in M15 → `E_VALIDATION`; (2) versioning identical to suites (`draft→active→retired`; activation freezes members; head-lock serialization); (3) tx + outbox `mlops.regression_set.activated` on activation; M15 is notified to set `regression_coverage` on source failure records (FR-C6.4 verification path: when a later report covers a member, M13 emits `mlops.regression.member_evaluated` consumed by M15-6); (4) active versions are pinnable as suite components (`regression_set_refs`, F1) — regression sets from failures are **consumed as suite components**, closing the loop before model promotion (FR-C6.5, BP-05 step 5).

**M13-11 `GET /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/evaluation-coverage`** — FR-C4.9.
Permission: `mlops.eval:read`. Params: `model_family?`, `release_plan?`, `dimension=task|environment|embodiment|evidence_tier`, `staleness_days?` (default 90).
Response rows: `{ "key": "tsk-pour-liquid", "evidence_tiers": { "offline_dataset": {"covered": true, "last_report": "evr-...", "age_days": 12}, "simulation": {"covered": true}, "real_world_trial": {"covered": false} }, "gap": true, "suggested_action": "add scenario collection | request trial evidence" }`. Computed by joining candidate task_scope (M12) × suite components × approved reports; backed by `mlops.eval_coverage_mv`; gap rows deep-link to P1 component add and M09-6 scenario requests (knowledge-base edge M18→M13/M09 per §0.5.2).

**M13-12 (i) `POST /internal/v1/evaluation-runs/{run_id}/events`** — evaluation executor callback (SVC-08 for offline tiers; M10 outbox relay republishes sim-run terminal events into this same endpoint via SVC-08 adapter; mTLS service identity, permission `mlops.eval:callback`).
Batch body:

```json
{ "events": [
  { "seq": 311, "kind": "status", "occurred_at": "...", "payload": { "status": "running", "tier": "offline_dataset", "candidate_id": "mdl-a" } },
  { "seq": 312, "kind": "metric_result", "occurred_at": "...", "payload": { "candidate_id": "mdl-a", "tier": "simulation",
      "metric_key": "drawer_open_success", "value": 0.71, "sample_count": 140,
      "slice": { "task": "tsk-open-drawer", "object_class": "glassware", "data_source": "synthetic" } } },
  { "seq": 313, "kind": "failure_case", "occurred_at": "...", "payload": { "candidate_id": "mdl-a", "tier": "simulation",
      "episode_ref": "sim-...#ep-17", "failure_category": "collision", "observed": "...", "expected": "...", "artifact_uri": "obj://..." } },
  { "seq": 314, "kind": "tier_terminal", "occurred_at": "...", "payload": { "tier": "simulation", "candidate_id": "mdl-a", "status": "succeeded" } },
  { "seq": 315, "kind": "terminal", "occurred_at": "...", "payload": { "status": "succeeded" } } ] }
```

Processing: (1) service authz; unknown run / state regression → `E_EVR_CALLBACK_STALE` (409, DLQ); (2) **idempotent by `(run_id, seq)`** upsert (`ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`), batched ≤500/tx (mirror of M11-9); (3) `metric_result` rows accumulate into `mlops.report_breakdown` staging keyed by slice; `failure_case` rows into the failure-case table; (4) `tier_terminal` marks tier completion per candidate; when all planned tiers terminal, the **report assembly job** runs (per candidate): aggregate slices → summary metrics per FR-C4.4 family, compute **baseline deltas** (read baseline candidate's latest approved report on the same suite version — or, when the run evaluated baseline and challenger together, the sibling report — pairwise per metric/slice), evaluate thresholds → outcome (a candidate failing acceptance criteria vs the pinned baseline additionally emits outbox `mlops.eval.regression_detected` — M17 alert-engine input, FR-D4.4), compute assembly hash, set `assembly_state='assembled'`, emit `mlops.report.assembled`; (5) `terminal` closes the run (`succeeded|failed|cancelled`); failed tiers yield reports flagged `partial=true` (approvable only when tenant policy allows partial-evidence approval); (6) **200** `{accepted, duplicates, rejected[]}`.

**Cross-module consumption map (M13 as provider):** M14 reads approved reports + hashes as frozen release evidence; M15 receives converted failures and regression verification events; M12 reads outcomes for transition evidence and eligibility; M19 receives episode-review session payloads (report context + episode refs); M18 reads coverage exports; M11-7 joins report headlines for run comparison.

**Concurrency & idempotency summary:** suite/set version creation under head-row lock; report approval under report-row lock with object-store-copy-before-commit ordering; callbacks idempotent by `(run_id, seq)`; conversion idempotent by `(report_id, failure_case_id)`; baseline alias pinned at launch (repoint-safe).

#### 2.13.4 Data Design

PostgreSQL, schema **`mlops.*`** (M13-owned tables; single writer per table). Report payloads are JSONB in Postgres (system of record) **plus a frozen object-store copy written at approval** (export/evidence integrity, hash-named, write-once prefix).

| Table | Key columns (abridged) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `mlops.evaluation_suite` | `suite_id pk (evs-ulid)`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `name`, `task_scope text[]`, `owner_id`, `current_version int`, `etag_version` | Unique `(project_id, name)` |
| `mlops.evaluation_suite_version` | `(suite_id, version) pk`, `status` (`draft\|active\|retired`), `components jsonb` (dataset_snapshot_refs, scenario_collection_refs, regression_set_refs, trial_protocol), `metrics jsonb` (FR-C4.4 family enum enforced by CHECK), `thresholds jsonb`, `baseline_candidate_ref jsonb`, `activated_at/by?`, `retired_at?` | Frozen once `active`; GIN on `components` (component reverse lookup) |
| `mlops.evaluation_run` | `run_id pk (evn-ulid)`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `suite_id`, `suite_version`, `candidate_ids text[]`, `baseline_pinned (mdl-)`, `tier_plan jsonb` (per-tier child refs: workflow_run_refs, sim_run_ids, trial_evidence_ids), `status`, `seed_policy`, `launched_by`, `started_at?`, `ended_at?`, `failure_reason?`, `last_seq bigint`, `etag_version` | Idx `(project_id, status)`, `(suite_id, suite_version)`, GIN on `candidate_ids` |
| `mlops.evaluation_report` | `report_id pk (evr-ulid)`, `run_id fk`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `candidate_id`, `baseline_id`, `suite_ref jsonb`, `status` (`draft\|approved`), `assembly_state` (`collecting\|assembled`), `summary jsonb` (per family/tier metrics + deltas + verdicts + outcome), `partial bool`, `supersedes?`, `superseded_by?`, `content_hash?`, `frozen_uri?`, `approved_by/at?`, `decision_note?`, `immutable bool default false`, `etag_version` | **Trigger guard:** UPDATE blocked when `immutable=true` except `superseded_by` set-once and side-table refs → enforces BR-08 at the storage layer; idx `(candidate_id, status)`, `(suite_ref)` |
| `mlops.report_breakdown` | `(report_id, dimension, key, metric_key, evidence_source) pk`, `value`, `baseline_value?`, `delta?`, `sample_count` | Exact FR-C4.5 dimension enum CHECK; bulk-loaded by assembly; frozen with report (covered by trigger guard via report ref) |
| `mlops.failure_case` | `case_id pk (fc-ulid)`, `report_id fk`, `candidate_id`, `tier`, `episode_ref`, `scenario_ref?`, `failure_category`, `observed`, `expected`, `artifact_uri?`, `converted_failure_id?` | `converted_failure_id` is the side-table mutation allowed post-approval (M13-9) |
| `mlops.trial_evidence` | `evidence_id pk (tev-ulid)`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `candidate_id`, `suite_ref?`, `protocol_ref`, `metadata jsonb`, `results_payload_uri`, `payload_checksum`, `status` (`submitted\|accepted\|rejected`), `review_by/at?`, `reject_reason?`, `metric_mapping jsonb?`, `attestation jsonb`, `created_by` | Immutable after review; idx `(candidate_id, status)` |
| `mlops.regression_set` / `mlops.regression_set_version` / `mlops.regression_set_member` | `set_id pk (rgs-ulid)` / `(set_id, version)` `status` / `(set_id, version, ord)`, `kind`, `ref`, `source_failure_ids text[]`, `expected_behavior` | Version freeze mirrors suites; GIN on `source_failure_ids` (M15 joins) |
| `mlops.eval_event_dlq` | `(run_id, seq)`, payload, error | Operator replay |
| `mlops.eval_coverage_mv` | keyed `(project_id, model_family, dimension, key)` | Backs M13-11 / P6 |

**ER relationships:** `evaluation_suite 1—n suite_version`; `suite_version 1—n evaluation_run` (by ref); `evaluation_run 1—n evaluation_report` (one per candidate); `evaluation_report 1—n report_breakdown`, `1—n failure_case`; `evaluation_report n—1 model_candidate` + `n—1 baseline candidate` (cross-table refs into M12); reports chain via `supersedes/superseded_by` (linked list, both `approved`); `trial_evidence n—m evaluation_run` via `tier_plan`; `regression_set_version` members reference episodes (M06), scenarios (M09), failure records (M15) — polymorphic refs, service-layer integrity; suites pin regression set versions (component JSONB).

**Volumetrics & partitioning:** runs/reports are moderate volume (10⁴–10⁵/tenant/yr) — plain B-tree + GIN. `report_breakdown` is the wide table (7 dimensions × keys × metrics × tiers ≈ 10³–10⁴ rows/report): **range-partitioned by report creation month**; bulk COPY load at assembly; partition drop = cheap retention. `failure_case` likewise monthly partitions. Metric *raw* episode-level outputs stay in object storage (executor-written), not Postgres — the DB stores aggregated slices only.

**Retention (DA-11):** suites/versions, regression sets — `active` indefinitely while referenced by any report or release evidence. Approved reports + breakdown rows + frozen object copies: **retained indefinitely while the candidate is not purged; never purged for reports cited by `released` candidates or M14 release candidates** (BR-08/BR-14 audit evidence). Draft reports of cancelled runs: 90 d. Trial evidence: indefinite while referenced; payload archivable to cold storage with checksummed metadata retained (`purged-metadata-retained`). DLQ 90 d.

**Processing logic:** (1) **metric ingestion batching** — M13-12 batches upsert staging slices; ≤500 events/tx; (2) **report assembly job** — per-candidate aggregation on tier completion: slice rollup → summary per FR-C4.4 family → **baseline delta computation** (pairwise vs. pinned baseline's report on same suite version; missing baseline report ⇒ deltas null + `baseline_unavailable` flag) → threshold verdicts → assembly hash; idempotent (re-run reproduces identical hash from staged rows); (3) **freeze pipeline** — M13-5 object-copy-then-commit ordering; weekly integrity sweep re-hashes frozen copies vs. `content_hash` (tamper detection alarm); (4) **cache invalidation** — `mlops.model.alias_changed` (M12) invalidates baseline-resolution cache; `mlops.report.approved` invalidates M13-7 comparison caches, M13-11 coverage MV rows, and M12 eligibility caches; suite activation/retire invalidates launcher pick-lists; (5) **regression verification fan-out** — approved reports covering regression-set members emit `mlops.regression.member_evaluated` → M15-6.

#### 2.13.5 Permission Design

| Permission key | PA | TA | OE | RD (default) | Persona templates granting it |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `mlops.suite:read` / `mlops.eval:read` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ (member projects) | Evaluation Lead, Model Engineer, Governance Approver, Program Manager |
| `mlops.suite:create` / `mlops.suite:update` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Evaluation Lead |
| `mlops.eval:execute` (launch/cancel/supersede/convert) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Evaluation Lead, Model Engineer (own candidates) |
| `mlops.report:approve` (also trial-evidence review) | ✓ | ✓ | — | grant-only | Evaluation Lead (`evalreport:approve` template, §0.2.4); tenant policy may require Governance Approver via M16-6 for release-critical suites (DA-08) |
| `mlops.trial_evidence:create` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Evaluation Lead, Model Engineer |
| `mlops.regression_set:create/update` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | Evaluation Lead |
| `mlops.regression_set:read` | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | all engineering personas |
| `mlops.eval:callback` (service-only) | — | — | — | — | SVC-08 service identity exclusively |

**Granularity:** project scope primary. Four-eyes option: `four_eyes_eval=true` forbids approver = launcher (checked in M13-5). Asset deny-wins: restricted snapshots in suite components require evaluation-use policy passage at launch regardless of role (BR-05); restricted episode refs in failure cases mask payload URIs for unauthorized readers (§0.5.3). OE: no business-domain keys.

**Credential scoping:** SVC-08 runs per-tenant executor identities holding `mlops.eval:callback` + read-only manifest URLs for granted snapshot versions (M08-issued) + candidate artifact read URLs (M11-issued, run-scoped) + write access only to `…/evn-{run_id}/` evidence prefix (M16-minted STS, short-lived). Trial-evidence uploads use single-use pre-signed PUT URLs scoped to `…/tev-{id}/` (15-min TTL). Frozen report object prefix is write-once (object-lock/governance mode); only the M13 service identity may write it, nobody may overwrite. User downloads of evidence/artifacts: 15-min signed GET, issuance audited, URLs never logged (§1.4.7).

#### 2.13.6 Logging Design

| Level | Trigger examples |
|---|---|
| DEBUG | slice staging detail, assembly aggregation timings, baseline cache resolution (off in prod) |
| INFO | suite created/activated/retired; run launched (tier plan summary); report assembled (outcome + hash); report approved/superseded; trial evidence submitted/accepted/rejected; regression set activated; conversion batch result `{created, existing}` |
| WARN | partial-tier failure; baseline unavailable at assembly; restricted-snapshot denial at launch; integrity sweep mismatch candidate (pre-alarm); callback DLQ entry; coverage MV staleness |
| ERROR | assembly job failure; freeze pipeline failure (object copy or tx); approval on non-assembled report attempts repeated > threshold; callback batch rejected |
| FATAL | frozen-copy integrity violation confirmed (tamper alarm); outbox relay down |

**JSON fields (per §1.4.6 +):** `suite_id` + `suite_version` (always paired), `run_id`, `report_id`, `candidate_id`, `baseline_id`, `tier`, `content_hash` (approval events), `seq_range` (callbacks), `action`, `result`, `error_code`. **Masking:** metric payloads summarized at INFO as `{metric_count, slice_count}` — no raw metric dumps at INFO (values live in `report_breakdown`); trial payloads logged as `{evidence_id, byte_size, checksum}`; failure-case free text by `fc-` id; signed URLs/STS never logged (§1.4.7).

**Shipping:** stdout JSON → platform pipeline; `traceparent` spans M13-2 → M16/M10 → SVC-08 → M13-12 → assembly (one trace per evaluation lifecycle); callback path logs per batch, not per event.

**Audit events (M03-11):** `mlops.suite.created` / `mlops.suite.activated` / `mlops.suite.retired`, `mlops.eval_run.launched` / `…cancel_requested` / terminal events, `mlops.report.assembled`, **`mlops.report.approved`** (content_hash, outcome, approver — the BR-08 anchor for AC-14), `mlops.report.superseded` (old→new chain), `mlops.report.failures_converted` (case→`fal-` map), **`mlops.trial_evidence.ingested`** (accept decision + checksum + attestor), `mlops.trial_evidence.rejected` (reason), `mlops.regression_set.activated`, `mlops.report.frozen_copy_verified|violated` (integrity sweep). Restriction denials pair with M08-side `data.usage_check.denied` (BR-05).

### 2.14 M14 — Release Candidate Governance

#### 2.14.1 Module Overview

M14 is the **release governance station of the Physical AI closed loop** (station 6, §0.2.1; BP-04 steps 6–8): it turns an evaluation-cleared model candidate into a governed **Release Candidate** (`rls-`) — a reviewable, evidence-frozen bundle — and records the explicit human release decision. Two rules are enforced end to end: an RC may be assembled **only** from a model candidate in `approved_limited_trial` or `release_candidate` lifecycle state with complete lineage (FR-C5.1 mapped onto the FR-C3.2 machine; gate delegated to M12 §2.12.3 (M12-4) per FR-C3.7/BR-09, boundary §1.6.6), and it may be decided only against a complete, **frozen** BR-07 evidence set (FR-C5.2). Submission freezes evidence into a content-hash manifest; any post-submission change to artifact, dataset lineage, target deployment class, or known limitations forces re-review (FR-C5.6, default policy per DA-08).

**Owns:** Release Candidate object + status machine; Evidence Manifest (frozen, content-addressed); Approval Decisions evaluated against the tenant approval matrix (DA-08); Packaging Metadata descriptors (FR-C5.5); change-detection and re-review records; Post-Release Log Evidence attachment (FR-C5.7, DA-19); release status report (RPT-08).
**Excludes — stated explicitly per FR-C5.4: M14 performs NO OTA delivery, fleet update, robot deployment, or device-management operation of any kind.** An `approved` RC is a governance fact, not a deployment action; deployment happens outside the platform and only its evidence (post-release logs, incidents, failures) flows back in (DA-19 — governed log-evidence upload, no fleet telemetry). Also excluded: model candidate lifecycle and model cards (M12 — M14 pins card revisions, never edits them); evaluation execution and reports (M13 — M14 references approved immutable reports only, BR-08); failure triage (M15 — M14 only emits `post_release_log` sources and remediation prompts); workflow execution (M16/SVC-09 Packaging Worker execute packaging jobs; M14 records the resulting descriptors).

**Roles:** Model Engineer (assembles, edits drafts, submits, maintains packaging metadata, uploads post-release logs — `release:assemble` persona template §0.2.4); Governance / Release Approver (decides, acknowledges changes — `approval:decide` template; default built-in role TA per §0.2.4). Evaluation Lead and Program Manager are readers of the status board.

**Upstream:** M12 §2.12.3 (M12-4 eligibility gate + lineage bundle, M12-5 pinned card revision; events `mlops.model.transitioned`, `mlops.model.card_updated`), M13 §2.13.3 (M13-3 report reads, M13-5 `content_hash`/`frozen_uri` of approved reports; events `mlops.report.approved`, `mlops.report.superseded`), M02 §2.2.3 (tenant policy block `release_approval_matrix`, single-writer M02, read-only here per DA-08), M01/M03 (session, authz, audit).
**Downstream:** M15 §2.15.3 (M15-1 post-release failure intake; remediation prompts on rejected/conditional outcomes per BP-04 step 8), M16 §2.16.3 (M16-5 remediation work requests; M16-2 packaging workflow launches executed by SVC-09), M12 (RC outcome events consumed for `released` transition evidence and the `candidate→release_candidate` lineage edge, per §0.7.5 — approval state written only by the M14 release workflow), M20 (decision/blocker notifications), M18 (release facts), M03 (audit, RPT-11 inputs).

**FRD coverage:** FR-C5.1–C5.7; BR-07; BR-09 (shared enforcement with M12, §1.7.2); BP-04 steps 6–8; RPT-08; AC-12; DA-08; DA-19; research basis §0.7.5 (ExecuTorch/ONNX/TensorRT packaging descriptors; release tags written only by release workflow).

#### 2.14.2 Functional & UI/UX Design

**Primary functions**

| # | Function | Description | FRD |
|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | RC assembly | Create RC from an eligible candidate only (lifecycle ∈ `approved_limited_trial \| release_candidate` + M12-4 completeness gate) | FR-C5.1, FR-C3.7, BR-09 |
| F2 | Evidence bundle | Model artifact ref, model card, dataset lineage, evaluation evidence (**approved immutable reports only**), target robot/deployment class, compatibility notes, known limitations, rollback reference | FR-C5.2, BR-07, BR-08 |
| F3 | Submission freeze | Content-hash evidence manifest computed and frozen at submit; every decision binds to a manifest seq | FR-C5.2/C5.6 |
| F4 | Decision workflow | `approved \| rejected \| conditionally_approved \| remediation_required` with required reason, evaluated against the tenant approval matrix | FR-C5.3, DA-08 |
| F5 | Change re-review | Post-submission change to artifact/lineage/target/limitations (user edit or upstream drift) → `re_review_required`; reviewer acknowledgement re-freezes (M14-6) | FR-C5.6 |
| F6 | Packaging metadata | ONNX / TensorRT engine / ExecuTorch `.pte` descriptors recorded as artifact metadata; TensorRT requires explicit target binding (engines not portable across GPU generations, per §0.7.5) | FR-C5.5 |
| F7 | Post-release linkage | Governed post-release log evidence files attached to released candidates; links to M15 failures and M17 incidents | FR-C5.7, DA-19 |
| F8 | Release status board | Missing evidence, approval blockers, known limitations per RC | RPT-08 |
| F9 | Explicit non-goal | **No OTA/fleet verbs anywhere in API or UI**; approval pages carry a fixed "governance only — no deployment is executed" notice | FR-C5.4 |

**UI pages**

**P1 — RC Assembly Wizard** (project-scoped, 4 steps; per BP-04 step 6). *Step 1 Candidate:* picker listing only eligible candidates (M12-1 filtered `lifecycle_status in (approved_limited_trial, release_candidate)`); ineligible candidates render greyed with reason chips ("lifecycle: evaluating", "lineage incomplete: model_card.known_limitations"). *Step 2 Evidence:* auto-assembled bundle preview from M12-4 + M13-3 — the **evidence completeness checklist** renders every BR-07 element as a red/green gate row (model lineage, dataset lineage, evaluation evidence, owner, intended use, known limitations, target class, rollback ref where applicable); report picker offers approved, non-superseded reports only, superseded ones flagged amber with the superseding `evr-` link. *Step 3 Target & limitations:* deployment class, robot models, compatibility notes, known limitations (pre-seeded from the pinned model card revision, edits tracked), rollback reference picker (prior approved RC / released candidate of the family). *Step 4 Review & create:* read-back + `Create draft` → M14-1; explicit separate CTA `Submit for review` → M14-4 (creation never auto-submits). Wizard cannot reach step 4 with any red gate except rollback-not-applicable.

Wizard input fields:

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| model_id | picker | `mdl-` ULID | — | Select eligible candidate… | required; eligible lifecycle + M12-4 gate (server re-checks) |
| name | text | ≤140 chars | `{family} v{N} → {class}` | e.g. acme-vla v7 → warehouse GA | required; unique per project (on-submit) |
| target_deployment_class | select+free | tenant class list, ≤80 | — | warehouse_humanoid_g2 | required (FR-C5.2) |
| target_robot_models[] | multi-select | embodiment registry refs | from candidate card | humanoid-g2/v4 | ≥1 required |
| intended_use | textarea | ≤2000 | card intended_use | Describe approved use… | required (BR-07) |
| known_limitations | textarea | ≤4000 | card known_limitations | Known failure modes, ODD bounds… | required non-empty (BR-07) |
| compatibility_notes | textarea | ≤2000 | — | Runtime, firmware, sensor suite… | required (FR-C5.2) |
| rollback_ref | picker | `rls-`/`mdl-` ref | latest released in family | Select rollback target… | required when a prior released version exists for this class; else optional ("where applicable", FR-C5.2) |
| evidence_report_ids[] | picker | `evr-` ULIDs | all approved reports for candidate | — | ≥1; approved + non-superseded only (real-time check) |
| owner_id | user picker | `usr-` | current user | — | required (BR-07) |

**P2 — RC Detail with frozen evidence bundle viewer.** Header: name, status badge (draft grey / submitted blue / approved green / conditionally_approved teal / remediation_required amber / rejected red / re_review_required purple / withdrawn dark), candidate link, owner, manifest chip `manifest seq N · sha256:ab12…` with copy + **Verify integrity** button (M14-3 `?verify=true`; green check or red mismatch alarm). Tabs: *Evidence* — manifest tree (artifact / card / dataset lineage / eval reports / trial evidence / packaging / governed fields), each item with content hash, frozen-at, deep link, and signed-URL download; draft RCs show the live preview with the red/green checklist instead. *Decisions* — decision history bound to manifest seqs, matrix progress (n of m approvals). *Changes* — change events (kind, source event, detected_at, acknowledged?), with the M14-6 acknowledgement panel for approvers. *Packaging* — P4 embedded. *Post-release* — P5 embedded (visible once candidate is `released`).

**P3 — Decision Panel** (approver-only; renders inside P2 for `submitted` RCs). Side-by-side: frozen evidence summary vs. acceptance criteria headlines from the cited reports (M13-3). Fixed notice: "Decision records governance evidence only. No deployment or OTA action is performed (FR-C5.4)."

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| decision | radio | 4-value enum FR-C5.3 | — | — | required |
| reason | textarea | 20–4000 chars | — | Evidence-based rationale… | **always required**; <20 chars blocked real-time |
| conditions[] | repeater | text ≤500 each | — | e.g. limited to site A trials | required iff decision=conditionally_approved |
| remediation_items[] | repeater | {kind enum, note} | — | e.g. retraining: regression on glassware | required iff decision=remediation_required; kinds = M15 conversion kinds |
| manifest_seq | hidden | int | current | — | bound at render; stale → 412 reload |

**P4 — Packaging Metadata Editor.** Descriptor cards per package (format icon ONNX/TRT/PTE); "Run packaging workflow" button launches M16-2 (`packaging@vN` template) — results land back as a descriptor authored by SVC-09, rendered read-only with the `wfr-` link. Editing a descriptor of a submitted/decided RC shows the re-review warning banner before save ("This change re-opens governance review — FR-C5.6").

Descriptor dialog input fields:

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| format | select | onnx\|tensorrt_engine\|executorch_pte\|torchscript\|other | — | — | required |
| opset | number | int 7–25 | 19 | — | required iff format=onnx |
| target_hardware | select+free | hardware registry, ≤80 | — | jetson-thor | **required iff format=tensorrt_engine** (red gate, engines non-portable per §0.7.5); recommended otherwise |
| backend | select | tensorrt-10.x\|qnn\|xnnpack\|coreml\|vulkan | — | — | required iff format=executorch_pte |
| quantization.scheme | select | none\|fp16\|int8_ptq\|int8_qat\|int4 | none | — | optional |
| quantization.calibration_set | picker | `dss-` ULID | — | Select calibration snapshot… | required iff scheme=int8_ptq (real-time) |
| toolchain | key-value | tool→semver map | autodetected | onnx: 1.17 | ≥1 entry; semver format |
| input_artifact_ref | picker | `art-` ref | candidate artifact | — | required; must belong to candidate lineage |
| output_artifact.uri + checksum | text ×2 | obj URI + sha256 | — | obj://… / sha256:… | both required together; checksum format validated real-time |
| optimization_steps[] | chips | ≤20 of ≤60 chars | — | fuse_bn, fp16 | optional |

**P5 — Post-Release Evidence Upload** (on released candidate / approved RC page).

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| kind | select | log_bundle\|incident_report\|field_observation | log_bundle | — | required |
| rc_id | picker | approved RCs of candidate | latest approved | — | optional; approved-only list |
| period.from / period.to | date ×2 | RFC 3339 date | — | 2026-05-01 | required iff kind=log_bundle; from ≤ to (real-time) |
| site | text | ≤120 | — | warehouse-7 | optional |
| summary | textarea | ≤2000 | — | What the logs show… | required; sanitized |
| file | uploader | chunked pre-signed PUT | — | Drop log bundle… | required; ≤ tenant max (default 10 GiB); client sha256 → server verify |
| incident_ref | picker | `inc-` (M17-6) | — | Link incident… | optional; resolvable |
| create_failure_records[] | toggle + rows | {title ≤140, category?, severity?} | off | — | when on: ≥1 row, title required; category from 8-enum |

**P6 — Release Status Board (RPT-08).** Table of RCs: status, age-in-status, target class, **missing evidence** chips (from completeness recheck), **approval blockers** (pending quorum n/m, unacknowledged change events, superseded evidence, candidate deprecated), known-limitations excerpt, decision + manifest seq. Filters: status, target class, owner, has_blockers. Row actions deep-link to P2/P3. Binding M14-9.

**Validation logic.** Real-time: field formats, lengths, enum membership, eligible-candidate picker filtering, report approval status (badge flips as M13 events arrive via list refresh), TensorRT target-binding gate, decision-reason minimum. On-submit (server-authoritative): BR-07 completeness, eligibility re-check, manifest binding, matrix evaluation, separation of duties. Error messages name the BR-07 element ("Known limitations is required by BR-07 before submission"). Sanitization: all free text HTML-stripped, rendered as escaped markdown subset; ids validated against `^(mdl|rls|evr|dss|usr|wfr)-[0-9A-HJKMNP-TV-Z]{26}$`; file names normalized; no client value trusted server-side (§1.4.2).

**API bindings & output rendering.** P1→M14-1/M14-4; P2→M14-2/M14-3; P3→M14-5; P4→M14-7 (+M16-2); P5→M14-8; P6→M14-9. Loading: skeleton rows + manifest-tree shimmer; evidence verify shows progress per item. Success: toast "Release candidate submitted — evidence frozen (sha256:ab12…)" / "Decision recorded: conditionally_approved". Empty states: P6 "No release candidates yet — assemble one from an eligible model candidate" with CTA gated on `release.rc:create`; P5 empty "No post-release evidence attached".

**Exception handling.** Network failure: non-destructive retry banner, wizard state kept client-side; uploads resume by part. `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` (403): verbs hidden pre-emptively from M01-3 permission summary; on race, read-only banner "Your role cannot decide release candidates". `E_RATE_LIMITED` (429): toast with `Retry-After` countdown, auto-retry once. `E_VALIDATION` (422): inline field errors from `details[]`. **`E_RC_EVIDENCE_INCOMPLETE` (409): modal checklist enumerating `details.missing[]`, each row a deep link (missing limitations → card editor M12-5; missing approved report → M13-2 launcher; missing rollback → rollback picker).** **`E_RC_FROZEN` (409): dialog "This RC is submitted and its evidence is frozen" offering the two legal paths — governed change (PATCH governed field → re-review) or withdraw.** `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED` (412): reload-merge per §1.4.4. `E_STATE_INVALID`: action menu refresh from `details.allowed_transitions`.

#### 2.14.3 Interface Design

Per §1.4 conventions; module error namespace `E_RC_*`; authz M03-10; audit M03-11; idempotency/ETag per §1.4.4.

**Normative state machine (ReleaseCandidate.status, exact)**

```text
draft ──:submit──▶ submitted ──:decide──▶ approved | rejected | conditionally_approved | remediation_required
(post-submission change to artifact/lineage/target/limitations, from submitted/approved/
 conditionally_approved/remediation_required) ──▶ re_review_required ──:acknowledge-change──▶ submitted
terminal: withdrawn (owner/TA, from any non-terminal state, reason required) · rejected (terminal: a new
 RC must be assembled after remediation — BP-04 step 8) · approved is stable but re-enters review on change
 detection (FR-C5.6); decisions always bind to the manifest seq they reviewed; no OTA side effects on any
 transition (FR-C5.4)
```

**Module error codes**

| Code | HTTP | Raised when |
|---|---|---|
| `E_RC_CANDIDATE_INELIGIBLE` | 422 | Candidate lifecycle ∉ {approved_limited_trial, release_candidate} or M12-4 completeness gate fails (`details.missing[]` passthrough) — FR-C5.1/BR-09 |
| `E_RC_EVIDENCE_INCOMPLETE` | 409 | Submit/acknowledge with BR-07 checklist misses; `details.missing[]` names elements |
| `E_RC_EVIDENCE_NOT_APPROVED` | 422 | Evidence references a draft or superseded evaluation report (BR-08 gate) |
| `E_RC_FROZEN` | 409 | Post-submission mutation outside the governed-change path (non-governed field PATCH, evidence list edit) |
| `E_RC_SELF_APPROVAL` | 403 | Decider = submitter/owner where matrix separation-of-duties applies (default on) |
| `E_RC_DECISION_CONFLICT` | 409 | Same approver, same manifest seq, second decision |
| `E_RC_PACKAGING_TARGET_REQUIRED` | 422 | `tensorrt_engine` descriptor without target_hardware/toolchain (per §0.7.5) |
| `E_RC_LOG_CANDIDATE_NOT_RELEASED` | 422 | Post-release log attach on a candidate not in `released` lifecycle |
| Shared | — | `E_STATE_INVALID`, `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED`, `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_RATE_LIMITED`, `E_IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` per §1.4.3 |

**M14-1 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/release-candidates` · `GET` (same)** — assemble / list.
Permission: `release.rc:create` / `release.rc:read`.
POST body:

```json
{ "model_id": "mdl-...", "name": "acme-vla v7 → warehouse GA",
  "target_deployment_class": "warehouse_humanoid_g2", "target_robot_models": ["humanoid-g2/v4"],
  "intended_use": "...", "known_limitations": "...", "compatibility_notes": "...",
  "rollback_ref": { "kind": "release_candidate", "id": "rls-..." },
  "evidence_report_ids": ["evr-..."], "owner_id": "usr-..." }
```

Processing:

1. Authz `release.rc:create` at `{project_id}`.
2. **Eligibility gate (FR-C5.1, FR-C3.7, BR-09):** service call M12-4 (`depth=immediate`) — candidate must be in-project, lifecycle ∈ `{approved_limited_trial, release_candidate}` (FR-C5.1 "approved or conditionally approved" mapping), and `completeness.eligible_for_release_candidate=true`; else **422 `E_RC_CANDIDATE_INELIGIBLE`** with M12's `missing[]` passed through. Nothing is created on denial.
3. Resolve evidence: every `evr-` via M13-3 — must be `approved`, not superseded, and belong to this candidate → `E_RC_EVIDENCE_NOT_APPROVED`; rollback_ref resolvable (`rls-` approved RC or `released` `mdl-` in family) when supplied; required if a prior released version exists for the target class (else `E_VALIDATION` field error).
4. Denormalize the lineage bundle from M12-4 (training run, snapshot ids+semver+composition, code_ref, artifact_ref+checksum) and pin the current model-card revision (M12-5 head) — the RC holds copies so submission freezing never depends on upstream availability.
5. **Tx:** insert `release.release_candidate` (`status='draft'`) + outbox `release.rc.created` — commit. Audit; **201** `{rc_id, status:"draft", completeness:{ok, missing[]}, etag}`.

GET filters: `status, model_id, model_family, target_deployment_class, owner_id, decision, has_blockers, created_after/before, q, sort`.

**M14-2 `GET /api/v1/release-candidates/{rc_id}` · `PATCH`** — detail / edit.
Permission: `release.rc:read` / `release.rc:update`. GET returns RC + live completeness checklist + manifest head `{seq, content_hash, frozen_at}` + decision history + open change events + `allowed_actions[]` computed for the caller. PATCH (If-Match):
1. `draft` and `re_review_required`: all assembly fields editable (name, target class/models, intended_use, known_limitations, compatibility_notes, rollback_ref, evidence_report_ids, owner_id); evidence list edits re-run step M14-1.3 checks.
2. `submitted | approved | conditionally_approved | remediation_required`: **only the four governed fields** (`target_deployment_class`, `known_limitations`, `rollback_ref`, `evidence_report_ids` — artifact/lineage changes can only arrive from upstream events) and only with `"change_reason"` (≤1000, required). One tx: write new value + insert `release.change_event` (kind=`user_edit`, before/after summary) + status → `re_review_required` + outbox `release.rc.change_detected` (FR-C5.6). Any other field → **409 `E_RC_FROZEN`**.
3. `{"status":"withdrawn","reason":"..."}` is the single status write PATCH accepts (owner or TA, any non-terminal state, reason required) — tx: status + outbox `release.rc.withdrawn`; audit.
4. Terminal states (`withdrawn`, `rejected`): read-only → `E_STATE_INVALID`.

**M14-3 `GET /api/v1/release-candidates/{rc_id}/evidence`** — evidence bundle (FR-C5.2).
Permission: `release.rc:read`. Params: `manifest_seq?` (default latest), `verify=false|true`, `include_urls=true|false`.
Draft RCs: returns the **live preview** — assembled items + the BR-07 checklist `{element, status: ok|missing, detail}`. Submitted+: returns the **frozen manifest**: `{ "manifest": { "seq": 2, "content_hash": "sha256:...", "frozen_at": "...", "frozen_by": "usr-...", "uri": "obj://tenant-evidence/rls-.../manifest-2-ab12.json" }, "items": [ { "kind": "model_artifact", "ref": "art-...", "content_hash": "sha256:...", "source": "M11" }, { "kind": "model_card", "ref": "mdl-...#rev4", "content_hash": "..." }, { "kind": "dataset_lineage", "snapshots": [ {"snapshot_id":"dss-...","semver":"2.1.0","composition":{"real":0.82,"synthetic":0.18}} ] }, { "kind": "evaluation_report", "ref": "evr-...", "content_hash": "...", "frozen_uri": "..." }, { "kind": "packaging_descriptor", "ref": "pkg-..." }, { "kind": "governed_fields", "target_deployment_class": "...", "known_limitations_hash": "...", "rollback_ref": {...} } ], "verification": { "checked_at": "...", "result": "ok|mismatch", "mismatches": [] } }`. `verify=true` re-hashes the stored manifest object and each platform-held item against recorded hashes (slow path; mismatch → ERROR log + integrity alarm, response `result:"mismatch"`). `include_urls=true` adds 15-min signed GET URLs (issuance audited, never logged).

**M14-4 `POST /api/v1/release-candidates/{rc_id}:submit`** — submit for governance review; **freezes evidence**.
Permission: `release.rc:submit` (owner or TA). Body: `{ "submission_note"?: "..." }`
Processing:

1. Authz; load RC `FOR UPDATE`; status must be `draft` (re-entry from `re_review_required` is exclusively via M14-6) → else `E_STATE_INVALID`.
2. **Completeness check (BR-07 fields):** model lineage (run ref + code_ref + artifact ref with checksum), dataset lineage (≥1 snapshot id+semver+composition), evaluation evidence (≥1 approved non-superseded report covering the plan's expected suite; none `failed` — BR-09), owner, intended use, known limitations (non-empty), target deployment class + robot models (FR-C5.2), pinned model-card revision, compatibility notes, rollback ref where applicable, approval-status field initialized. Any miss → **409 `E_RC_EVIDENCE_INCOMPLETE`** with `details.missing[]`; nothing changes.
3. Re-verify upstream facts at submit time: M12-4 eligibility still true (`E_RC_CANDIDATE_INELIGIBLE`), every report still approved/non-superseded via M13 (`E_RC_EVIDENCE_NOT_APPROVED`).
4. **Compute evidence manifest:** canonical JSON (stable field order) listing every item with kind/ref/content_hash — artifact checksum (M11/M12), card revision document hash, dataset lineage document, each report's `content_hash`+`frozen_uri` (M13-5), accepted trial-evidence refs, current packaging descriptors, governed field values; compute `content_hash = sha256(canonical_manifest)`; write to object storage `…/rls-{id}/manifest-{seq}-{hash}.json` (tenant evidence bucket, **write-once prefix**) — object copy before tx, per the M13-5 ordering precedent (§2.13.3); orphan object on tx abort is GC-safe.
5. **Tx (freeze + status + audit in one tx):** insert `release.evidence_manifest` row (`seq=prev+1`, content_hash, uri, items summary) + RC `draft→submitted`, `submitted_by/at`, approval plan pinned from the tenant approval matrix (DA-08; matrix policy hash recorded) + outbox `release.rc.submitted` (audit relay + M20 notification to the approver group) — **commit**.
6. **200** `{status:"submitted", manifest:{seq, content_hash}}`. Idempotency-Key replay returns the same; concurrent submit serialized by row lock; submit on `submitted` → `E_STATE_INVALID`.

**M14-5 `POST /api/v1/release-candidates/{rc_id}:decide`** — record decision (FR-C5.3).
Permission: `release.rc:approve`. Body: `{ "decision": "approved|rejected|conditionally_approved|remediation_required", "reason": "...", "conditions"?: ["..."], "remediation_items"?: [ {"kind":"model_retraining","note":"..."} ], "manifest_seq": 2 }`
Processing:

1. **Authz `release.rc:approve`** at the RC's scope; separation of duties per matrix (default on): decider ≠ submitter ∧ decider ≠ owner → **403 `E_RC_SELF_APPROVAL`**.
2. Load RC `FOR UPDATE`; status must be `submitted` → `E_STATE_INVALID`; `manifest_seq` must equal the current manifest (decision binds to exactly what was reviewed) → stale ⇒ **412 `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED`**.
3. Integrity gate: recompute manifest hash from the stored object; mismatch → `E_INTERNAL` + ERROR `evidence hash mismatch` + integrity alarm; no decision recorded.
4. Field gates: `reason` always required (20–4000); `conditions[]` required iff `conditionally_approved`; `remediation_items[]` required iff `remediation_required` (kinds drawn from the M15 conversion enum) → `E_VALIDATION`.
5. Evaluate the approval matrix (DA-08): rules keyed by `target_deployment_class` define required approver count/personas (default: 1 Governance Approver). Append-only decision; same approver + same manifest twice → **409 `E_RC_DECISION_CONFLICT`**.
6. **Tx (decision row + status + notification outbox in one tx):** insert `release.approval_decision` `{decision, reason, conditions, remediation_items, decided_by, manifest_id, matrix_rule_ref}`; if quorum satisfied → RC status `submitted→{decision}`; else status stays `submitted` with quorum progress; outbox `release.rc.decided` (+ M20 notifications to owner/submitter; on `rejected|remediation_required|conditionally_approved` the payload carries remediation prompts) — **commit**.
7. Audit `release.rc.decided` (reason text in audit only, §2.14.6). **200** `{status, quorum:{satisfied, decisions:n, required:m}}`. **No deployment side effect of any kind occurs on `approved` (FR-C5.4)**; M12 consumes the event as transition evidence for a later, separately governed `released` transition (M12-3). BP-04 step 8: the UI offers converting `remediation_items[]` into M16-5 work requests / M15-1 records; created refs are linked on the RC.

**M14-6 `POST /api/v1/release-candidates/{rc_id}:acknowledge-change`** — re-review acknowledgement (FR-C5.6).
Permission: `release.rc:approve` (reviewer acknowledgement). Body: `{ "change_event_ids": ["chg-..."], "note": "...", "resubmit": true }`
Processing:

1. Authz; status must be `re_review_required` → `E_STATE_INVALID`; the listed events must cover **all** open change events on the RC → `E_VALIDATION` (`details.unacknowledged[]`).
2. Re-run the full M14-4 step 2–3 completeness/eligibility checks against current (changed) evidence → `E_RC_EVIDENCE_INCOMPLETE` / `E_RC_EVIDENCE_NOT_APPROVED` (e.g., a superseding report not yet approved blocks acknowledgement; owner first repairs evidence via M14-2 PATCH while in `re_review_required`).
3. Rebuild + store a new manifest (`seq+1`, same pipeline as M14-4 step 4).
4. **Tx:** mark change events acknowledged `{by, at, note}` + insert new manifest row + status `re_review_required→submitted` + outbox `release.rc.change_acknowledged` — commit.
5. Audit. Prior decisions remain bound to earlier manifest seqs (history immutable); a fresh M14-5 decision on the new manifest is required — FR-C5.6 "reevaluation or reviewer acknowledgement": acknowledgement re-enters review; full re-evaluation is achieved by refreshing evidence (new M13 run/report) before acknowledging. **200** `{status:"submitted", manifest:{seq, content_hash}}`.

**M14-7 `PUT /api/v1/release-candidates/{rc_id}/packaging-metadata`** — packaging/optimization descriptors (FR-C5.5).
Permission: `release.packaging:update` (Model Engineer) or **SVC-09 Packaging Worker service identity** (writes results of M16 `packaging@vN` workflow runs; actor recorded).
Body: `{ "descriptors": [ { "descriptor_id"?: "pkg-...", "format": "onnx|tensorrt_engine|executorch_pte|torchscript|other", "opset"?: 19, "target_hardware": "jetson-thor", "backend"?: "tensorrt-10.x|qnn|xnnpack", "quantization"?: { "scheme": "int8_ptq", "calibration_set": "dss-..." }, "toolchain": { "onnx": "1.17", "tensorrt": "10.4", "executorch": "1.0" }, "input_artifact_ref": "art-...", "output_artifact": { "uri": "obj://...", "checksum": "sha256:..." }, "optimization_steps": ["fuse_bn","fp16"], "workflow_run_ref"?: "wfr-..." } ] }`
Processing: (1) authz; RC non-terminal; If-Match on descriptor-set head. (2) Validate per §0.7.5: `tensorrt_engine` requires `target_hardware` + `toolchain.tensorrt` (engine plans are GPU-generation-specific — target binding mandatory) → **422 `E_RC_PACKAGING_TARGET_REQUIRED`**; `executorch_pte` requires `backend`; every `output_artifact` requires checksum. (3) Descriptors are **append-only versions**: PUT writes a new descriptor-set head, prior rows retained (packaging *steps* history, FR-C5.5). (4) **Tx:** upsert rows + — when RC is `submitted|approved|conditionally_approved|remediation_required` and the change alters the output artifact for the approved target class — insert `release.change_event` (kind=`packaging_changed`) + status → `re_review_required` (FR-C5.6) + outbox `release.rc.packaging_updated` — commit; audit. **200** descriptor set. Packaging *execution* is never this endpoint: the UI launches M16-2; SVC-09 reports back here. M14 records metadata only — no deployment (FR-C5.4).

**M14-8 `POST /api/v1/model-candidates/{model_id}/post-release-logs` · `GET` (same)** — post-release log evidence (FR-C5.7, DA-19).
Permission: `release.post_release_log:create` / `release.rc:read`.
POST body: `{ "kind": "log_bundle|incident_report|field_observation", "rc_id"?: "rls-...", "period": {"from":"2026-05-01","to":"2026-05-31"}, "site"?: "warehouse-7", "summary": "...", "payload_uri": "obj://… (uploaded via single-use pre-signed PUT)", "payload_checksum": "sha256:...", "byte_size": 734003200, "incident_ref"?: "inc-...", "create_failure_records"?: [ { "title": "...", "failure_category"?: "manipulation", "severity"?: "s2", "task_ref"?: "tsk-..." } ] }`
Processing: (1) authz at the candidate's project; (2) candidate lifecycle must be `released` (M12 read) → **422 `E_RC_LOG_CANDIDATE_NOT_RELEASED`**; `rc_id`, when given, must be an `approved` RC of this candidate; (3) verify `payload_checksum` against the uploaded object (`E_VALIDATION` on mismatch); object lives in a write-once evidence prefix — files arrive **only** by governed upload, never by fleet telemetry (DA-19, out-of-scope §4.2); (4) **tx:** insert immutable `release.post_release_log_evidence` row + outbox `release.post_release_log.attached` — commit; (5) post-commit saga (outbox relay, idempotent by `(log_id, item_index)`): for each `create_failure_records[]` item call M15-1 with `source="post_release_log"`, `source_ref={post_release_log_id, item_index}`; returned `fal-` ids written back to `linked_failure_ids` (FR-C5.7 closed-loop link); (6) audit; **201**. GET lists evidence for the candidate with linked failure/incident refs; `include_urls=true` issues 15-min signed GETs.

**M14-9 `GET /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/reports/release-status`** — RPT-08.
Permission: `release.rc:read`. Params: `status?`, `target_deployment_class?`, `owner_id?`, `include=blockers,limitations`, `format=json|csv`.
Response rows: `{ "rc_id", "name", "model_ref": {"model_id","family","version"}, "status", "age_in_status_days", "target_deployment_class", "missing_evidence": ["rollback_ref"], "approval_blockers": [ {"kind":"quorum_pending","detail":"1 of 2 approvals"}, {"kind":"change_unacknowledged","change_event_id":"chg-..."}, {"kind":"evidence_superseded","report_id":"evr-..."} ], "known_limitations_excerpt", "latest_decision": {"decision","decided_at","manifest_seq"} }` + aggregates `{by_status, blocked_count, median_age_to_decision_days}`. Backed by `release.rc_status_mv` (outbox-incremental + 15 min refresh). Approval-blocker rows also feed M17-7 `approval blocker` alert rules → M20 (FR-D4.4).

**Approval matrix evaluation (DA-08, shared logic of M14-4/M14-5).** The tenant policy block `release_approval_matrix` (M02-owned, read-only here) is a rule list `[{ "match": { "target_deployment_class": "warehouse_*" }, "required_approvals": 2, "required_persona": "governance_approver", "separation_of_duties": true, "re_review_on": ["artifact","dataset_lineage","target_deployment_class","known_limitations"] }]`; first-match wins; platform default (no tenant policy) = 1 approval, separation on, re-review on all four governed dimensions (DA-08 default). M14-4 pins the matched rule (`matrix_rule_ref` = policy version hash + rule index) into `approval_plan` at submit, so later policy edits never change an in-flight review; M14-5 evaluates quorum strictly against the pinned plan.

**Events published (outbox, envelope per §1.4.5)**

| Event type | Emitted by | Primary consumers |
|---|---|---|
| `release.rc.created` / `release.rc.withdrawn` | M14-1 / M14-2 | M18, RPT-08 MV |
| `release.rc.submitted` `{manifest_seq, content_hash}` | M14-4 | M20 (approver group), M03 audit relay, RPT-08 MV |
| `release.rc.decided` `{decision, manifest_seq}` | M14-5 | M12 (transition evidence + lineage edge §2.12.4), M20, M15 (remediation prompts), M03-9/RPT-11 |
| `release.rc.change_detected` / `release.rc.change_acknowledged` | detector / M14-6 | M20, RPT-08 blockers, M17-7 approval-blocker alert rules |
| `release.rc.packaging_updated` | M14-7 | M18, RPT-08 MV |
| `release.post_release_log.attached` | M14-8 | M15 saga (failure intake), M17-6 incident linking |

**Events consumed**

| Event type (producer) | M14 reaction |
|---|---|
| `mlops.report.superseded` / `mlops.report.approved` (M13 §2.13.3) | change detector: cited-report drift → `change_event` + `re_review_required`; completeness recheck on drafts |
| `mlops.model.card_updated` (M12-5) | limitations drift on frozen RCs → change event; draft checklist refresh |
| `mlops.model.transitioned` (M12-3) | candidate `deprecated\|rejected` → blocker + change event; `released` → enable M14-8 surface |
| `data.snapshot.deprecated` (M08-7) | dataset-lineage drift → change event (FR-C5.6) |
| `orch.run.succeeded` for `packaging@vN` (M16) | expect SVC-09 write-back; missing descriptor after grace → WARN |

**Cross-module consumption map (M14 as provider):** M12 consumes `release.rc.decided` (transition evidence + `candidate→release_candidate` lineage edge, §2.12.4); M15 consumes post-release failure intakes and remediation prompts; M16 receives packaging workflow launches and remediation work requests; M03-9 access reviews read decision/audit trails (RPT-11); M18 reads release facts.

**Concurrency & idempotency summary:** submit/decide/acknowledge under RC row lock + If-Match; manifests append-only with monotonic seq; decisions append-only deduped by `(rc_id, manifest_id, decided_by)`; descriptor sets versioned; post-release saga idempotent by `(log_id, item_index)`; change detector idempotent by `(rc_id, source_event_id)`; all POSTs accept Idempotency-Key per §1.4.4.

#### 2.14.4 Data Design

PostgreSQL, schema **`release.*`** (single writer M14). Evidence manifests and post-release log payloads live in **object storage, immutable, checksummed** (tenant evidence bucket, write-once prefixes `…/rls-{id}/`, `…/prl-{id}/`); Postgres holds the rows of record + hashes.

| Table | Key columns (abridged) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `release.release_candidate` | `rc_id pk (rls-ulid)`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `model_id (mdl-)`, `model_family`, `model_version`, `name`, `status` (8-state enum §2.14.3), `target_deployment_class`, `target_robot_models text[]`, `intended_use`, `known_limitations`, `compatibility_notes`, `rollback_ref jsonb?`, `evidence_report_ids text[]`, `lineage_bundle jsonb` (denormalized M12-4 copy), `card_revision int`, `current_manifest_id?`, `approval_plan jsonb` (matrix pin + quorum), `owner_id`, `submitted_by/at?`, `withdrawn_reason?`, `etag_version`, timestamps | Idx `(project_id, status)`, `(model_id)`, GIN `(evidence_report_ids)`; unique `(project_id, name)` |
| `release.evidence_manifest` | `manifest_id pk (evm-ulid)`, `rc_id fk`, `seq int`, `content_hash`, `manifest_uri`, `items jsonb` (kind/ref/hash summary), `frozen_by`, `frozen_at` | **Append-only, frozen, content-addressed**; unique `(rc_id, seq)`; UPDATE/DELETE blocked by trigger guard (BR-07/BR-14 evidence) |
| `release.approval_decision` | `decision_id pk (apd-ulid)`, `rc_id fk`, `manifest_id fk`, `decision` (4-enum FR-C5.3), `reason`, `conditions jsonb?`, `remediation_items jsonb?`, `remediation_refs jsonb?` (created wrq-/fal- links), `decided_by`, `persona_at_decision`, `matrix_rule_ref`, `decided_at` | Append-only; unique `(rc_id, manifest_id, decided_by)` |
| `release.packaging_metadata` | `descriptor_id pk (pkg-ulid)`, `rc_id fk`, `set_version int`, `format` enum, `target_hardware`, `backend?`, `quantization jsonb?`, `toolchain jsonb`, `input_artifact_ref`, `output_artifact jsonb` (uri+checksum), `optimization_steps text[]`, `workflow_run_ref?`, `recorded_by` (user or `svc-packaging`), `created_at` | Append-only versions; head = max set_version (FR-C5.5) |
| `release.change_event` | `change_id pk (chg-ulid)`, `rc_id fk`, `kind` (`user_edit\|report_superseded\|card_changed\|candidate_transitioned\|snapshot_deprecated\|packaging_changed`), `source_event_id?`, `before_summary jsonb`, `after_summary jsonb`, `detected_at`, `acknowledged_by/at?`, `ack_note?` | Open events block decisions; backs M14-6 and RPT-08 blockers |
| `release.post_release_log_evidence` | `log_id pk (prl-ulid)`, `tenant_id`, `project_id`, `model_id`, `rc_id?`, `kind`, `period jsonb`, `site?`, `summary`, `payload_uri`, `payload_checksum`, `byte_size`, `incident_ref?`, `linked_failure_ids text[]`, `uploaded_by`, `created_at` | **Immutable rows**; monthly range partitions; GIN `(linked_failure_ids)` (FR-C5.7) |
| `release.rc_status_mv` | keyed `(project_id, rc_id)` | Backs M14-9 / P6 |

**ER relationships:** `release_candidate 1—n evidence_manifest` (seq chain; `current_manifest_id` = head); `release_candidate 1—n approval_decision` with `approval_decision n—1 evidence_manifest` (every decision binds to the manifest it reviewed); `release_candidate 1—n packaging_metadata`, `1—n change_event`; `release_candidate n—1 model_candidate` (cross-schema ref to M12; M12 holds the lineage edge); `post_release_log_evidence n—1 model_candidate`, `n—0..1 release_candidate`, `n—m failure_record` (M15 holds the failure rows; refs both ways by id). Approval matrix is **not** an M14 table: it is the `release_approval_matrix` policy block in tenant settings (M02-2, single-writer M02, DA-08); M14 records `matrix_rule_ref` (policy version hash) on plans/decisions.

**Volumetrics & partitioning:** RCs, manifests, decisions are low-volume (10²–10³/tenant/yr) — plain B-tree, no partitioning. `post_release_log_evidence` is the growth table (continuous field evidence) — **monthly range partitions** per tenant pattern; payloads in object storage only.

**Retention (DA-11):** RCs, manifests, decisions, change events — **never purged for RCs that reached a decision or whose candidate reached `released`** (BR-14 release governance evidence; feeds RPT-11/AC-14). `withdrawn` drafts archivable after tenant window (default 24 months) via SVC-15 → `purged-metadata-retained` (identity, status history, manifest hashes retained; free text dropped).
