Exceptions: job `failed` → red chip with reason + "retry with smaller sample" CTA (`sample_limit` pre-halved); `E_ANA_SCOPE_EMPTY` → empty-scope notice with link back to P1.

**P3 — Distribution Dashboard** (bindings `M18-4` analysis_type=tag_distribution, `M18-5`, `M18-9`; route `/analytics/distributions`). **Tag histograms with drill-down** (bar/treemap per dimension: labels, scenario tags, structured metadata; click bar → asset grid filtered to bucket; breadcrumb drill path), **cluster charts** (per-cluster size/composition from F5 reports), **gap list** panel (top-N deficits from the latest M18-10 report with severity chips and "create scenario request" (M09-6) / "view in atlas" actions). Scope selector (project, snapshot, campaign, cohort). Comparison mode: two scopes side-by-side (e.g., snapshot v3 vs v4 tag distributions).

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| scope | radio + picker | `project \| snapshot_ref (dss-) \| campaign_ref (cmp-) \| cohort_ref (coh-)` | project | — | ref resolvable |
| tag_dimensions | multi-select | label schema fields, tag dimensions (FR-A5.4 enum), structured metadata keys | scenario_tags | "Pick dimensions" | 1–8 dimensions; registered fields only |
| drill_path | breadcrumb | dimension → bucket chain | — | — | max depth 4 |
| compare_scope | picker | second scope (same kinds) | off | — | optional; same dimension set applied |

Bindings: dimension submit → `M18-4 POST` (analysis_type `tag_distribution`, idempotent by params hash so repeated dashboard visits reuse reports) → `M18-5` histogram payload; bar click → drill query (sub-scope job or cached slice); gap list reads the latest M18-10 report; "create scenario request" calls **M09-6 in user context** with the gap ref attached. Exceptions: per the page-wide rules; drill on a bucket the caller cannot fully read shows the restricted-count notice on the drilled grid.

**P4 — Cohort Manager** (binding `M18-8`; route `/analytics/cohorts`). List (name, version, status `draft|saved|materialized`, size, definition kind, last materialization) → detail: **definition** (search spec / lasso provenance / upstream ref), **member manifest** preview (paginated), **versions** timeline (edits create version n+1 — Table 0.3 #29), **materializations** (target refs + status). **Materialize wizard**: target `annotation_tasks (M07-3) | dataset_members (M08-4) | simulation_request (M10-4) | regression_set (M13-10)` + target-specific params (annotation project picker; snapshot draft name; generation objective; regression set name), preflight permission check ("you need `label.project:update` in this project"), confirm → per-target result links.

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| name | text | 3–80 chars | — | "low-light-drawer-failures" | required; unique per project (`E_CONFLICT`) |
| description | textarea | ≤ 2 KB | — | — | optional |
| definition | generated | search spec / lasso / refs | from invoking surface | — | read-only provenance |
| members | generated | asset refs | from selection | — | 1–**500,000** members (`E_ANA_COHORT_TOO_LARGE`) |
| materialize.target | select | 4-value enum | — | — | required in wizard; target params per kind |

Output rendering & flow: save → toast with `coh-` id; version timeline renders v1..n with member-count deltas and "diff members" view; materialize wizard preflight calls M03-7 effective-permissions to render the transitive-permission check *before* submit (fail-fast UX; server re-checks authoritatively); materialization success → result card with deep link (`anp-`/`dss-`/generation request/`rgs-`) and the `analytics.cohort.materialized` audit ref. Exceptions: `E_ANA_COHORT_TOO_LARGE` → size guidance ("split via atlas clusters"); `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` on member add → offending refs listed with lock chips; `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED` on concurrent edit → reload-merge prompt showing the other editor's version note.

**P5 — Coverage Report (RPT-03)** (bindings `M18-9`, `M18-10`; route `/analytics/coverage`). **Dimension switcher** (task / scenario / environment / object / robot / failure_category / composition), stacked real/synthetic/augmented bars per bucket with annotated-fraction overlay, goal markers where campaign goals exist (M04-4), composition donut (BR-03 truth-in-labeling); **"Analyze gaps" button** → M18-10 (202) → gap table (dimension, expected, actual, deficit, evidence, suggested action) with per-row handoff: "Request scenario" (M09-6), "View campaign" (M04-5). Export CSV. Program Manager persona lands here by default.

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| dimension | segmented | 7-value union enum (FR-A7.6 ∪ RPT-03) | task | — | `E_ANA_DIMENSION_UNKNOWN` guard |
| scope_ref | picker | `dss- \| cmp-` or project | project | — | resolvable |
| as_of | date | RFC 3339 | latest | — | ≤ now; historical reads served from summary history |
| gap baselines | multi-check | `campaign_goals \| scenario_plans \| embedding_density` | all | — | ≥ 1 for analyze |

Rendering: rows sort by deficit desc when goals exist; staleness chip when `staleness_s` > 86,400 with "refresh" action (on-demand recompute, 202); empty dimension → "No assets carry this dimension yet — check tagging coverage (M06-8)". Gap handoff buttons disabled without the respective target permission (tooltip names the key).

#### 2.18.3 Interface Design

All endpoints follow §1.4 (envelope, pagination, `Idempotency-Key`, If-Match where applicable). Module error namespace `E_ANA_*`; authz via M03-10; audit via M03-11. M18-7/M18-11 are internal (`/internal/v1`, mTLS).

**Endpoint contract summary (per §1.5 — names/paths exact, no drift)**

| # | Method & path | Permission key | Idempotency / concurrency | Tx boundary |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| M18-1 | `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/search/hybrid` | `analytics.search:execute` | read-only; rate-limited 60/min/user | none (read path + audit append) |
| M18-2 | `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/search/similar` | `analytics.search:execute` | read-only; rate-limited | none |
| M18-3 | `GET .../embedding-spaces` · `POST .../embedding-jobs` · `GET /api/v1/embedding-jobs/{job_id}` | `analytics.search:execute` (read) / `analytics.embedding_job:execute` (POST) | `Idempotency-Key`; duplicate in-flight scope+mode replays existing job | single insert + outbox |
| M18-4 | `POST .../distribution-jobs` · `GET /api/v1/distribution-jobs/{job_id}` | `analytics.distribution:execute` | **idempotent by `params_hash` content-hash** (normative) | single insert + outbox |
| M18-5 | `GET /api/v1/distribution-reports/{report_id}` (+ `/visualization-data`) | `analytics.distribution:execute` | read-only; signed URL re-mintable | none |
| M18-6 | `POST .../visualizations:compute` | `analytics.distribution:execute` | idempotent by params content-hash (cache) | insert job when async |
| M18-7 (i) | `POST /internal/v1/analytics/cluster` | `analytics.cluster:execute` (service) | idempotent by request content-hash, 24 h | none (sync) / job insert |
| M18-8 | `POST .../cohorts` · `GET` · `GET/PATCH /api/v1/cohorts/{id}` · `POST ...:materialize` | `analytics.cohort:create/read/update/materialize` | POST `Idempotency-Key`; PATCH If-Match (version n+1 semantics); materialize idempotent by propagated key | remote-create **before** local link tx (saga, no 2PC per §1.4.4) |
| M18-9 | `GET .../coverage-summaries?dimension=` | `analytics.coverage:read` | read-only (cache + staleness marker) | none |
| M18-10 | `POST .../coverage-gaps:analyze` | `analytics.coverage:read` | idempotent by params content-hash | insert job + outbox |
| M18-11 (i) | `POST /internal/v1/index/upsert` · `.../delete` | `analytics.index:write` (SVC-04 only) | idempotent by `(entry_id, source_event_id)` | vector-store write + mirror row (compensated on partial failure) |

**Normative state machines (exact)**

```text
EmbeddingJob / DistributionJob.status:
  queued ──▶ running ──▶ succeeded | failed        (terminal; no retry-in-place — resubmission creates a new job,
                                                    deduplicated by params content-hash for DistributionJobs)
Cohort.status:
  draft ──save──▶ saved ──:materialize──▶ materialized
  · edits to a saved/materialized cohort create version n+1 (manifest re-frozen per version; Table 0.3 #29)
  · saved|materialized ──PATCH archived──▶ archived (terminal; hidden from pickers, downstream (cohort_id, version) pins remain valid)
  · materialized is sticky (≥1 materialization link exists); later versions start `saved`
EmbeddingSpace.status (supporting): provisioning → ready ⇄ rebuilding → deprecated (queries require `ready`)
```

**Module error codes (`E_ANA_*`)**

| Code | HTTP | Raised when |
|---|---|---|
| `E_ANA_SPACE_NOT_READY` | 409 | Vector query / job against a space not in `ready` (provisioning/rebuilding/deprecated) |
| `E_ANA_EXEMPLAR_NOT_INDEXED` | 422 | Exemplar asset has no embedding entry in the requested space |
| `E_ANA_FILTER_UNINDEXED` | 422 | Filter key not a registered payload field of the space/collection (§0.7.4 #2) |
| `E_ANA_QUERY_AMBIGUOUS` | 422 | `vector_query` present but both/neither of `text`/`exemplar_asset_id` set for the mode |
| `E_ANA_PROJECTION_PARAMS_INVALID` | 422 | Method/param mismatch (e.g., perplexity with umap; k missing for kmeans) |
| `E_ANA_COHORT_TOO_LARGE` | 422 | Member count > 500,000 |
| `E_ANA_MATERIALIZE_TARGET_INVALID` | 422 | Target kind outside the 4-value enum or kind params unresolvable |
| `E_ANA_DIMENSION_UNKNOWN` | 422 | Coverage dimension outside the FR-A7.6/RPT-03 union enum |
| `E_ANA_SCOPE_EMPTY` | 422 | Distribution/visualization scope resolves to zero assets |
| Shared | — | `E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` (503, ANN backend / M08 recheck down), `E_RESTRICTED_DATA`, `E_RATE_LIMITED`, `E_VALIDATION`, `E_STATE_INVALID`, `E_CONFLICT`, `E_IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT`, `E_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` per §1.4.3 |

**M18-1 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/search/hybrid`** — unified hybrid search (mandate #1; fully elaborated).
Permission: `analytics.search:execute`. Callers: users; **M08-1 server-side delegation** (M08 service identity carrying acting-user context headers — authz evaluates the acting user, never the service). Rate limit: 60 queries/min/user (`E_RATE_LIMITED`).

Request:

```json
{ "filters": {
    "asset_types": ["episode", "segment", "synthetic_batch"],
    "campaign_id": "cmp-01J...", "task": "open_drawer", "robot_embodiment": "h1-gen3",
    "environment": "kitchen", "object_class": "drawer", "modalities": ["rgb", "depth", "joint_state"],
    "quality_status": ["accepted", "accepted_with_warnings"], "annotation_status": ["approved"],
    "dataset_membership": "dss-01J...", "scenario_tags": ["low_light"], "synthetic": false,
    "tags": ["teleop"], "created_after": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "created_before": null },
  "vector_query": {
    "mode": "text",
    "text": "robot fumbles the drawer handle in dim light",
    "exemplar_asset_id": null,
    "embedding_space_id": "esp-01J..." },
  "fusion": { "method": "rrf", "rrf_k": 60, "alpha": 0.5 },
  "k": 50,
  "page": { "page_size": 50, "page_token": null } }
```

Constraints: `vector_query.text` ≤ 1024 chars; `mode ∈ {text, exemplar}` (omit `vector_query` entirely for scalar-only); exactly one of `text`/`exemplar_asset_id` per mode (`E_ANA_QUERY_AMBIGUOUS`); `fusion.method ∈ {rrf, weighted}`, `alpha ∈ [0.0, 1.0]` default 0.5 (weighted only), `rrf_k` default 60; `k ∈ [1, 500]` default 50; filter keys validated against the space's registered payload schema.

Response `200`:

```json
{ "items": [ {
    "asset_ref": "epi-01J...", "asset_type": "episode", "name": "h1g3-kitchen-0412",
    "scalar_score": 0.81, "vector_score": 0.74, "fused_score": 0.0312, "rank": 1,
    "governance": { "flags": { "restricted": null, "deprecated": null, "superseded_by": null },
                    "quality_status": "accepted", "annotation_status": "approved", "synthetic": false },
    "matched": { "filters": ["task", "environment", "scenario_tags"], "modality_hit": "video/cam_head" },
    "thumbnail_ref": "sthumb:epi-01J.../0", "detail_ref": "/api/v1/assets/epi-01J..." } ],
  "next_page_token": null, "total_size": 132,
  "strategy": { "plan": "filtered_ann", "selectivity_estimate": 0.034, "candidate_count": 41210,
                "overfetch_k": 150, "fusion": "rrf" },
  "embedding_space_id": "esp-01J...", "index_freshness_at": "2026-06-11T08:01:40Z",
  "restricted_excluded_count": 3 }
```

Processing (numbered; tx-free read path):

1. **Authz:** M03-10 `analytics.search:execute` at `{project_id}`; tenant suspension gate (`E_TENANT_SUSPENDED`).
2. **Parse & validate filters:** closed facet set ∪ registered payload fields of the target space (`E_ANA_FILTER_UNINDEXED`); `vector_query` shape (`E_ANA_QUERY_AMBIGUOUS`, `E_VALIDATION` with field paths); space must be `ready` (`E_ANA_SPACE_NOT_READY`). Scalar-only requests short-circuit to step 7 ranking by scalar relevance only.
3. **Resolve query vector:** `mode=text` → encode via the space's registered text encoder (SVC-04 inference endpoint, model+version pinned to the space); `mode=exemplar` → look up `emb-{exemplar_asset_id}:{model}:{version}` (`E_ANA_EXEMPLAR_NOT_INDEXED`).
4. **Selectivity estimate:** estimate filter cardinality from payload-index statistics (per-facet value counts, maintained by SVC-04).
5. **Strategy choice (per §0.7.4 #1/#2):** `selectivity < s_low` (default 0.001, ≤ ~10k candidates) → **pre-filter + exact scan** (brute-force cosine over surviving rows — IVF-PQ path on archival tiers); `selectivity > s_high` (default 0.10) → **filtered-ANN** (filterable-HNSW traversal with payload conditions pushed down); in between → **iterative filtering** (ANN iterator + per-hit scalar check until k filled, bounded by `max_scan_tuples` 20,000 guardrail so filtered top-K is never silently underfilled — §0.7.4 #4).
6. **ANN query:** execute with overfetch `k' = min(3k, 1500)` to survive governance filtering; collect `vector_score` (cosine similarity, normalized [0,1]).
7. **Fusion:** scalar relevance = BM25/tsvector score over text fields (name, instruction text, captions, tag labels) when `filters` carry textual intent, else binary filter-match; `method=rrf` → `fused = Σ 1/(rrf_k + rank_i)` over both rank lists (robust to incomparable scales, §0.7.4 #3); `method=weighted` → `fused = alpha·norm(vector) + (1−alpha)·norm(scalar)` (min-max normalized per result set).
8. **M08 governance recheck (DA-15/§1.6.2):** batch envelope check of the fused id list against M08 read-model (project scope, restriction visibility, deprecation flags): restricted-without-grant → **dropped, counted** in `restricted_excluded_count` (deny-wins; no redacted stubs in M18 — stubs are an M08-1 catalog behavior); purged/unknown ids dropped with WARN (index lag). M08 recheck unavailable → `E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` (fail closed; never serve unchecked vector results).
9. **Audit access:** emit `analytics.search.executed` (filter summary + `query_hash`, result_count, space_id — §2.18.6); INFO log with `latency_ms`.
10. **Respond** page 1..k with scores, strategy block, freshness marker.

**M18-2 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/search/similar`** — similar-asset search by exemplar.
Permission: `analytics.search:execute`. Body: `{ "exemplar": { "asset_id": "epi-01J...", "segment_id": "seg-..."?, "frame_ts": "..."? }, "embedding_space_id": "esp-...", "k": 50, "guard_filters": { ...same filter schema... }?, "exclude_same_recording": true }`. Constraints as M18-1 (`k` 1–500 default 50). Processing = M18-1 steps 1–6 with vector-only ranking (no fusion; `guard_filters` applied as pre/filtered-ANN per selectivity), + governance recheck + audit. Granularity: episode-level entries by default; `segment_id`/`frame_ts` select the clip/frame-level entry where the space indexes that granularity (`E_ANA_EXEMPLAR_NOT_INDEXED` otherwise). Exemplar must be readable by the caller (restricted exemplar without grant → `E_RESTRICTED_DATA`; the read is audited). Response `200`:

```json
{ "items": [ { "asset_ref": "epi-01J...", "asset_type": "episode", "vector_score": 0.91, "rank": 1,
    "governance": { "flags": {...}, "quality_status": "accepted", "synthetic": false },
    "same_recording": false, "detail_ref": "/api/v1/assets/epi-01J..." } ],
  "next_page_token": null, "total_size": 50,
  "exemplar_entry_id": "emb-epi-01J...:cosmos-embed1:2.1",
  "strategy": { "plan": "filtered_ann", "selectivity_estimate": 0.42 },
  "index_freshness_at": "...", "restricted_excluded_count": 0 }
```

**M18-3 `GET /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/embedding-spaces` · `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/embedding-jobs` · `GET /api/v1/embedding-jobs/{job_id}`** — spaces & (re)index jobs.
Permissions: read `analytics.search:execute`; job create `analytics.embedding_job:execute`.
GET spaces → `{"items": [{"embedding_space_id": "esp-01J...", "name": "clip-video-text-v2", "modalities": ["video", "text"], "model": {"name": "cosmos-embed1", "version": "2.1"}, "dim": 1024, "metric": "cosine", "index_tier": "hnsw_hot", "payload_fields": ["task", "environment", "robot_embodiment", "quality_status", "annotation_status", "scenario_tags", "synthetic", "campaign_id", "dataset_membership"], "entry_count": 1840233, "status": "ready", "default": true}]}`. Spaces are tenant-curated (TA/PA register; payload fields **must be declared before bulk ingest** — §0.7.4 #2; adding a field triggers `rebuilding`).
POST embedding-jobs body: `{ "embedding_space_id": "esp-...", "scope": { "kind": "filters|cohort_ref|snapshot_ref|full_space", "ref": "coh-..."? , "filters": {...}? }, "mode": "index_missing|reindex_all|re_embed_new_model_version", "model_version_override": "2.2"? }`.
Processing: 1. authz; space exists and is not `deprecated`; `re_embed_new_model_version` requires TA-level `analytics.embedding_job:execute` at tenant scope (changes space semantics; creates new entry versions per Table 0.3 #30 identity `emb-{asset_id}:{model}:{version}`); 2. estimate workload from scope (entry-count delta); **Tx:** insert `analytics.embedding_job` (`ebj-{ulid}`, status `queued`, params snapshot) + outbox → M16 workflow (executor SVC-04; M17 admission applies, `E_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` surfaced on the job) — commit; 3. **202** (§1.4.5):

```json
{ "embedding_job_id": "ebj-01J...", "status": "queued", "embedding_space_id": "esp-01J...",
  "mode": "index_missing", "estimated_assets": 18400, "workflow_run_ref": "wfr-01J...",
  "poll_ref": "/api/v1/embedding-jobs/ebj-01J..." }
```

GET job → status, counts `{embedded, skipped, failed}`, started/finished timestamps, error summary. State machine queued→running→succeeded|failed (exact). Idempotency: `Idempotency-Key` per §1.4.4; identical in-flight scope+mode returns the existing job (`E_CONFLICT` avoided by replay semantics). **Space administration:** spaces are provisioned and re-tiered through tenant administration (TA, platform-release-managed encoder registry — DA-13 analogy); M18-3 GET is the read surface; no public space-mutation endpoint exists in v1 (§1.5 is exhaustive — no path drift).

**M18-4 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/distribution-jobs` · `GET /api/v1/distribution-jobs/{job_id}`** — distribution computation (mandate #3).
Permission: `analytics.distribution:execute`.
Request:

```json
{ "analysis_type": "embedding_distribution",
  "scope": { "kind": "cohort_ref", "ref": "coh-01J...", "cohort_version": 3 },
  "tag_dimensions": null,
  "embedding": { "embedding_space_id": "esp-01J...",
    "projection": { "method": "umap", "n_neighbors": 15, "min_dist": 0.1 },
    "clustering": { "algorithm": "hdbscan", "min_cluster_size": 25 },
    "sample_limit": 100000 } }
```

`analysis_type ∈ {tag_distribution, embedding_distribution}`; tag jobs require `tag_dimensions[]` (label/tag/metadata field list); embedding jobs require the `embedding` block; `projection.method ∈ {umap, tsne}` with the P2 param ranges (`E_ANA_PROJECTION_PARAMS_INVALID`); scope kinds `filters | cohort_ref | snapshot_ref | campaign_ref`, must resolve non-empty (`E_ANA_SCOPE_EMPTY`).
Processing: 1. authz; validate; resolve scope to a member watermark (cohort version manifest hash / snapshot manifest hash / filter-result watermark). 2. **Idempotency by params content-hash (normative):** `params_hash = sha256(canonical_json(analysis_type, scope_watermark, dimensions/embedding params))`; an existing job with the same hash in `queued|running|succeeded` is returned as-is (`200`, `Idempotency-Replayed: true` semantics) instead of recomputing. 3. **Tx:** insert `analytics.distribution_job` (`dst-{ulid}`, status `queued`) + outbox → M16 workflow (executor **SVC-05**, admission via M17) — commit. 4. **202** `{"distribution_job_id": "dst-01J...", "status": "queued", "workflow_run_ref": "wfr-...", "params_hash": "sha256:..."}`. SVC-05 computes (histograms / UMAP-or-tSNE projection + HDBSCAN-or-k-means clustering; cuML GPU path > 1M items per §0.7.4 #9), writes the report payload to object storage, flips status `succeeded` and creates the Distribution Report (**`report_id == job_id`**, 1:1 — Table 0.3 #31 shares the `dst-` identity). Failures flip `failed` with reason; jobs are never mutated after terminal state.

**M18-5 `GET /api/v1/distribution-reports/{report_id}` · `GET /api/v1/distribution-reports/{report_id}/visualization-data`** — report + render payloads.
Permission: `analytics.distribution:execute` (read facet of the same capability; report scope re-authorized at the originating project).
Report → `{"report_id": "dst-01J...", "analysis_type": "embedding_distribution", "scope": {...}, "summary": {"n_assets": 48211, "n_clusters": 14, "noise_count": 1023, "noise_fraction": 0.021, "silhouette": 0.41, "top_clusters": [{"cluster_id": 0, "size": 9120, "label_suggestion": "kitchen/open_drawer/low_light", "dominant_tags": {...}}]}, "edge_case_candidates": {"kind": "hdbscan_noise", "cohort_seed_ref": "available"}, "computed_at": "...", "params_hash": "..."}` — noise points exposed as edge-case candidates (§0.7.4 #9) with one-click cohort seeding.
visualization-data → `{"payload_url": "https://...signed...", "expires_at": "...(≤600 s)", "format": "arrow_ipc|json", "layers": ["points", "cluster_assignments", "density_grid", "histograms"], "point_schema": ["asset_ref", "x", "y", "cluster_id", "is_noise"]}` — render-ready points/clusters/density served from object storage via short-lived signed URL (payloads up to hundreds of MB never proxied through the API tier). Asset refs inside payloads are governance-rechecked at *report read* time: ids the caller lost access to since computation are tombstoned in a `revoked_refs` sidecar (deny-wins at render).

**M18-6 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/visualizations:compute`** — trajectory / heatmap / temporal aggregates (mandate #2).
Permission: `analytics.distribution:execute`.
Body: `{ "scope": { "kind": "episode_ids|cohort_ref", "episode_ids": ["epi-..."]?, "ref": "coh-..."? }, "types": ["trajectory_overlay", "sensor_heatmap", "temporal_sequence"], "params": { "trajectory_overlay": { "frame": "end_effector|joint", "joint_selector": ["arm_l.*"]?, "space": "world|robot_base", "decimation_epsilon_m": 0.005 }, "sensor_heatmap": { "source": "tactile|force|joint_utilization", "grid": [32, 32], "aggregate": "mean|max|dwell" }, "temporal_sequence": { "series": ["joint_pos/arm_l_j3", "ee_force_z", "gripper_state"], "downsample": "lttb", "max_points": 4000 } } }`.
Processing: 1. authz; scope ≤ 200 episodes resolves synchronously when cached, else and always for cohorts → **202 + job resource** (same SVC-05 machinery, idempotent by params content-hash); per-episode restriction recheck — restricted episodes excluded with count (deny-wins). 2. SVC-05 reads episode step stores (M06 canonical episodes, DA-04) and computes: decimated end-effector/joint polylines with time index (trajectory), grid matrices (tactile/force/joint-utilization heatmaps), LTTB-downsampled multi-series (temporal). 3. Response/job result: `{"aggregates": [{"type": "trajectory_overlay", "episode_ref": "epi-...", "payload_url": "signed...", "expires_at": "..."}], "excluded_restricted_count": n}`. **Boundary (§1.6.4):** M18 computes these render-ready aggregates; M19 (and M18's own P1–P3 previews) render them — synchronized *playback* is exclusively M19.

**M18-7 (i) `POST /internal/v1/analytics/cluster`** — generic clustering service (FR-C6.3; consumed by M15-5).
mTLS service identities only (M15 service identity in v1); permission `analytics.cluster:execute` (service-scoped). Body:

```json
{ "caller": { "module": "m15", "purpose": "failure_clustering", "project_id": "prj-..." },
  "method": "attributes|embedding",
  "items": [ { "id": "fal-01J...", "attributes": { "task": "open_drawer", "object": "drawer",
               "action_phase": "grasp", "scenario": "kitchen/low_light", "model_output": "timeout" },
               "embedding_ref": { "asset_id": "epi-...", "embedding_space_id": "esp-..." }? } ],
  "algorithm": "hdbscan|kmeans", "params": { "min_cluster_size": 5, "k": null },
  "response_mode": "sync_if_small" }
```

Processing: 1. service authz; ≤ 5,000 items → synchronous; larger → `202` with a `dst-` job (analysis_type `cluster`). 2. `method=attributes` → one-hot/frequency encoding of the categorical attribute vectors (FR-C6.3 shared-attribute clustering: task, object, action phase, scenario, model output); `method=embedding` → resolve `emb-` entries from the referenced space (`E_ANA_EXEMPLAR_NOT_INDEXED` per missing item, reported in `skipped[]`). 3. Cluster; respond `{"clusters": [{"cluster_key": 0, "member_ids": ["fal-..."], "centroid_summary": {...}, "cohesion": 0.71}], "noise_ids": [...], "skipped": [...], "algorithm": "hdbscan", "params_effective": {...}}`. Stateless for the caller: M15 owns the resulting Failure Cluster rows (§1.6.5); M18 retains only the job record. Idempotent by request content-hash within 24 h.

**M18-8 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/cohorts` · `GET` (same) · `GET/PATCH /api/v1/cohorts/{cohort_id}` · `POST /api/v1/cohorts/{cohort_id}:materialize`** — cohorts (FR-A7.4).
Permissions: create `analytics.cohort:create`; read `analytics.cohort:read`; PATCH `analytics.cohort:update`; materialize `analytics.cohort:materialize` **+ transitive target-module create permission in the acting user's context** (deny in target ⇒ materialization denied, BR-13 — mirrors M15-4).
POST body: `{ "name": "low-light-drawer-failures", "description": "...", "definition": { "kind": "search_spec|lasso_selection|upstream_ref", "search_spec": {M18-1 request snapshot}?, "lasso": { "distribution_report_ref": "dst-...", "point_count": 412 }?, "upstream_ref": { "type": "failure_cluster|saved_view", "ref": "..." }? }, "member_refs": ["epi-...", "seg-..."], "status": "draft|saved" }`.
Processing (POST): 1. authz; validate members exist in-project, count ≤ 500,000 (`E_ANA_COHORT_TOO_LARGE`); members the caller cannot read are rejected (`E_RESTRICTED_DATA` listing offending refs — a user cannot smuggle restricted assets into a cohort). 2. **Tx:** insert `analytics.cohort` v1 (+ member manifest to object storage, content-addressed; ≤ 10k members also mirrored relationally) + outbox `analytics.cohort.created` — commit; **201**. Callers include P1/P2 surfaces, M15-4 (`data_mining` conversion seeds a cohort from failure attributes), and M19-7 saved-view handoff.
PATCH (name/description/members/definition; If-Match): edits to `saved|materialized` cohorts **create version n+1** (Table 0.3 #29; prior manifests immutable — downstream refs pin `(cohort_id, version)` as M07-3 does); `draft` edits in place. DELETE not offered (cohorts are referenced by tasks/snapshots; deprecation via the `archived` terminal state (PATCH; see machine above).
`:materialize` body: `{ "target": "annotation_tasks|dataset_members|simulation_request|regression_set", "cohort_version": 3, "params": { "annotation_project_id": "anp-..."? , "snapshot_name": "..."?, "generation_objective": "..."?, "regression_set_name": "..."? } }`.
Processing: 1. authz incl. transitive check (M03-10 batch: `analytics.cohort:materialize` + the target key — `label.project:update` / `data.snapshot:create` / `sim.generation:create` / `mlops.regression_set:create`). 2. Validate target (`E_ANA_MATERIALIZE_TARGET_INVALID`); pin `cohort_version` (default latest saved). 3. **Call target module first, in user context, idempotent by propagated `Idempotency-Key`:** M07-3 (`{source: {cohort_ref, cohort_version}}`) / M08-4 (draft with cohort member source) / M10-4 (generation request citing the cohort as gap evidence) / M13-10 (regression set from cohort members). Remote failure → no local write; retry-safe. 4. **Tx:** insert `analytics.cohort_materialization` link `{target_kind, target_ref, cohort_version, actor}`; status → `materialized`; outbox — commit. 5. Audit **`analytics.cohort.materialized`**; **201** `{"materialization_id": "...", "target_ref": "anp-.../dss-.../gnr-.../rgs-..."}`.

**M18-9 `GET /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/coverage-summaries?dimension=&scope_ref=&as_of=`** — coverage (FR-A7.6, RPT-03).
Permission: `analytics.coverage:read`.
`dimension ∈ {task, scenario, environment, object, robot, failure_category, composition}` (union of FR-A7.6 + RPT-03 lists; `E_ANA_DIMENSION_UNKNOWN`); `scope_ref` optional (`dss-` snapshot, `cmp-` campaign; default whole project). Response: `{"dimension": "task", "scope": {...}, "rows": [{"bucket": "open_drawer", "episode_count": 1812, "hours": 41.2, "real_count": 1500, "synthetic_count": 290, "augmented_count": 22, "annotated_fraction": 0.84, "eval_failure_count": 17, "goal": {"source": "cmp-01J...", "target": 2500, "deficit": 688}}], "composition_totals": {"real": 0.79, "synthetic": 0.19, "augmented": 0.02}, "computed_at": "...", "staleness_s": 240}`. Served from the `analytics.coverage_summary` cache (nightly + event-driven recompute; on-demand refresh when stale > 24 h). This endpoint **is** RPT-03 (§1.7.3) and feeds M04-5 goals-vs-actuals.

**M18-10 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/coverage-gaps:analyze`** — gap analysis.
Permission: `analytics.coverage:read` (analysis) — handoff actions re-check target permissions.
Body: `{ "baselines": ["campaign_goals", "scenario_plans", "embedding_density"], "dimensions": ["task", "environment", "failure_category"], "scope_ref": "dss-..."?, "campaign_id": "cmp-..."? }`.
Processing: 1. authz; ≥ 1 baseline (`E_VALIDATION`); 2. **202** + `dst-` job (analysis_type `gap_analysis`, idempotent by params hash); SVC-05 joins coverage actuals against M04-4 goals and M09 scenario-collection plans, and merges embedding-space findings (sparse HDBSCAN clusters + noise density from the latest embedding_distribution reports — underrepresented-scenario discovery per §0.7.4 #9); 3. report (via M18-5 with the returned `report_id`):

```json
{ "report_id": "dst-01J...", "analysis_type": "gap_analysis",
  "gaps": [ { "gap_id": "dst-01J...#g1", "dimension": "environment", "bucket": "kitchen/low_light",
      "baseline": "campaign_goals", "expected": 2500, "actual": 1812, "deficit": 688, "severity": "high",
      "evidence": [ {"kind": "coverage_row", "ref": "cvs-..."}, {"kind": "noise_cluster", "ref": "dst-...#noise"} ],
      "suggested_action": "simulate" } ],
  "baselines_used": ["campaign_goals", "scenario_plans", "embedding_density"], "computed_at": "..." }
```

4. Per-row handoffs (UI P5/P3): "Request scenario" calls **M09-6 in the acting user's context** with the gap ref attached (`source: {kind: "coverage_gap", ref: "dst-...#g1"}` — §1.5 "feeds M04-5, M09-6"; BP-02 step 1; M09 validates the gap ref per its M09-4/M09-6 link rules); campaign views deep-link M04-5, which reads the same rows for goals-vs-actuals. Audit `analytics.coverage.gap_analyzed` `{baselines, gap_count, handoffs}`.

**M18-11 (i) `POST /internal/v1/index/upsert` · `POST /internal/v1/index/delete`** — index maintenance (SVC-04 only).
mTLS; permission `analytics.index:write` (service-scoped, SVC-04 SAN allowlist).
Upsert body: `{ "entries": [ { "entry_id": "emb-epi-01J...:cosmos-embed1:2.1", "embedding_space_id": "esp-...", "asset_ref": "epi-01J...", "granularity": "episode|segment|frame", "vector": [/* dim floats */]?, "vector_ref": "obj://..."?, "payload": { "tenant_id": "tnt-...", "project_id": "prj-...", "task": "open_drawer", "quality_status": "accepted", "annotation_status": "approved", "scenario_tags": ["low_light"], "synthetic": false, "restricted": false, "campaign_id": "cmp-...", "dataset_membership": ["dss-..."] }, "payload_only": false, "source_event_id": "01J..." } ] }`.
Processing: 1. service authz; payload keys validated against the space schema (`E_ANA_FILTER_UNINDEXED` — unregistered keys rejected, never silently dropped); 2. idempotent upsert by `(entry_id, source_event_id)` — at-least-once event delivery tolerated (§1.4.4 outbox consumers); `payload_only=true` updates scalar payload without touching the vector (the high-frequency path: tag edits M06-8, governance-flag changes M08-3 — **flag changes must be queryable ≤ 60 s** per M08 §2.8.3 contract); 3. vector store upsert + `analytics.embedding_entry` mirror row; facet statistics incrementally updated. Delete body: `{ "entries": [{"entry_id": "..."}], "reason": "asset_purged|superseded_version|space_rebuild" }` — hard delete from index + tombstone in mirror (retention DA-11: purged assets leave no queryable vector). Responses report per-entry `{upserted|skipped_duplicate|rejected}`.

**Domain events (outbox, §1.4.5 envelope)**

| Event | Producer | Consumers |
|---|---|---|
| `analytics.embedding_job.completed` `{space_id, counts}` | SVC-04 | space freshness, M20 (requester) |
| `analytics.distribution_job.completed` `{report_id, analysis_type}` | SVC-05 | P2/P3 hydration, M20 |
| `analytics.cohort.created` / `analytics.cohort.version_created` | M18-8 | M19 (view linking), audit |
| `analytics.cohort.materialized` `{target_kind, target_ref}` | M18-8 | M07/M08/M10/M13 reconciliation, RPT-09 joins |
| `analytics.coverage.recomputed` `{dimensions, scope}` | SVC-05 | M04-5 cache, M09-7 |

**Cross-module consumption map (M18 as provider):** M08-1 delegates semantic clauses to M18-1 and re-checks governance (DA-15); M04-5 reads M18-9/M18-10 for goals-vs-actuals; M09-6 receives gap-derived scenario requests; M15-5 calls M18-7; M07-3/M08-4/M10-4/M13-10 receive materializations; M19 embeds M18-5/M18-6 payloads and hands saved views to M18-8.

#### 2.18.4 Data Design

**Storage (per §0.7.4):** a **dedicated vector store with scalar payload filtering** (filterable-HNSW collections, one per embedding space; payload/scalar indexes declared at collection creation **before** bulk ingest — #2; tiered index policy per space: `hnsw_hot` in-RAM ≤ ~100M vectors, `diskann_cold` NVMe-resident for full-corpus archival search, `ivf_pq_archive` for heavily filtered archival — #6) + a **metadata mirror in PostgreSQL schema `analytics.*`** (jobs, cohorts, spaces, entry registry, coverage cache — the relational system of record for everything except the vectors themselves); **report and visualization payloads in object storage** (`analytics-reports/` zone, content-addressed, served by short-lived signed URLs). Everything in M18 is a **rebuildable projection**: a full rebuild from source modules (M18-11 replay) must converge to the same state — no business truth lives only here.

**Entities (ER-style).**

`analytics.embedding_space` — `esp-{ulid}`
| Attribute | Type | Constraints |
|---|---|---|
| embedding_space_id | text PK | `esp-{ulid}` |
| tenant_id / project_id | text | project NULL ⇒ tenant-shared space |
| name / description | text | unique per tenant |
| modalities | text[] | e.g. {video, text}, {trajectory} |
| model_name / model_version | text / text | pinned encoder identity (registered job type) |
| dim / metric | int / enum(cosine, dot, l2) | immutable after creation |
| index_tier | enum(hnsw_hot, diskann_cold, ivf_pq_archive) | policy-selected by size/SLA, re-tierable |
| payload_fields | jsonb | registered filterable fields + types (§0.7.4 #2) |
| status / is_default | enum(provisioning, ready, rebuilding, deprecated) / bool | queries require `ready` |
| version / created_at / updated_at | int / timestamptz | optimistic locking |

`analytics.embedding_entry` — mirror of vector-store rows (Table 0.3 #30)
| Attribute | Type | Constraints |
|---|---|---|
| entry_id | text PK | **`emb-{asset_id}:{model}:{version}`** (identity rule Table 0.3) |
| embedding_space_id | text FK | partitioned **LIST by space** |
| asset_ref / asset_type / granularity | text / enum / enum(episode, segment, frame, recording, synthetic_batch, failure_evidence) | indexed `(space, asset_ref)` |
| vector_ref | text | object-storage ref (vectors live in the vector store; ref kept for rebuilds) |
| payload_snapshot | jsonb | last-synced scalar payload (drift detection) |
| indexed_at / source_event_id / tombstoned_at | timestamptz / text / timestamptz? | idempotency + delete audit |

`analytics.embedding_job` — state `queued → running → succeeded | failed` (exact)
| Attribute | Type | Constraints |
|---|---|---|
| embedding_job_id | text PK | `ebj-{ulid}` |
| tenant_id / project_id / embedding_space_id | text | FKs; idx (space, status) |
| scope / mode | jsonb / enum(index_missing, reindex_all, re_embed_new_model_version) | params snapshot frozen at submit |
| status | enum(queued, running, succeeded, failed) | terminal rows immutable |
| counts | jsonb | `{embedded, skipped, failed}` updated by SVC-04 heartbeats |
| workflow_run_ref / error_summary | text / text | M16 run (`wfr-`); failure reason |
| requested_by / created_at / started_at / finished_at | text / timestamptz ×3 | — |

`analytics.distribution_job` — state `queued → running → succeeded | failed` (exact); **partitioned by month** (`created_at`)
| Attribute | Type | Constraints |
|---|---|---|
| distribution_job_id | text PK | `dst-{ulid}` |
| tenant_id / project_id | text | idx (project, analysis_type, status) |
| analysis_type | enum(tag_distribution, embedding_distribution, cluster, visualization, gap_analysis) | `cluster` = M18-7 async; `visualization` = M18-6 async; `gap_analysis` = M18-10 |
| scope / scope_watermark | jsonb / text | cohort version manifest hash / snapshot manifest hash / filter-result watermark |
| params / **params_hash** | jsonb / text | **unique index per partition window** — content-hash idempotency (normative) |
| status / workflow_run_ref / error_summary | enum / text / text | — |
| requested_by / created_at / started_at / finished_at | text / timestamptz ×3 | — |

`analytics.distribution_report` — 1:1 with succeeded jobs
| Attribute | Type | Constraints |
|---|---|---|
| report_id | text PK | **== job_id** (`dst-`; Table 0.3 #31 shared identity) |
| summary | jsonb | counts, cluster cards, histogram heads, silhouette/noise stats |
| payload_ref / payload_bytes / payload_checksum | text / bigint / text | object storage (points/clusters/density/histograms; Arrow IPC or JSON) |
| edge_case_candidates | jsonb | HDBSCAN noise refs + seed-cohort affordance (§0.7.4 #9) |
| revoked_refs | jsonb | post-hoc governance tombstones applied at read (deny-wins) |
| computed_at / expires_at | timestamptz | retention DA-11 (180 d hot) |

`analytics.cohort` — Table 0.3 #29
| Attribute | Type | Constraints |
|---|---|---|
| cohort_id + version | text + int PK composite | `coh-{ulid}`; v1.. monotonic; **versions immutable once saved** |
| tenant_id / project_id / name / description | text | name unique per project (latest version) |
| status | enum(draft, saved, materialized, archived) | exact machine §2.18.3 |
| definition | jsonb | search_spec / lasso provenance (report ref + point ids) / upstream_ref |
| member_manifest_ref / member_count | text / int | content-addressed manifest in object storage; ≤10k also in `analytics.cohort_member` rows |
| created_by / created_at | text / timestamptz | — |

`analytics.cohort_materialization` — `mat-{ulid}`, cohort_id+version FK, target_kind (4-enum), target_ref, work refs, actor, created_at; unique `(cohort_id, version, target_kind, target_ref)`. `analytics.coverage_summary` — `cvs-{ulid}` cache rows `(project_id, dimension, scope_ref, bucket)` unique, measure columns (episode_count, hours, real/synthetic/augmented counts, annotated_fraction, eval_failure_count), goal jsonb, computed_at — supporting value object (§0.3), rebuilt not migrated. `analytics.visualization_aggregate` — cache keyed `params_hash` unique (scope watermark + type + params), payload_ref, computed_at, hit_count.

**Processing logic.**
- **Index ingestion (SVC-04 → M18-11):** consumes outbox events (`data.episode.*`, `data.segment.changed`, `data.episode.tags_changed`, `data.governance_flag.updated`, `data.snapshot.published`, `sim.batch.*`, `eval.report.*`, `failure.record.*`); new/changed content → embed (encoder inference) + upsert; metadata-only changes → `payload_only` upsert; purge/deprecation events → delete. At-least-once, idempotent by `(entry_id, source_event_id)`.
- **Re-embed jobs:** model version bump creates new entries under the new `{model}:{version}` identity; the space serves the pinned version until cutover (`rebuilding` → atomic alias switch → old entries deleted by a sweep), so queries never mix incompatible vectors.
- **Projection caching:** distribution/visualization results cached **keyed by `(scope-watermark, space, method, params)` content-hash**; cohort edits change the watermark and naturally invalidate; cache hits return prior `dst-` reports instantly (P2 hydration).
- **Coverage recompute:** nightly full recompute per project + incremental event-driven updates (snapshot publish, tag change, failure create); `staleness_s` exposed on M18-9.
- **Facet statistics:** per-space payload-value cardinality sketches maintained on upsert; drive the M18-1 selectivity estimator (step 4).
- **Retention (DA-11):** embedding entries live while the source asset lives (delete on purge — no orphan vectors); distribution jobs/reports 180 days then payload archival to cold storage (metadata row retained `purged-metadata-retained`); visualization cache LRU 30 days; cohorts and materialization links retained indefinitely while referenced (annotation projects/snapshots/regression sets pin them), archivable otherwise; coverage cache rebuilt, never archived.

#### 2.18.5 Permission Design

| Permission key | PA | TA | OE | RD | Personas / notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `analytics.search:execute` (M18-1/2, space reads M18-3) | ✓ | ✓ (tenant) | — | ✓ (assigned projects) | all engineering personas; also granted to M08 service identity (delegation with acting-user context) |
| `analytics.embedding_job:execute` (M18-3 POST) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ (project scope; `re_embed_new_model_version` TA+) | Robotics Data Engineer template |
| `analytics.distribution:execute` (M18-4/5/6) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | all engineering personas |
| `analytics.cohort:create/read/update` (M18-8) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | mining personas |
| `analytics.cohort:materialize` (M18-8) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ **+ transitive target key** (M07-3/M08-4/M10-4/M13-10 in user context) | BR-13: deny in target ⇒ deny |
| `analytics.coverage:read` (M18-9/10) | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | **Program Manager template (`coverage:read`) — read-only coverage persona**; Data Collection Lead |
| `analytics.cluster:execute` (M18-7) | service identities only (M15) | | | | mTLS SAN allowlist |
| `analytics.index:write` (M18-11) | SVC-04 service identity only | | | | mTLS SAN allowlist |
| `analytics.report:write` (report-store persistence) | SVC-05 service identity only | | | | mTLS SAN allowlist |

**Granularity:** project-level primary (every endpoint is project-scoped or derives project from the instance); embedding spaces may be tenant-shared (read follows project grants; admin TA). **Restricted assets are excluded from search results, similarity results, distribution payload reads, and aggregate scopes — deny-wins (§0.5.3):** the vector-store payload carries `restricted` for cheap pre-exclusion, but the **authoritative** gate is the M08 governance recheck on every serve (M18-1 step 8, M18-5 revoked_refs, M18-6 per-episode recheck); exclusion counts are always surfaced so users know results were filtered. Cohort membership additionally gates at creation (no restricted members without read grant). OE has no business-data analytics access (§0.5.3).

**Credential scoping:** report/aggregate payload URLs are short-lived signed GETs (TTL ≤ 600 s, re-mintable); **lasso selections remain client-side until the user saves a cohort** (no server persistence of exploratory selections — minimizes residual sensitive selections); encoder inference endpoints are internal to SVC-04 (no user-facing model endpoints); vector-store credentials live only in SVC-04/SVC-05/M18 service config (never in rows or logs, §1.4.7).

#### 2.18.6 Logging Design

| Level | Triggers |
|---|---|
| DEBUG | query plans with raw filter values, encoder latency, cache hit detail, selectivity inputs (off in production) |
| INFO | **search executed `{query_hash, space_id, k, strategy, result_count, restricted_excluded_count, latency_ms}`**; similar-search executed; job state transitions (queued/running/succeeded) with counts; cohort created/version_created/materialized `{target_kind, target_ref}`; coverage summary served `{dimension, staleness_s}`; index upsert batches `{space_id, upserted, skipped}` |
| WARN | **index staleness** (`index_freshness_at` lag > 120 s SLO; coverage staleness > 24 h); selectivity-estimator fallback to default plan; governance recheck dropped ids (index lag); overfetch exhausted before k filled (iterative-scan guardrail hit, §0.7.4 #4); projection cache miss storm; M18-7 items skipped (missing embeddings); job retry by content-hash replay |
| ERROR | **ANN backend unavailable → `E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE`** (fail-closed response logged with backend + space); embedding/distribution job `failed` (reason, workflow_run_ref); M08 recheck unavailable; materialization remote-create succeeded but link tx failed (saga alarm); index upsert rejected batches |
| FATAL | SVC-04 cannot persist index mutations (event consumption halted to avoid divergence) |

**JSON fields (per §1.4.6 shared schema +):** `query_hash`, `space_id`, `k`, `strategy` (prefilter|filtered_ann|iterative), `selectivity`, `fusion_method`, `result_count`, `restricted_excluded_count`, `job_id` (`ebj-`/`dst-`), `params_hash`, `cohort_id`, `cohort_version`, `target_kind`, `dimension`, `latency_ms`, `error_code`.

**Masking (§1.4.7):** **query text is never logged at INFO or above — only `query_hash`** (sha256; raw text at DEBUG only, off in prod); exemplar refs logged as ids; cohort names/descriptions logged as `cohort_id` only; vector values never logged; payload URLs never logged (signed URLs rule); distribution payload contents logged as `{report_id, byte_size, checksum}` summaries.

**Shipping:** stdout JSON → OTel collector pipeline; `traceparent` propagated user → M18 → SVC-04/SVC-05 → vector store driver spans, and across delegation (M08-1 → M18-1 carries the originating trace).

**Audit events (M03-11; BR-14):** **`analytics.search.executed`** `{filter summary (facet keys + value counts, not free text), query_hash, space_id, result_count, restricted_excluded_count}` — searches over governed data are access-relevant (FR-A8.8 alignment); `analytics.embedding_job.launched` / `analytics.distribution_job.launched` `{params_hash, scope}`; `analytics.cohort.created` / `analytics.cohort.version_created` `{definition kind}`; **`analytics.cohort.materialized`** `{cohort_id@version, target_kind, target_ref}`; `analytics.coverage.gap_analyzed` `{baselines, handoffs}`; `analytics.space.registered/retiered/deprecated` (TA-initiated actions executed through platform migration tooling in v1 — spaces have no public registration endpoint (§2.18.4); the audit trail still records actor + before/after).

---

### 2.19 M19 — Integrated 4D Workbench

#### 2.19.1 Module Overview

**Module ID & name:** M19 — Integrated 4D Workbench (cross-cutting group; FRD §9X).

M19 is the platform's single synchronized review surface: video, spatial data (point clouds, poses), robot state, action records, annotations, predictions, and evaluation outcomes rendered **on one common timeline** (FR-X1.1), following the Rerun entity-path + global-timeline model with blueprint-as-code layouts and the Foxglove synchronized panel-library/MCAP conventions (§0.7.4 #10/#11), plus FiftyOne-style side-by-side model comparison (#12).

**Owns:** Workbench Sessions (`wbs-{ulid}`, ephemeral) and Comparison Sessions (`cps-{ulid}`); Comments (`cmt-{ulid}`, durable, with issue links); Review Decisions (`rvd-{ulid}` — **routing records**, immutable); Failure Tags (`ftg-{ulid}` — **link records** to M15 failure records); Saved Views (`viw-{ulid}`, Table 0.3 #31); layout blueprint templates per review kind. **Explicit ID-prefix rule: workbench sessions use `wbs-`; the `ses-` prefix is reserved for M01 login sessions (Table 0.3 #27) and is never used here.**

**Excludes — M19 owns NO reviewed assets (§1.6.4, X-row of §0.2.2):** it is a *pure review surface that routes every decision out* through owning-module official interfaces — annotation QA outcomes → M07, evaluation triage/conversion → M13, failure records → M15 (single-writer rule; M19 never writes a reviewed asset's rows). Also excluded: stream storage and signed-URL minting authority (M05-12/M06-5 own content access and their deny-wins gates); alignment computation (M06); aggregate computation (M18-6 — M19 *renders* trajectory overlays/heatmaps/temporal charts that M18 *computes*, §1.6.4 split); cohort persistence (M18-8 — M19-7 hands off); model/eval truth (M12/M13); audit storage (M03).

**Roles & personas:** all engineering personas open sessions on assets they can read (FR-X1.2): Robotics Data Engineer (recording/episode QA — AC-02), **Annotator + Annotation QA Lead** (annotation review workflows, X1.6), Simulation Engineer (sim output review, FR-B2/B4 validation evidence inspection), Model Engineer & **Evaluation Lead** (prediction overlays, comparison sessions X1.5, failure triage X1.6 — AC-11), Governance Approver (read-only evidence review). Built-ins per §1.4.8; OE none (business data). Program Manager: read-only session access via `report:read`-style grants is *not* provided — workbench access requires asset read permissions.

**Upstream:** M05-12 (raw stream signed URLs), M06-5 (episode synchronized stream manifests — the same manifest contract, AC-02), M06 (segments, tags, lineage), M07 (annotation tasks/sets, pre-annotations for overlays), M10 (simulation run outputs), M12 (candidate metadata for comparisons), M13 (evaluation reports, prediction artifacts, failure refs, session handoff payloads per §2.13), M15 (failure evidence deep links), M18 (M18-5/M18-6 visual aggregate payloads), M08-2 (governance envelopes for the status banner), M01/M02/M03.
**Downstream (decision routing, §0.5.2 edge M19 → M07/M13/M15):** M07-9/M07-12 (QA adjudication/escalation), M13-9 (failure conversion), M15-1/M15-3 (failure records/triage), M18-8 (saved-view cohort handoff), M03-11 (audit, FR-X1.8), M20 (mentions/decision notifications).

**FRD/mandate coverage:** FR-X1.1–X1.8 (complete, §1.7.1); FR-C4.6 jointly with M13; AC-02 (alignment review), AC-11 (failure tagging → M15); research §0.7.4 #10–#12.

#### 2.19.2 Functional & UI/UX Design

**Primary functions**

| # | Function | Description | FRD |
|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | Synchronized 4D review | One global timeline; entity-path-addressed streams (video, point cloud, TF/poses, joint states, action track, annotations, predictions, eval outcomes) scrub/pause/step/speed together | FR-X1.1 |
| F2 | Open-from-anywhere | Sessions over: raw recordings, aligned episodes, annotation tasks, simulation outputs, evaluation failures, model comparison cases | FR-X1.2 |
| F3 | Status banner | Always-visible context: asset status, source type, quality status, annotation status, synthetic/real indicator, model version, evaluation context | FR-X1.3 |
| F4 | In-context creation | Comments (+issue links), failure tags, review decisions created at a timeline anchor; all routed to owning modules | FR-X1.4 |
| F5 | Side-by-side comparison | 2–4 candidates on the same episode/scenario where evaluation outputs exist; locked clocks; metric-delta panel | FR-X1.5 |
| F6 | Reviewer workflows | Annotation QA queue stepper; evaluation failure triage queue; decisions recorded in context | FR-X1.6 |
| F7 | Saved views & cohort handoff | Persist layout+position+overlays; share to project; convert selections to M18-8 cohorts for datasets/sim requests/regression sets | FR-X1.7 |
| F8 | Auditability | Every status-affecting workbench action audited via M03-11 | FR-X1.8 |

**P1 — Workbench Session** (bindings `M19-1`, `M19-2`, `M19-4`, `M19-5`, `M19-6`; route `/workbench/{wbs_id}`). Layout = blueprint template per review kind (teleop QA, annotation review, sim validation, eval triage — versioned blueprint-as-code, §0.7.4 #10), user-adjustable: a **timeline scrubber** (global clock, frame-step, speed 0.25–4x, loop range, event tick marks for segments/failures/decisions/comments) governs all panes; pane cursor-lock: hover in any pane draws the time cursor in all.

**Synchronized panes (entity-path bound, one global clock — FR-X1.1):**

| Pane | Entity paths | Content source | Sync behavior |
|---|---|---|---|
| Video grid | `/cam/*` | M06-5/M05-12 video streams (multi-camera, layout presets) | frame-accurate seek via `frame_index_ref`; per-stream `alignment_offset_ns` applied |
| 3D point-cloud / pose viewer | `/scene/points`, `/robot/pose`, `/tf/*` | point-cloud streams + URDF pose from step store; M18-6 `trajectory_overlay` + workspace heatmap as toggleable layers | nearest-sample interpolation; trajectory polyline drawn up to cursor time |
| Robot-state plots | `/robot/joints/*`, `/robot/ee_wrench` | M18-6 `temporal_sequence` payloads (LTTB-downsampled; zoom triggers re-fetch at higher resolution) | shared x-axis = global clock; cursor line mirrored |
| Action track | `/actions/segments` | M06 segments + action labels (lane chart per level: episode/phase/atomic) | lane spans clickable → loop-range set |
| Annotation overlays | `/annotations/{ans-id}` | M07 annotation sets / pre-annotations (boxes, masks, keypoints, action spans; toggle per set@version; pre-annotations badged "machine, unconfirmed" per BR-06) | rendered into video + 3D panes at cursor time |
| Prediction overlays | `/predictions/{mdl-id}` | M13 prediction artifacts per candidate (predicted actions/detections + confidence; toggle per model version, color-keyed) | rendered into video/3D/plots; divergence ticks on the scrubber |
| Eval outcome strip | `/evaluation/outcomes` | M13 report breakdown rows for this episode (pass/fail per metric) | static strip with seek-to-failure links |

**Status banner (X1.3 — exact field list, always rendered, non-dismissable, one chip per field; `n/a` where not applicable):**

| Field | Source | Render |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_status` | owning module lifecycle (e.g., episode `ready`, task `in_review`, report `approved`) | neutral chip |
| `source_type` | `raw_recording \| episode \| annotation_task \| simulation_output \| evaluation_failure \| comparison_case` | type icon chip |
| `quality_status` | M05/M06 (`accepted`, `accepted_with_warnings`, `quarantined`, `alignment_failed`) | green/amber/red chip |
| `annotation_status` | M07 (`unannotated`, `in_progress`, `approved`, `rejected`) | chip |
| `synthetic_real` | BR-03 indicator (`real \| synthetic \| augmented \| mixed`) | **permanent high-contrast badge** (synthetic never removable) |
| `model_version` | M12 candidate ref(s) when predictions/eval context present (`mdl-…@v`) | chip per candidate, color-keyed to overlays |
| `evaluation_context` | M13 (`evr-…`, suite@version, outcome) when opened from evaluation | chip + deep link |

Restricted assets additionally show the access-audited notice ("this access is recorded" — FR-A8.8/X1.8).

**Entry-point matrix (FR-X1.2 — every kind openable):**

| source_kind | Typical entry surface | Default blueprint | Banner specifics |
|---|---|---|---|
| `raw_recording` | M05-6 recording detail, M05 quarantine queue | `intake_review@v` | quality_status prominent; annotation_status `n/a`; pre-alignment ⇒ per-stream capture clocks (`sync_quality: approximate`) |
| `episode` | M06-3 lists, M08 catalog rows, M18 P1 results | `teleop_qa@v` | full field set; alignment quality from DA-05 policy evaluation |
| `annotation_task` | M07-4 task queues ("Review in workbench") | `annotation_review@v` | annotation_status + task state; annotation overlays pre-enabled; pre-annotations badged per BR-06 |
| `simulation_output` | M10-2 run detail, M10-6 validation review | `sim_validation@v` | synthetic_real = `synthetic` (permanent badge, BR-03); scenario@version chip |
| `evaluation_failure` | M13 failure lists / M15 evidence links (handoff payload per §2.13) | `eval_triage@v` | evaluation_context + model_version populated; failure anchor pre-seeded as loop range |
| `comparison_case` | M13-7 comparison rows, M12 baseline links | `model_compare@v` | routed to M19-3 (one banner chip per candidate) |

Session-open form (bound `M19-1`):

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| source_kind | enum | the 6-value FR-X1.2 set | from invoking surface | — | required (`E_WB_ASSET_KIND_UNSUPPORTED`) |
| source_refs | refs | `rec-/epi-/ant-/sim-/fal- or evr-#failure / comparison spec` | from surface | — | resolvable + readable; 1–4 primary refs |
| overlays | multi-select | annotation sets (`ans-@v`), prediction sources (`mdl-@v` via `evr-`), segments | sensible per kind | — | refs must belong to the same episode/recording family |
| blueprint | select | registered layout templates | per source_kind | — | — |

Comment composer (anchored; binding `M19-4`):

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| body | markdown textarea | ≤ 8 KB | — | "What did you observe?" | required, non-empty |
| anchor | auto-captured | `{ts_ns \| ts_range_ns, entity_path, spatial?}` | current cursor / loop range + focused pane | — | within asset range (`E_WB_COMMENT_ANCHOR_INVALID`) |
| issue_links[] | ref picker + URL | `wrq- / fal- / anp- / evr-` or https URL | — | "Link an issue or asset" | ≤ 10; platform refs resolvable in-tenant |
| mentions[] | @user picker | project members | — | "@name" | members only → M20 notification |

Failure-tag dialog (binding `M19-6`):

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| failure_category | taxonomy picker | M06-9 failure taxonomy, pinned version | — | "manipulation/grasp_slip" | path valid at pinned version |
| severity | select | `s1 \| s2 \| s3 \| s4` | s3 | — | required |
| anchor range | time range | ns range | current loop range | — | within asset range |
| note | textarea | ≤ 2 KB | — | — | optional |
| link_existing | `fal-` picker | existing in-project record | off | "Link instead of create" | mutually exclusive with category/severity create path |

Review-decision drawer: see P3.

**Output rendering & exceptions (session-wide):** manifest loading → pane skeletons with per-stream readiness; streams that failed alignment render an amber "unaligned stream excluded" lane note (partial manifest), `E_WB_STREAMS_UNALIGNED` (no common timeline at all) → blocking dialog with link to the M06 alignment report; expired signed URLs → transparent re-fetch of the manifest (no scrub-position loss); `E_WB_SESSION_EXPIRED` → "session expired — reopen" (one click recreates from the same source refs; nothing is lost because sessions own no content); 403 `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` on a stream → that stream omitted with a lock chip + count notice ("2 restricted streams excluded"), never raw rendering; network loss → playback continues on buffered data with an offline banner; `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` on decision/tag → drawer explains the missing permission key; 429 `E_RATE_LIMITED` → comment composer queues locally with countdown.

**P2 — Comparison Split View** (binding `M19-3`; route `/workbench/compare/{cps_id}`). 2–4 vertical panes, one per model candidate on the **same episode/scenario** (X1.5): each pane = mini session (video + 3D + prediction overlay for that candidate), **all clocks locked** to one master scrubber; **delta panel** (right rail): per-metric deltas from M13-7 comparison data, divergence markers on the timeline (first time-step where actions diverge beyond threshold), per-candidate outcome chips; click a delta row → seek all panes to that event (FiftyOne comparison pattern, §0.7.4 #12). Banner renders **one model_version chip per pane**, color-keyed. Validation: every candidate must have evaluation outputs on the target (`E_WB_NO_EVAL_OUTPUTS`, 422, listing missing candidates).

**P3 — Review Decision Drawer** (binding `M19-5`; embedded in P1/P2 + queue mode for X1.6). Queue mode: "Next item" stepper bound to an M07 QA sample set or an M13/M15 failure list (handoff payloads); progress `n/m`. Fields:

| Name | Type | Format | Default | Placeholder | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| decision_type | enum | `annotation_qa \| eval_failure_triage` | per session kind | — | required (`E_WB_DECISION_TYPE_INVALID`) |
| verdict | enum | annotation_qa: `approve \| reject \| needs_rework \| escalate`; eval_failure_triage: `confirm_failure \| not_a_failure \| duplicate \| needs_data` | — | — | required; enum per type |
| target_ref | ref | `ant-/qar-/ans- \| evr-#failure_ref/fal-` | from context | — | must match decision_type |
| rationale | textarea | ≤ 4 KB | — | "Why?" | required for reject/needs_rework/not_a_failure |
| failure_category / severity | taxonomy / enum | M06-9 / s1–s4 | — | — | required iff verdict=confirm_failure |
| duplicate_of | ref | `fal-` | — | — | required iff verdict=duplicate |

Submit → decision recorded (immutable) + routing chip `pending → delivered` (live update); delivered chip deep-links the created/updated target (`qar-` adjudication, `fal-` record). Routing failure after retries → amber "recorded, delivery pending — operations notified" (decision is never lost; §2.19.3).

Queue-mode flow (X1.6 reviewer workflows):
1. Entry: M07 QA sample set ("Review in workbench" on M07-8 sets) or M13/M15 failure list handoff — the queue ref + item cursor arrive in `M19-1 context`.
2. Each "Next" advances the cursor: the current session's source refs swap to the next item (same `wbs-` session, new manifest fetch — sessions are multi-item in queue mode; `last_activity_at` slides).
3. The drawer pre-fills `decision_type`, `target_ref`, and (for failures) the anchor from the source evidence range; verdict + rationale are the reviewer's only required inputs.
4. Submit → `M19-5`; the queue chip shows `n/m decided`; undecided items can be skipped (skip is not a decision — nothing recorded or routed).
5. Queue completion → summary card (decided/skipped counts, per-verdict tally) with deep links to M07-10 agreement metrics or M15 triage board.
Validation: decisions against an item not in the bound queue are blocked client-side (server accepts any valid target — queues are a UX device, not an authorization boundary).

**P4 — Saved Views Gallery** (binding `M19-7`; route `/workbench/views`). Cards (name, source refs, blueprint thumbnail, owner, shared badge, updated_at); open → recreates a session at the saved timeline position with saved overlays; actions: rename, share to project (`workbench.view.shared` audit), delete, **"Create cohort in Analytics"** (→ M18-8 in user context with `definition.upstream_ref = {type: saved_view, ref: viw-…}` — X1.7 handoff for dataset creation / simulation requests / regression sets). Stale refs (source asset purged/superseded) render a warning chip (`E_WB_VIEW_REF_STALE` on open, with "open replacement" when a superseding ref exists).

#### 2.19.3 Interface Design

All endpoints follow §1.4. Module error namespace `E_WB_*`; authz via M03-10; audit via M03-11. M19 performs **no writes to reviewed assets** — every outbound mutation is a call to an owning-module official endpoint in the acting user's context (§1.6.4).

**Endpoint contract summary (per §1.5 — names/paths exact, no drift)**

| # | Method & path | Permission key | Idempotency / concurrency | Tx boundary |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| M19-1 | `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/workbench-sessions` | `workbench.session:create` (+ per-ref read) | `Idempotency-Key` per §1.4.4 | single insert |
| M19-2 | `GET /api/v1/workbench-sessions/{session_id}` (+ `/timeline-manifest`) | session owner / project read (per-ref re-check) | read-only; manifest re-fetch = URL refresh | none (audit append; TTL slide) |
| M19-3 | `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/comparison-sessions` | `workbench.session:create` | `Idempotency-Key` | single insert |
| M19-4 | `POST /api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/comments` · `GET` · `PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/comments/{comment_id}` | `workbench.comment:create` / asset read / author (TA moderate) | POST `Idempotency-Key`; PATCH/DELETE If-Match | insert/update + outbox (mentions) |
| M19-5 | `POST /api/v1/workbench-sessions/{session_id}/review-decisions` | `workbench.review:decide` + transitive target key | decision insert idempotent by key; **routing idempotent by `rvd-` id** | local insert + outbox; remote delivery async (saga, no 2PC) |
| M19-6 | `POST /api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/failure-tags` | `workbench.failure_tag:create` + transitive `failure.record:create` | M15-1 call idempotent by propagated key; remote-first, link tx second | remote create **before** local link insert |
| M19-7 | `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/saved-views` · `GET` · `GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/saved-views/{view_id}` | `workbench.view:create/read/update/delete` (+`:share`) | PATCH/DELETE If-Match; name-unique `E_CONFLICT` | single row |

**Normative state machines (exact)**

```text
WorkbenchSession.status (also ComparisonSession):
  active ──(TTL 72 h from last_activity_at, or explicit close)──▶ expired   (terminal; reopen = new wbs-)
ReviewDecision:
  recorded (immutable on creation — no edits, no deletes; supersede by a new decision referencing the old)
  · routed_status: pending ──(owning-module 2xx)──▶ delivered                (at-least-once relay, idempotent by decision id)
```

**Module error codes (`E_WB_*`)**

| Code | HTTP | Raised when |
|---|---|---|
| `E_WB_ASSET_KIND_UNSUPPORTED` | 422 | source_kind outside the FR-X1.2 6-value set, or ref prefix mismatch |
| `E_WB_STREAMS_UNALIGNED` | 409 | No common timeline mapping exists across requested streams (alignment missing/failed and no fallback domain) |
| `E_WB_SESSION_EXPIRED` | 410 | Read/write against an `expired` session |
| `E_WB_NO_EVAL_OUTPUTS` | 422 | Comparison candidate lacks evaluation outputs on the target episode/scenario (X1.5 precondition) |
| `E_WB_DECISION_TYPE_INVALID` | 422 | decision_type/verdict/target_ref combination invalid |
| `E_WB_COMMENT_ANCHOR_INVALID` | 422 | Anchor ts outside asset time range / unknown entity_path |
| `E_WB_VIEW_REF_STALE` | 409 | Saved-view source refs no longer resolvable (purged/superseded) |
| Shared | — | `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` (per-stream deny-wins), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_RATE_LIMITED`, `E_VALIDATION`, `E_NOT_FOUND`, `E_PRECONDITION_FAILED`, `E_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` per §1.4.3 |

**M19-1 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/workbench-sessions`** — open a session (FR-X1.2).
Permission: `workbench.session:create` (+ read permission on every source ref, asset-level deny-wins).
Body: `{ "source_kind": "episode", "source_refs": ["epi-01J..."], "overlays": { "annotation_sets": ["ans-01J...@3"], "prediction_sources": [{"model_ref": "mdl-01J...@7", "evaluation_run_ref": "evr-01J..."}], "segments": true }, "blueprint": "teleop_qa@2", "context": { "handoff": "m13_failure_list"?, "queue_ref": "..."? } }`.
Processing: 1. authz `workbench.session:create` at project + batch read-check of all refs (M03-10 batch + owning-module existence; restricted refs without grant → `E_RESTRICTED_DATA` listing offending refs — the session is **not** created with silently-dropped primaries; overlay refs may be dropped with a warning list). 2. Validate kind/refs (`E_WB_ASSET_KIND_UNSUPPORTED`); resolve the **status context block** (M08-2 envelopes + M12/M13 context — the X1.3 field set, cached in the session row). 3. **Tx:** insert `workbench.session` (`wbs-{ulid}`, status `active`, expires policy 72 h TTL, blueprint pinned, context snapshot) — commit. 4. Audit **`workbench.session.opened`** `{source_kind, refs, restricted: bool}` (content access trail, FR-X1.8/FR-A8.8). 5. **201** `{"workbench_session_id": "wbs-01J...", "status": "active", "expires_at": "...", "timeline_manifest_ref": "/api/v1/workbench-sessions/wbs-01J.../timeline-manifest"}`. Idempotency-Key honored per §1.4.4.

**M19-2 `GET /api/v1/workbench-sessions/{session_id}` · `GET /api/v1/workbench-sessions/{session_id}/timeline-manifest`** — session state + synchronized manifest (FR-X1.1/X1.3).
Permission: `workbench.session:create` implies read of own sessions; project members with read grants may open shared session links (re-authorized per ref at manifest time).
Session GET → `200`:

```json
{ "workbench_session_id": "wbs-01J...", "status": "active", "source_kind": "episode",
  "source_refs": ["epi-01J..."], "overlays": { "annotation_sets": ["ans-01J...@3"],
  "prediction_sources": [{"model_ref": "mdl-01J...@7"}] }, "blueprint": "teleop_qa@2",
  "queue": { "ref": "qas-01J...", "cursor": 4, "total": 30 },
  "created_by": "usr-...", "created_at": "...", "last_activity_at": "...", "expires_at": "..." }
```

Expired → `E_WB_SESSION_EXPIRED` (410) with `reopen_hint` (source refs — one-click recreation; nothing is lost because sessions own no content).
**Timeline-manifest processing (numbered):**
1. Authz + session `active` check; per-ref read re-check (grants may have changed since open — deny-wins now, not at open time only).
2. **Resolve streams via owning modules:** episodes → **M06-5** (synchronized stream manifest: video containers, step-store parquet slices, calibration set); raw recordings → **M05-12** (raw stream signed URLs); simulation outputs → M10 run artifact refs; annotation/prediction/eval overlays → M07/M13 artifact refs; M18-6 aggregates (trajectory/heatmap/temporal) attached as overlay layers when requested. Per-stream restriction denials omit the stream and append `{stream_key, reason: "restricted"}` to `excluded[]` with a total count (deny-wins, §0.5.3).
3. **Common-timeline mapping:** adopt the episode's `time_base` (`source_ns` per M06-5) as the global clock; compute per-stream `alignment_offset_ns` + clock mapping from M06 alignment metadata (raw recordings without episode alignment fall back to per-recording capture clock; multi-source sessions with no mutual mapping → `E_WB_STREAMS_UNALIGNED` 409 with the offending stream pairs; partially mappable sets return a partial manifest + WARN entries). Streams carry `sync_quality: aligned|approximate|unaligned_excluded` (tolerance data from the DA-05 policy evaluation).
4. **Signed URLs:** collect/mint short-lived signed GETs (TTL ≤ 600 s, per M05-12/M06-5 contracts — M19 never extends TTLs); manifest `expires_at` = min stream expiry; clients re-fetch the manifest to refresh (idempotent, no scrub loss).
5. **Status context block:** the X1.3 exact field set — `{asset_status, source_type, quality_status, annotation_status, synthetic_real, model_version[], evaluation_context}` — refreshed from M08-2/M12/M13 (≤ 60 s cache).
6. **Layout:** entity-path tree (`/cam/head`, `/scene/points`, `/robot/joints/arm_l_j3`, `/actions/segments`, `/annotations/ans-…`, `/predictions/mdl-…`) + pinned blueprint (panes → entity-path bindings) — Rerun/Foxglove model (§0.7.4 #10/#11).
7. Audit content access for restricted-but-granted streams; INFO log; bump `last_activity_at` (TTL slide).
8. **200**:

```json
{ "session_id": "wbs-01J...", "time_base": "source_ns", "range_ns": [0, 184000000000],
  "status_context": { "asset_status": "ready", "source_type": "episode", "quality_status": "accepted",
    "annotation_status": "approved", "synthetic_real": "real",
    "model_version": ["mdl-01J...@7"], "evaluation_context": {"report_ref": "evr-01J...", "outcome": "failed"} },
  "streams": [ { "entity_path": "/cam/head", "modality": "video", "container": "mp4_av1",
      "url": "https://...signed...", "alignment_offset_ns": 0, "sync_quality": "aligned", "expires_at": "..." },
    { "entity_path": "/robot/joints", "modality": "joint_state", "container": "parquet", "url": "...", "row_range": [120, 870] },
    { "entity_path": "/predictions/mdl-01J...", "modality": "action_pred", "container": "parquet", "url": "..." } ],
  "overlay_aggregates": [ {"type": "trajectory_overlay", "payload_url": "...", "expires_at": "..."} ],
  "excluded": [ {"stream_key": "video/cam_wrist", "reason": "restricted"} ], "excluded_restricted_count": 1,
  "blueprint": { "template": "teleop_qa@2", "panes": [ {"kind": "video_grid", "paths": ["/cam/*"]} ] },
  "expires_at": "2026-06-11T08:10:00Z" }
```

**M19-3 `POST /api/v1/projects/{project_id}/comparison-sessions`** — side-by-side candidates (FR-X1.5).
Permission: `workbench.session:create`.
Body: `{ "target": { "kind": "episode|scenario", "ref": "epi-01J..." }, "candidates": [ { "model_ref": "mdl-01J...@7", "evaluation_run_ref": "evr-..." }, { "model_ref": "mdl-01J...@9", "evaluation_run_ref": "evr-..." } ], "blueprint": "model_compare@1" }`.
Processing: 1. authz + target/candidate read checks; 2–4 candidates (`E_VALIDATION`); 2. verify **evaluation outputs exist** per candidate on the target (M13 artifact lookup; missing → `E_WB_NO_EVAL_OUTPUTS` 422 with `details.missing[]` — X1.5 "where evaluation outputs exist"); 3. fetch metric deltas via M13-7 comparison data (snapshot stored — recomputable, never authoritative); 4. **Tx:** insert `workbench.comparison_session` (`cps-{ulid}`, status `active`, TTL 72 h) — commit; audit `workbench.session.opened` `{kind: comparison}`; **201**:

```json
{ "comparison_session_id": "cps-01J...", "status": "active",
  "target": { "kind": "episode", "ref": "epi-01J..." },
  "panes": [ { "model_ref": "mdl-01J...@7", "manifest_ref": "/api/v1/workbench-sessions/cps-01J.../timeline-manifest?pane=0" },
             { "model_ref": "mdl-01J...@9", "manifest_ref": ".../timeline-manifest?pane=1" } ],
  "delta_summary": { "source": "m13-7", "metrics": [ {"name": "task_success", "a": 0.81, "b": 0.74, "delta": -0.07} ],
                     "divergence_marks_ns": [41200000000, 98700000000] },
  "expires_at": "..." }
```

Each pane manifest resolves through the M19-2 logic with the prediction overlay pinned to its candidate and the master clock locked across panes; the status banner renders one `model_version` chip per pane (X1.3).

**M19-4 `POST /api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/comments` · `GET` (same) · `PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/comments/{comment_id}`** — contextual comments (FR-X1.4).
Permissions: create `workbench.comment:create` (+ read on the asset); GET asset read; PATCH/DELETE author-only (TA may moderate-delete with reason).
POST body: `{ "body": "gripper closes 200 ms early", "anchor": { "session_ref": "wbs-..."?, "ts_ns": 41200000000, "ts_range_ns": null, "entity_path": "/cam/head", "spatial": {"kind": "bbox3d", "data": {...}}? }, "issue_links": [ {"kind": "failure_record", "ref": "fal-01J..."}, {"kind": "url", "ref": "https://tracker/PROJ-123"} ], "mentions": ["usr-..."] }`.
Processing: 1. authz; asset readable; anchor within asset range (`E_WB_COMMENT_ANCHOR_INVALID`); body ≤ 8 KB; ≤ 10 issue links with resolvable in-tenant refs for platform kinds (`wrq-/fal-/anp-/evr-`). 2. **Tx:** insert `workbench.comment` (anchored to `{asset_ref, anchor}`; session ref optional — comments outlive sessions) + outbox (M20 mention notifications) — commit. 3. Issue-link attach audited (`workbench.comment.linked`). 4. **201**. PATCH (body/links; If-Match; edit history retained) / DELETE (soft tombstone, body cleared, audit). GET `?anchor_from_ns&anchor_to_ns&author&page_size&page_token` — timeline tick marks come from this list:

```json
{ "items": [ { "comment_id": "cmt-01J...", "asset_ref": "epi-01J...",
    "anchor": { "ts_ns": 41200000000, "entity_path": "/cam/head", "spatial": null },
    "body": "gripper closes 200 ms early", "issue_links": [ {"kind": "failure_record", "ref": "fal-01J..."} ],
    "author": "usr-...", "created_at": "...", "edited": false, "tombstoned": false } ],
  "next_page_token": null, "total_size": 12 }
```

**M19-5 `POST /api/v1/workbench-sessions/{session_id}/review-decisions`** — QA / triage decisions routed out (FR-X1.6; single-writer §1.6.4).
Permission: `workbench.review:decide` **+ transitive target permission in the acting user's context** (annotation_qa → `label.qa:adjudicate`/`label.task:escalate`; eval_failure_triage → `failure.record:update` or `mlops.eval:execute` (M13-9)) — checked via M03-10 batch-check **before** recording; deny ⇒ `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, nothing recorded.
Body: `{ "decision_type": "annotation_qa", "verdict": "reject", "target_ref": "qar-01J...", "rationale": "label drift on frames 1200-1290", "anchor": { "ts_range_ns": [40000000000, 43000000000] }, "failure_category": null, "severity": null, "duplicate_of": null }`.
Processing (numbered):
1. Authz (above); session `active` (`E_WB_SESSION_EXPIRED`); decision_type/verdict/target combination validated (`E_WB_DECISION_TYPE_INVALID`); conditional fields per P3 rules (`E_VALIDATION`).
2. **Tx:** insert `workbench.review_decision` (`rvd-{ulid}`, **immutable**, `routed_status='pending'`, full payload + actor + session + anchor snapshot) + outbox routing intent — commit. The decision record is the durable governance fact even if routing is delayed (FR-X1.8).
3. **Routing relay (at-least-once, idempotent by `Idempotency-Key = rvd-{ulid}`, acting-user context propagated):** `annotation_qa` → M07-9 `:adjudicate` (verdict mapping in M07-9 vocabulary: approve→`accept`; reject→`reject` — which triggers M07's rework edge `rejected→claimed`; needs_rework→`reject` with the rationale flagged `rework_requested`; `fix` is not produced from M19 — corrected payloads are authored only in M07's QA board) or M07-12 `:escalate`; `eval_failure_triage` → `confirm_failure` ⇒ M13-9 `:convert` (when source is an eval-report failure) or M15-1 create + M15-3 triage `{category, severity}`; `not_a_failure|duplicate|needs_data` ⇒ M15-3 triage update (duplicate carries `duplicate_of`). Target 2xx → `routed_status='delivered'` + `target_result_ref` stored; 4xx → relay stops, decision flagged `delivery_rejected` (WARN + requester notification — the target module's rules win; the decision row stays as the audit fact); 5xx → full-jitter retries, escalating WARN→ERROR + ops alert after 5 attempts (`routed_status` remains `pending`; never silently dropped).
4. Audit **`workbench.review.decided`** `{decision_type, verdict, target_ref, session_id}`; **201** `{"review_decision_id": "rvd-01J...", "routed_status": "pending"}` (client polls/SSE chip → `delivered`).

**M19-6 `POST /api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/failure-tags`** — failure tagging (FR-X1.4; AC-11).
Permission: `workbench.failure_tag:create` **+ transitive `failure.record:create` (M15-1) in user context** (or `failure.record:read` when only linking an existing record).
Body: `{ "failure_category": { "taxonomy_id": "tax-...", "taxonomy_version": 4, "path": "manipulation/grasp_slip" }, "severity": "s2", "anchor": { "ts_range_ns": [40000000000, 43000000000], "entity_path": "/cam/head" }, "note": "...", "existing_failure_id": null, "session_ref": "wbs-01J..." }`.
